### code file start: internal/service/landsat_service.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import asyncio
import base64
import copy
import json
import traceback
from datetime import datetime
from typing import Any, Tuple

from tortoise.models import Q

from common import constants
from common.errors import LandsatApiReqError
from common.logger import debugger
from common.settings import get_json_config
from internal.api.landsat_api import LandsatApi
from models.feature_model import TFeatureDefineModel
from models.landsat_task_model import TFeatureLandsatTaskModel, TFeatureDefineBindLandsatTaskModel
import datetime
from typing import List
from utils import time
from utils.util_funs import get_feature_env

#        пјҡinit       landsat       /       пјҲ       пјүпјӣpublish       landsat       
LANDSAT_TASK_STATUS_INIT = 'init'
LANDSAT_TASK_STATUS_PUBLISH = 'publish'

landsat_conf = get_json_config('api.landsat')

#        landsat                       landsat       
landsat_alert_for_init_conf = get_json_config('api.landsat_alert_for_init')
landsat_alert_for_publish_conf = get_json_config('api.landsat_alert_for_publish')

DELAY_MINUTES = 10


class LandsatService:
    def __init__(
            self, task_name: str = None, task_type: str = constants.LandsatTaskType.Hive.CODE, description: str = '',
            sql: str = None, landsat_task_id=None, mongo_rely_hive_landsat_task_id=None,
            hive_task_downstream_spark_task_id=None, domain_name=None,
    ):
        self.upstream_rely_task_list = None
        self._landsat_api = LandsatApi()

        # task_name = '{}_{}_{}_{}'.format(task_type, domain_name, table_name, order_id)
        self.task_name = task_name

        self.task_type = task_type

        self.folder_name = landsat_conf['folder_name']
        self.project_name = landsat_conf['project_name']
        self.sql = sql
        self.description = description

        self.landsat_task_id = landsat_task_id
        self._mongo_rely_hive_landsat_task_id = mongo_rely_hive_landsat_task_id  # mongo       
        self._hive_task_downstream_spark_task_id = hive_task_downstream_spark_task_id # hive       spark       id
        self._domain_name = domain_name

        self._save_alert_succ = False

        self._task_type_is_hive = False
        self._task_type_is_spark = False
        if self.task_type == constants.LandsatTaskType.Hive.CODE:
            self.operator_id = landsat_conf['hive.operator_id']
            self._task_type_is_hive = True
        elif self.task_type == constants.LandsatTaskType.Spark.CODE:
            self.operator_id = landsat_conf['spark.operator_id']
            self._task_type_is_spark = True
        else:
            raise ValueError(f'{self.task_type} type not support')

        self.task_conf = None
        self.schedule_conf = None
        self.alter_conf = None

    async def async_init(self):
        #        
        self.task_conf = await self.save_task_conf()
        if self._task_type_is_hive:
            await self.run_once()
        if self._task_type_is_spark:
            #        
            await self._build_spark_shedule_conf()
            await self.save_task_schedule_conf(self.schedule_conf)
            await self.__only_publish(LANDSAT_TASK_STATUS_INIT)
        return self

    async def _build_spark_shedule_conf(self, ):
        conf = {
            "landsat_task_id": self.landsat_task_id,
            "schedule_type": "event",
            "schedule_config": {
                "depend_event": [
                    {
                        "task_id": self._mongo_rely_hive_landsat_task_id,
                        "trigger_rule": 1
                    }
                ]
            },
            "retries": landsat_conf['landsat.retries'],
            "retry_delay_num_minutes":landsat_conf['landsat.retry_delay_num_minutes'] ,
            "execution_timeout_num_minutes": landsat_conf['landsat.execution_timeout_num_minutes'],
            "extra": {
                "basicPaneData": {
                    "depend_event": [
                        {
                            "task_id": self._mongo_rely_hive_landsat_task_id,
                            "trigger_rule": 1
                        }
                    ],
                    "triggerType": "event"
                },
                "strategyPaneData": {
                    "restart": "yes",
                    "restartTime": 0,
                    "restartGap": 1,
                    "restartMin": 120
                },
                "taskId": self._mongo_rely_hive_landsat_task_id
            },
            "downstream": []
        }
        self.schedule_conf = conf

    async def save_task_conf(self):
        if self._task_type_is_hive:
            json_body = {"task_info": {
                "landsat_task_id": self.landsat_task_id,
                "sql": self.sql
            },
                "extra_info": {
                    "resource_id": landsat_conf['hive.resource_id'],
                    "resource_name": landsat_conf['hive.resource_name'],
                    "conn_id": landsat_conf['hive.conn_id']
                }}
        elif self._task_type_is_spark:
            jar_execute_params_str = await self._build_jar_execute_params_str()
            json_body = {"task_info": {
                "landsat_task_id": self.landsat_task_id,
            },
                "extra_info": {
                    "environment_name": landsat_conf['spark.environment_name'],
                    "environment_id": landsat_conf['spark.environment_id'],
                    "deploy_name": landsat_conf['spark.deploy_name'],
                    "deploy_id": landsat_conf['spark.deploy_id'],
                    "resource_account": landsat_conf['spark.resource_account'],
                    "resource_id": landsat_conf['spark.resource_id'],
                    "resource_name": landsat_conf['spark.resource_name'],
                    "executor_num": landsat_conf['spark.executor_num'],
                    "driver_core": landsat_conf['spark.driver_core'],
                    "driver_mem": landsat_conf['spark.driver_mem'],
                    "executor_mem": landsat_conf['spark.executor_mem'],
                    "executor_core": landsat_conf['spark.executor_core'],
                    "jar_resource_id": landsat_conf['spark.jar_resource_id'],
                    "jar_main_class": landsat_conf['spark.jar_main_class'],
                    "jar_execute_params": jar_execute_params_str,
                    "extra_engine_params": landsat_conf['spark.extra_engine_params'],
                    "depend_landsat_resource": landsat_conf['spark.depend_landsat_resource']
                }
            }
        else:
            raise ValueError(f'not suport task_type: {self.task_type} ')
        _ = await self._landsat_api.common_request('POST', LandsatApi.TASK_CONF_URI, json_body=json_body)
        return json_body

    async def _build_jar_execute_params_str(self):
        """ mongotohive        spark       jar       """
        # _, domain_name, *_ = self.task_name.split('_')
        jar_execute_params_map = {
            'sqlB64': self.sql,
            'mongoAuthUriB64': landsat_conf['spark.mongo_url'],
            'database': landsat_conf['spark.mongo_database'],
            'collection': self._domain_name,
            'mode': 'append',
            # 'landsat_var_execution_date': None,
            'landsat_var_execution_date': '${%Y%m%d,-86400}',
            'replaceDocument': 'false',
            'maxBatchSize': '1024',
        }
        jar_execute_params_str = ''
        for k, v in jar_execute_params_map.items():
            if v is None:
                continue
            if k in ['sqlB64', 'mongoAuthUriB64']:
                v = base64.b64encode(v.encode()).decode()
            jar_execute_params_str += f'  {k}:{v}                  '
        return jar_execute_params_str

    async def create_task(self):
        req_params = {
            'task_name': self.task_name,
            'folder_name': self.folder_name, 'project_name': self.project_name,
            'operator_id': self.operator_id, 'description': self.description,
            # 'sql': self.sql
        }
        resp = await self._landsat_api.common_request('POST', LandsatApi.CREATE_TASK_URI, json_body=req_params)
        data = resp.get('data')
        return data.get('landsat_task_id')

    async def run_once(self):
        """        пјҢ       """
        utc_now_obj = datetime.datetime.utcnow()
        utc_now_obj_new = utc_now_obj + datetime.timedelta(minutes=DELAY_MINUTES, )
        debugger.debug(utc_now_obj_new)
        now_after = int(time.timestamp()) + DELAY_MINUTES * 60 * 1000
        minute = utc_now_obj_new.minute
        hour = utc_now_obj_new.hour

        once_conf = {
            "landsat_task_id": self.landsat_task_id,
            "schedule_type": "once",
            "schedule_config": {
                "start_date": now_after,
                "end_date": now_after,
                "schedule_interval": f"{minute} {hour} * * * 0"
            },
            "retries": landsat_conf['landsat.retries'],
            "retry_delay_num_minutes": landsat_conf['landsat.retry_delay_num_minutes'],
            "execution_timeout_num_minutes": landsat_conf['landsat.execution_timeout_num_minutes'],
            "extra": {
                "basicPaneData": {
                    "startTime": now_after,
                    "endTime": now_after,
                    "currentTime": now_after,
                    "cronValue": f"{minute} {hour} * * * 0",
                    "triggerType": "once"
                },
                "strategyPaneData": {
                    "restart": "yes",
                    "restartTime": 0,
                    "restartGap": 1,
                    "restartMin": 120
                },
                "taskId": self.landsat_task_id
            },
            "downstream": []
        }
        self.schedule_conf = once_conf
        _ = await self.save_task_schedule_conf(once_conf)
        await self.__only_publish(LANDSAT_TASK_STATUS_INIT)

    async def __only_publish(self, landsat_task_status):
        #        
        await self.save_alter_conf(landsat_task_status)
        url = LandsatApi.PUBLISH_URI.format(landsat_task_id=self.landsat_task_id)
        resp = await self._landsat_api.common_request("POST", url, is_auto_raise=False)
        if resp['status'] in (1157, 200):  # {'error': '       пјҢ       !', 'status': 1157, 'data': {}}
            pass
        else:
            raise LandsatApiReqError(err=f'{url}  {resp}')

    async def publish_task(self) -> Tuple[bool, Any]:
        """       hive       пјҢ       """
        if self.landsat_task_id is None:
            raise Exception("landsat_task_id  is empty ")
        try:
            if self.task_type == constants.LandsatTaskType.Hive.CODE:
                # hive       
                await self.get_upstream_rely_task()
                self._build_hive_event_run_shedule_config()
                _ = await self.save_task_schedule_conf(self._hive_event_run_shedule_config)
            await self.__only_publish(LANDSAT_TASK_STATUS_PUBLISH)
        except Exception as e:
            return False, f'traceback_exc: {traceback.format_exc()}  e:{e}'
        else:
            return True, None

    async def hive_event_init(self, upstream_rely_task: List[int]) -> Tuple[bool, Any]:
        self.task_conf = await  self.save_task_conf()
        self.upstream_rely_task_list = [{'landsat_task_id': one} for one in upstream_rely_task]
        try:
            self._build_hive_event_run_shedule_config()

            _ = await self.save_task_schedule_conf(self._hive_event_run_shedule_config)
            await self.__only_publish(LANDSAT_TASK_STATUS_PUBLISH)
        except Exception as e:
            return False, f'traceback_exc: {traceback.format_exc()}  e:{e}'
        else:
            return True, None

    async def get_upstream_rely_task(self):
        """       """
        row = await TFeatureLandsatTaskModel.select_one(Q(id=self.landsat_task_id), ['rely_landsat_task'])
        rely_task = json.loads(row.get('rely_landsat_task')) if row.get('rely_landsat_task') else []
        self.upstream_rely_task_list = []
        futures = []
        debugger.debug(rely_task)


        for item in rely_task:
            db, table = item.split('.', 1)
            get_params = {'db': db, 'table': table}
            future = asyncio.create_task(self._landsat_api.common_request('GET', LandsatApi.UPSTREAM_TASK_URI, get_params=get_params))
            futures.append(future)
        if futures:
            outer = await asyncio.gather(*futures)
            for resp in outer:
                debugger.debug(resp)
                if len(resp['data']) == 0:
                    raise LandsatApiReqError(err=f' get landsat task of get hive table  is empty')
                self.upstream_rely_task_list.extend(resp['data'])
        if get_feature_env() == 'pre':
            self.upstream_rely_task_list = [{"landsat_task_id":1000919}]



    def _build_hive_event_run_shedule_config(self):
        depend_event_list = []  # task_id  trigger_rule
        for item in self.upstream_rely_task_list:
            depend_event_list.append({'task_id': item['landsat_task_id'], 'trigger_rule': 1})
        self._hive_event_run_shedule_config = {
            "landsat_task_id": self.landsat_task_id,
            "schedule_type": "event",
            "schedule_config": {
                "depend_event": depend_event_list
            },
            "retries": landsat_conf['landsat.retries'],
            "retry_delay_num_minutes": landsat_conf['landsat.retry_delay_num_minutes'],
            "execution_timeout_num_minutes": landsat_conf['landsat.execution_timeout_num_minutes'],
            "extra": {
                "basicPaneData": {
                    "depend_event": depend_event_list,
                    "triggerType": "event"
                },
                "strategyPaneData": {
                    "restart": "yes",
                    "restartTime": 0,
                    "restartGap": 1,
                    "restartMin": 120
                },
                "taskId": self.landsat_task_id
            },
            "downstream": [self._hive_task_downstream_spark_task_id] if self._hive_task_downstream_spark_task_id else []
        }

    async def cancel_publish(self):
        """       """
        if self.landsat_task_id is None:
            raise Exception("landsat_task_id  is emtpy")
        url = LandsatApi.CANCEL_PUBLISH_URI.format(landsat_task_id=self.landsat_task_id)
        resp = await self._landsat_api.common_request('POST', url,is_auto_raise=False)
        if resp['status'] in (1194, 200):  # {error:        пјҢ       !,'status': 1194,"data': []}
            pass
        else:
            raise LandsatApiReqError(err=f'{url}  {resp}')

    async def save_task_schedule_conf(self, conf: dict):
        debugger.debug(json.dumps(conf, ensure_ascii=False))
        _ = await self._landsat_api.common_request('POST', LandsatApi.SCHEDULE_CONF_URI, json_body=conf)

    async def get_periodic_task_info(self):
        """        пјҢ       пјҢ       
        http://testyapi.akulaku.com/project/2520/interface/api/246082
        """
        url = LandsatApi.TASK_INFO_URI.format(landsat_task_id=self.landsat_task_id)
        resp = await self._landsat_api.common_request('GET', url)
        return resp['data']

    async def get_task_instances(self):
        """ http://testyapi.akulaku.com/project/2520/interface/api/246090 """
        url = LandsatApi.TASK_INSTANCE_URI.format(landsat_task_id=self.landsat_task_id)
        resp = await self._landsat_api.common_request('GET', url)
        self.instance_count = resp['data']['count']
        self.instance_list = sorted(resp['data']['instance_list'], key=lambda x: x['execution_date'], reverse=True)
        if self.instance_count > 0:
            self.instance_last = self.instance_list[0]
            self.last_execution_date = self.instance_last['execution_date']
        return resp

    async def get_task_instances_log(self):
        """       """
        await self.get_task_instances()
        json_body = {'execution_date': self.instance_last['execution_date'], 'dag_id': self.instance_last['dag_id']}
        url = LandsatApi.INSTANCE_LOG_URI.format(landsat_task_id=self.landsat_task_id)
        resp = await self._landsat_api.common_request('GET', url, get_params=json_body)
        return resp['data']

    async def get_task_event_run_satus(self):
        """        """
        await self.get_task_instances()
        state = 'no_inst'
        if self.instance_count > 0:
            # debugger.debug([self.instance_last,self.instance_list[0]['end_date'],self.instance_last['schedule_type'],])
            if self.instance_last['schedule_type'] == 'дәӢд»¶и§ҰеҸ‘' \
                    and time.timestamp() - self.instance_list[0]['end_date']  < 86400 * 1000:
                # success         failed         running          upstream_failed          queued          no_inst       
                state = self.instance_last['state']
        self.instance_last_state = state
        return state

    async def save_alter_conf(self, landsat_task_status):
        conf = {}
        if landsat_task_status == LANDSAT_TASK_STATUS_INIT:
            conf = copy.deepcopy(landsat_alert_for_init_conf)
        elif landsat_task_status == LANDSAT_TASK_STATUS_PUBLISH:
            conf = copy.deepcopy(landsat_alert_for_publish_conf)
        conf['landsat_task_id'] = self.landsat_task_id
        self.alter_conf = conf
        _ = await self._landsat_api.common_request('POST', LandsatApi.ALTER_CONF_URI, json_body=conf)

    async def rerun_task(self, next_execution_date):
        json_body = {'landsat_task_id': self.landsat_task_id, 'next_execution_date': next_execution_date}
        return await self._landsat_api.common_request('POST', LandsatApi.RERUN_URI, json_body=json_body)

    async def stop_task(self, dag_id, execution_date):
        json_body = {
            'landsat_task_id': self.landsat_task_id, 'execution_date': execution_date,
            'dag_id': dag_id, 'task_name': self.task_name
        }
        return await self._landsat_api.common_request('POST', LandsatApi.STOP_URI, json_body=json_body)


class TaskBindFeatureService:
    def __init__(self, landsat_task_id):
        self.landsat_task_id = landsat_task_id
        self.domain_name = None

    async def async_init(self):
        query = Q(task_id=self.landsat_task_id)
        show = ['feature_id']
        row = await TFeatureDefineBindLandsatTaskModel.select_one(query, show)
        _query = Q(id=row['feature_id'])
        _relate_show = {'domain_name': 'domain__domain_name'}
        _show = ['domain_id', _relate_show]
        query_set = await TFeatureDefineModel.select_one(_query, _show)
        self.domain_name = query_set.get('domain_name')
        return self

```

**code file end: internal/service/landsat_service.py**

### code file start: internal/service/magic_cube_service.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import json
from typing import AnyStr, List

import asyncio
from fastapi import Header

from common.settings import GLOBAL_CONFIGS
from internal.common.feature_use_detail import FeatureUseDetail
from common.constants import RedisKey
from common.errors import (
    AuthError,
    PressTestAddTaskDataFail,
    PressTestAddTaskFail,
    PressTestQueryDetailFail,
    PressTestStartTaskFail
)
from common.logger import debugger, root_logger
from connectors.redis_conn.async_redis import async_redis_cache, FEATURE_REDIS_POOL
from internal.api.magic_cube_api import MagicCubeRouter


class MagicCubeService:
    @classmethod
    @async_redis_cache(keys=['token'], ttl=2 * 3600)
    async def login(cls):
        resp = await MagicCubeRouter.login()
        if resp.get('code') != 200:
            raise AuthError()
        return resp.get('token')


    @classmethod
    async def get_user_info(cls, cookie: str = Header(None)):
        if not cookie:
            raise AuthError()
        resp = await MagicCubeRouter.get_user_info(cookie)
        if resp.get('code') == 200:
            data = resp.get('data')
            user = data.get('alias_name') or data.get('username')
            return user
        else:
            raise AuthError()

    @classmethod
    async def start_press_task(cls, cookie, task_ids):
        if not isinstance(task_ids, (tuple, list)):
            task_ids = [task_ids]
        tasks = []
        for task_id in task_ids:
            tasks.append(asyncio.create_task(MagicCubeRouter.start_task(cookie, task_id)))

        if tasks:
            outer = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
            for resp in outer:
                if resp.get('code') != 200:
                    raise PressTestStartTaskFail()

    @classmethod
    async def add_press_data(cls, cookie, task_ids, data):
        if not isinstance(task_ids, (tuple, list)):
            task_ids = [task_ids]

        tasks = []
        for task_id in task_ids:
            params = {"task_id": task_id, "params_data_list": data}
            tasks.append(asyncio.create_task(MagicCubeRouter.add_data(cookie, params)))
        if tasks:
            outer = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
            for resp in outer:
                if not resp:
                    raise PressTestAddTaskDataFail()

    @classmethod
    async def add_press_task(cls, cookie, domain, feature_name):
        resp = await MagicCubeRouter.add_task(cookie, domain, feature_name)
        if resp.get('code') == 200:
            payload = resp.get('data')
        else:
            payload = {}
        task_id = payload.get('task_id')
        if task_id:
            return task_id
        else:
            raise PressTestAddTaskFail()

    @classmethod
    async def batch_add_press_task(cls, cookie, tasks):
        resp = await MagicCubeRouter.batch_add_task(cookie, tasks)
        if resp.get('code') == 200:
            payload = resp.get('data')
        else:
            payload = {}
        task_ids = payload.get('task_ids')
        if task_ids and len(task_ids) == len(tasks):
            return task_ids
        else:
            root_logger.info('batch_add_press_task fail: ' + json.dumps(resp))
            raise PressTestAddTaskFail()

    @classmethod
    async def stop_press_task(cls, cookie, task_ids: List[int]):
        """
        :param cookie:
        :param task_ids: list of task_id
        :return:
        """
        if len(task_ids) > 1:
            resp = await MagicCubeRouter.batch_stop_task(cookie, task_ids)
            success = True if resp.get('code') == 200 else False
        else:
            resp = await MagicCubeRouter.stop_task(cookie, task_ids)
            success = True if resp.get('code') == 200 else False
        return success, resp.get('msg')

    @classmethod
    async def query_detail(cls, task_id):
        cookie = await cls.login()
        try:
            resp = await MagicCubeRouter.get_detail(cookie, task_id)
            if resp.get('code') == 401:
                _ = await FEATURE_REDIS_POOL.delete(RedisKey.fms_cache_token)
            resp = resp.get('data', {}) if resp.get('code') == 200 else {}
        except Exception:
            raise PressTestQueryDetailFail()
        else:
            return resp

    @classmethod
    async def query_details(cls, page=1, size=20):
        params = {'page': page, "size": size}
        cookie = await cls.login()
        try:
            resp = await MagicCubeRouter.batch_get_detail(cookie, params)
            if resp.get('code') == 401:
                _ = await FEATURE_REDIS_POOL.delete(RedisKey.fms_cache_token)
            resp = resp.get('data', {}) if resp.get('code') == 200 else {}
        except Exception:
            raise PressTestQueryDetailFail()
        else:
            return resp.get('list', [])

    @classmethod
    async def get_tester_list(cls, cookie, group_name='test group') -> List[AnyStr]:
        if GLOBAL_CONFIGS.get('env.company') == 'BNC':

            alias_name_list = ['risk_feature']
            return alias_name_list

        resp = await MagicCubeRouter.get_user_group_detail(cookie, group_name)
        username_list = resp['data']['username_list']
        debugger.debug(username_list)
        resp2 = await MagicCubeRouter.get_user_query(cookie, username_list)
        debugger.debug(resp2)
        alias_name_list = []
        for user_item in resp2['data']['list']:
            if user_item['alias_name']:
                alias_name_list.append(user_item['alias_name'])
            else:
                alias_name_list.append(user_item['username'])
        debugger.debug(alias_name_list)
        return alias_name_list

    @classmethod
    async def get_mode_use_detail(cls, cookie, domain:str,  feature_name: str) -> FeatureUseDetail:
        resp = await MagicCubeRouter.query_feature_use_detail(cookie, domain, feature_name)
        # todo
        ret = FeatureUseDetail(domain, feature_name)
        for one in resp['data']['list']:
            ret.add_details(one['model_version'], one['model_owner'], 0)
        return ret


if __name__ == '__main__':
    loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
    # loop.run_until_complete(MagicCubeService.login())
    # loop.run_until_complete(MagicCubeService.get_tester_list('mc-cookie=e027deb8-fd0b-11ec-9105-00163e0627e1'))
    loop.run_until_complete(MagicCubeService.query_detail(731))

```

**code file end: internal/service/magic_cube_service.py**

### code file start: internal/service/meta_service.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import json
import re
from typing import Dict, List, Union
import asyncio

import aiohttp

from common.constants import RedisKey, RedisKeyPattern
from common.errors import *
from common.logger import root_logger
from common.settings import GLOBAL_CONFIGS
from connectors.redis_conn.async_redis import FEATURE_REDIS_POOL, async_redis_cache
from internal.api.meta_api import MetaInternalRouter as MetaInternal
from internal.api.feature_calc import CalculateApi
from schemas.meta_schema import Column, ColumnProps, TableProps
from schemas import dbmeta_schema, meta_schema
from utils import is_offline
from utils.define_wrapper import method_timeout_wrapper
from utils import HIVE_INCLUDE_SCHEMA


class MetaInfoService:
    table_regex = re.compile(r"(?P<table_type>dim|dwd|ods)")

    @classmethod
    @async_redis_cache(keys=['catalog'], ttl=60 * 60, key_pattern=RedisKeyPattern.fms_cache_meta)
    async def get_hive_catalog(cls, source) -> List[str]:
        """       """
        token = await cls.login()
        async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
            resp = await MetaInternal(session, token, source=source).get_instance()
            if resp.get('code') != 200:
                return [i.get('conn_addr') for i in resp.get('data', [])]
            else:
                raise Exception(resp.get('error'))

    @classmethod
    async def get_meta_source_configs(cls):
        """       """
        meta_source_configs = {}
        db_business_configs = {}
        for full_key, value in GLOBAL_CONFIGS.items():
            if full_key == 'metadata.hive':
                meta_source_configs['hive'] = set(await cls.get_hive_catalog('hive'))
                continue
            key_slice = tuple(full_key.split('.'))
            if key_slice[0] != 'metadata':
                continue
            if len(key_slice) != 3:
                raise Exception(f' meta config key {full_key} is illegal')
            group, source, business = key_slice
            source_db = meta_source_configs.setdefault(source, set())
            default_db = json.loads(value)
            if isinstance(default_db, str):
                db_business_configs[default_db] = business
                source_db.add(default_db)
            elif isinstance(default_db, dict):
                db_business_configs[(default_db.get('host'), default_db.get('db'))] = business
                source_db.add(default_db.get('host'))
            else:
                for db_ins in default_db:
                    if isinstance(db_ins, (list, tuple)):
                        db_business_configs[tuple(db_ins)] = business
                        db_ins = db_ins[0]
                    elif isinstance(db_ins, dict):
                        db_business_configs[(db_ins.get('host'), db_ins.get('db'))] = business
                        db_ins = db_ins.get('host')
                    else:
                        db_business_configs[db_ins] = business
                    source_db.add(db_ins)
        return meta_source_configs, db_business_configs

    @classmethod
    async def edit_table_extra_props(cls, table_id: str, props: TableProps):
        """       """
        token = await cls.login()
        async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
            return await MetaInternal.edit_extra_props(session, token, 'table', table_id, props.json())

    @classmethod
    @method_timeout_wrapper()
    async def edit_column_extra_props(cls, column_props: Union[List[ColumnProps], List[Column]]):
        """       """
        if not column_props:
            return True
        token = await cls.login()
        async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
            tasks = []
            for col in column_props:
                if not col.column_name or not col.extra_props:
                    continue
                if col.extra_props.domain == 'multi_domain' and col.extra_props.multi_domain is None:
                    raise Exception(f"{col.column_name}  column is empty")
                task = asyncio.create_task(
                    MetaInternal.edit_extra_props(session, token, 'column', col.column_id, col.extra_props.json())
                )
                tasks.append(task)

            if tasks:
                outer = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
                for resp in outer:
                    if resp.get('status') != 200:
                        return False
                return True
        return False

    @classmethod
    async def mark_meta(cls, metas: List[dbmeta_schema.DbTable]) -> bool:
        """       -       """
        if not metas:
            raise Exception("Please enter the data source to be marked")
        token = await cls.login()
        async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
            tasks = [asyncio.create_task(MetaInternal.mark_meta(session, token, 'schema', i.schema_id)) for i in metas]
            outer = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
            if not outer:
                return False
            for resp in outer:
                if resp.get('error') or resp.get('status') != 200:
                    return False

            futures = [asyncio.create_task(MetaInternal.mark_meta(session, token, 'table', i.table_id)) for i in metas]
            _outer = await asyncio.gather(*futures)
            if not _outer:
                return False
            for resp in _outer:
                if resp.get('error') or resp.get('status') != 200:
                    return False
        return True

    @classmethod
    @async_redis_cache(keys=['token'], ttl=4 * 60 * 60, key_pattern=RedisKeyPattern.fms_cache_meta)
    async def login(cls):
        resp = await MetaInternal.get_token()
        code = resp.get('status')
        if code != 200:
            raise MetaAuthError(f'''meatapi resp error : {resp} ''')
        return resp.get('data', {}).get('token')

    @classmethod
    async def __get_all_meta_table(cls, obj: MetaInternal, schema_id, schema, is_real_time):
        """       schema       """
        resp = await obj.get_table(schema=schema)
        if resp.get('status') != 200:
            raise MetaTableInfoError()
        tables = []
        for table in resp.get('data', []):
            if table['name'] is not None and table['name'].startswith('_'):
                continue
            table['schema'] = schema
            table['database'] = schema
            table['schema_id'] = schema_id
            table['instance'] = obj.metadata_host
            table['table_id'] = table['id']
            table['source'] = obj.source
            table['is_real_time'] = is_real_time
            tables.append(table)
        return tables

    @classmethod
    async def __get_all_meta(cls):
        """       """
        payload = []
        _ = await FEATURE_REDIS_POOL.delete(RedisKey.fms_cache_meta)
        token = await cls.login()
        async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
            meta_source_configs, _ = await cls.get_meta_source_configs()
            for source, hosts in meta_source_configs.items():
                for host in hosts:
                    obj = MetaInternal(session, token, source, metadata_host=host)
                    resp = await obj.get_schema()
                    schemas = resp.get('data', [])
                    tasks = []
                    is_real_time = not is_offline(source)
                    for schema in schemas:
                        if not is_real_time and schema.get('name') not in HIVE_INCLUDE_SCHEMA:
                            continue
                        schema_id, schema_name = schema['id'], schema['name']
                        future = asyncio.create_task(cls.__get_all_meta_table(obj, schema_id, schema_name, is_real_time))
                        tasks.append(future)
                    if not tasks:
                        continue
                    result = [i for item in filter(lambda k: k, await asyncio.gather(*tasks)) for i in item]
                    if result:
                        _ = await cls.__set_cache(RedisKey.fms_cache_meta, [json.dumps(i) for i in result])
                        payload.extend(result)
        return payload

    @classmethod
    async def flush_cache(cls):
        """       ,        """
        return await cls.__get_all_meta()

    @classmethod
    async def get_instance(cls):
        """       """
        meta_source_configs, _ = await cls.get_meta_source_configs()
        return list({host for hosts in meta_source_configs.values() for host in hosts})

    @classmethod
    async def get_catalog(cls):
        meta_source_configs, _ = await cls.get_meta_source_configs()
        catalogs = meta_source_configs.get('hive')
        return list(catalogs)

    @classmethod
    async def get_database(cls, instance: str = None, joined_feature: bool = False):
        """       """
        if not instance:
            payload = await cls.get_all_metas()
            return list({i['database'] for i in payload})
        meta_source_configs, _ = await cls.get_meta_source_configs()
        _mapper = {host: source for source, hosts in meta_source_configs.items() for host in hosts}
        token = await cls.login()
        async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
            if instance not in _mapper:
                raise MetaSourceExistsError()
            obj = MetaInternal(session, token, _mapper[instance], metadata_host=instance, joined_feature=joined_feature)
            resp = await obj.get_schema()
            code = resp.get('status')
            if code != 200:
                raise MetaSchemaError()
            data = resp.get('data', [])
        return [i['name'] for i in data if i.get('name')]

    @classmethod
    async def get_meta(cls, instance: str, database: str, joined_feature=False):
        """       """
        meta_source_configs, _ = await cls.get_meta_source_configs()
        _mapper = {host: source for source, hosts in meta_source_configs.items() for host in hosts}
        token = await cls.login()
        async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
            if instance not in _mapper:
                raise MetaSourceExistsError()
            obj = MetaInternal(session, token, _mapper[instance], metadata_host=instance, joined_feature=joined_feature)
            resp = await obj.get_table(database)
            code = resp.get('status')
            if code != 200:
                raise MetaSchemaError()
            data = resp.get('data', [])
        return [i['name'] for i in data if i.get('name')]

    @classmethod
    @method_timeout_wrapper()
    async def get_all_metas(cls):
        """       """
        result = await cls.__get_cache(RedisKey.fms_cache_meta)
        if not result:
            tables = await cls.flush_cache()
            tables = [cls.parse_extra_info(table) for table in sorted(tables, key=lambda i: i['name'])]
        else:
            tables = []
            for item in result:
                data = json.loads(item.decode())
                data = cls.parse_extra_info(data)
                tables.append(data)
        return tables

    @classmethod
    @method_timeout_wrapper(timeout=1000)
    async def __get_cache(cls, cache_key):
        try:
            result = await FEATURE_REDIS_POOL.smembers(cache_key)
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)
            result = None
        return result

    @classmethod
    @method_timeout_wrapper(timeout=1000)
    async def __set_cache(cls, cache_key, payload):
        try:
            async with await FEATURE_REDIS_POOL._redis.pipeline(transaction=True) as pipe:  # type:StrictPipeline
                await pipe.sadd(cache_key, *payload)
                await pipe.execute()
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)

    @classmethod
    def parse_extra_info(cls, table):
        table['table_name'] = table.get('name')
        table['describe'] = table.get('comment')
        table['country_ids'] = table.get('country')
        schema = table.get('database')
        schema = schema.rstrip('rt')
        matcher = cls.table_regex.search(schema)
        if matcher:
            mapper = matcher.groupdict()
            table['table_type'] = mapper.get('table_type')
        else:
            table['table_type'] = 'other'
        return table

    @classmethod
    async def get_business(cls, short_domain, schema):
        """       """
        key = (short_domain, schema)
        _, db_business_mapper = await cls.get_meta_source_configs()
        business = db_business_mapper.get(key) or db_business_mapper.get(short_domain)
        return business

    @classmethod
    @method_timeout_wrapper()
    async def get_table_columns(cls, table: dbmeta_schema.SourceTable, joined_feature=False) -> List[Dict[str, str]]:
        table_name = table.table_name.split('.')[-1]
        token = await cls.login()
        async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
            obj = MetaInternal(session, token, table.source, metadata_host=table.instance, joined_feature=joined_feature)
            resp = await obj.get_columns(table.database, table_name)
        col_list = resp.get('data', [])
        if col_list:
            return [i for i in col_list[0].get('columns') if i['column_name'] not in ['feat_update_time', 'etl_time']]
        return []

    @classmethod
    async def get_meta_table_info(cls, meta_tables: List[dbmeta_schema.SourceTable]):
        meta_source_configs, _ = await cls.get_meta_source_configs()
        _mapper = {host: source for source, hosts in meta_source_configs.items() for host in hosts}
        async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
            tasks = [asyncio.create_task(cls.__get_schema_table(session, table, _mapper)) for table in meta_tables]
            tables = []
            if tasks:
                for table, item_resp in zip(meta_tables, await asyncio.gather(*tasks)):
                    table = table.dict()
                    table.update(item_resp)
                    tables.append(table)
            return tables

    @classmethod
    async def __get_schema_table(cls, session, table, instance_mapper):
        token = await cls.login()
        if table.instance in instance_mapper:
            table.source = instance_mapper.get(table.instance)
        obj = MetaInternal(session, token, table.source, metadata_host=table.instance)
        schema_resp = await obj.get_schema()
        resp = await obj.get_table_info(table.database, table.table_name)
        table_info = resp.get('data')[0] if resp.get('data') else {}
        if table_info:
            table_info.pop('columns')
        for i in schema_resp.get('data', []):
            if i.get('name') == table.database:
                table_info['schema_id'] = i['id']
                break
        table_info['database'] = table.database
        table_info['table_id'] = table_info.get('id')
        table_info['table_name'] = table_info.get('name')
        table_info['is_real_time'] = not is_offline(table.source)
        return table_info

    @classmethod
    async def get_table_info_lineage(cls, db_name, tb_name, host):
        """       """
        meta_source_configs, _ = await cls.get_meta_source_configs()
        _mapper = {host: source for source, hosts in meta_source_configs.items() for host in hosts}
        token = await cls.login()
        async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
            resp = await MetaInternal.get_table_lineage(session, token, db_name, tb_name, host)
        return resp

    @classmethod
    async def get_virtual_field_logic_sql(cls, column_logic: meta_schema.VirtualField2DB,
                                          columns: Dict[str, meta_schema.Col]) -> Dict[str, str]:
        func = {'func_name': column_logic.func_type, 'args': [i.dict() for i in column_logic.logic]}
        _columns = {k: v.dict() for k, v in columns.items()}
        resp = await CalculateApi.get_virtual_field_logic_sql(func, _columns)
        return resp.get('data', {})

```

```python
# coding:utf-8
from typing import List, Tuple
from internal.api.risk_rule_api import RiskRuleUseFeatureApi, RiskRuleSceneApi
from internal.common.feature_use_detail import FeatureUseDetail


class FeatureRiskRuleService(object):

    @classmethod
    async def get_features_use_rule(cls, features: List[Tuple[str, str]])->List[FeatureUseDetail]:
        ret = []
        for one in features:
            detail = await RiskRuleUseFeatureApi.get_feature_use_detail(one[0],
                                                                        one[1])
            ret.append(detail)
        return ret

    @classmethod
    async def get_feature_use_rule(cls, domain: str, feature_name: str)->FeatureUseDetail:

        detail = await RiskRuleUseFeatureApi.get_feature_use_detail(domain, feature_name)

        return detail

    @staticmethod
    async def get_report_scenes():
        resp = await RiskRuleSceneApi().get_report_scenes()
        if resp.get('success'):
            pass
        payload = resp.get('data')
        return (payload.get('engine_country_id'), payload.get('engine_business_type'),
                payload.get('engine_scene_id'), payload.get('engine_channel_id'))

    @staticmethod
    async def get_scene_use_flows(scene):
        resp = await RiskRuleSceneApi(scene_info=scene).get_scene_use_flows()
        return resp.get('data', {}).get('rule_id')
```

### code file start: internal/service/sre_service.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from common.constants import RedisKey, RedisKeyPattern
from common.errors import *
from common.logger import root_logger
from common.settings import GLOBAL_CONFIGS

from connectors.redis_conn.async_redis import FEATURE_REDIS_POOL, async_redis_cache
from internal.api.sre_api import SreApi, sre_api
from schemas.work_order_schema import TapdInfo

SRE_API_UNAVIALABLE_ENV = ['BNC', 'TH']

class SreService:

    @classmethod
    @async_redis_cache(keys=['token'], ttl=60 * 60, key_pattern=RedisKeyPattern.fms_cache_sre)
    async def login(cls):
        if GLOBAL_CONFIGS.get('env.company') in SRE_API_UNAVIALABLE_ENV:
            return ''
        resp = await SreApi.get_token()
        if resp.get('code') != 0:
            # raise MetaAuthError(f'''sreapi resp error : {resp} ''')
            root_logger.error(f'''sreapi resp error : {resp} ''')
        return resp.get('results', {}).get('token')

    @classmethod
    async def get_tapd_story_info(cls, tapd_id: str) -> TapdInfo:
        tapd_url = sre_api.get('tapd_url') % tapd_id
        if GLOBAL_CONFIGS.get('env.company') in SRE_API_UNAVIALABLE_ENV:
            return TapdInfo.parse_obj({'id': tapd_id, 'tapd_title': '', 'tapd_url': tapd_url})
        token = await cls.login()
        resp = await SreApi(token).get_tapd_story(tapd_id)
        if resp.get('code') != 0:
            # raise GetTapdInfoError(f'''please enter long tapd id. sreapi resp error : {resp} ''')
            root_logger.error(f'''please enter long tapd id. sreapi resp error : {resp} ''')
            return TapdInfo.parse_obj({'id': tapd_id, 'tapd_title': None, 'tapd_url': tapd_url})
        tapd_list = resp.get('result', {}).get('data', [])
        tapd_title = tapd_list[0].get('Story', {}).get('name', '') if len(tapd_list) > 0 else ''
        if tapd_title is None or tapd_title == '':
            # raise GetTapdInfoError(f'''please enter long tapd id. sreapi resp error : {resp} ''')
            root_logger.error(f'''please enter long tapd id. sreapi resp error : {resp} ''')
            return TapdInfo.parse_obj({'id': tapd_id, 'tapd_title': None, 'tapd_url': tapd_url})
        return TapdInfo.parse_obj({'id': tapd_id, 'tapd_title': tapd_title, 'tapd_url': tapd_url})

```

### code file start: middlewares/async_context.py 

```python
from contextvars import ContextVar


class RequestCxtInfo:
    def __init__(self, user=None):
        self.user = user


class RequestCxt:
    """request context"""
    _request_context = ContextVar('request_context')

    @classmethod
    def get(cls):
        # not log
        try:
            ret = cls._request_context.get()
            if ret is None:
                raise Exception('request context is None')
        except LookupError as e:
            ret = None
        except BaseException as e:
            raise e
        return ret

    @classmethod
    def get_user(cls):
        try:
            info = RequestCxt.get()
        except Exception:
            return 'unknown'
        if info is None or info.user is None:
            return 'unknown'
        return info.user

    @classmethod
    def set(cls, data):
        return cls._request_context.set(data)

    @classmethod
    def reset(cls, token):
        return cls._request_context.reset(token)

```

**code file end: middlewares/async_context.py**

### code file start: middlewares/http.py 

```python
import time

from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Response
from common.logger import access_logger
from internal.api.magic_cube_api import MagicCubeRouter
from internal.service.magic_cube_service import MagicCubeService
from middlewares.async_context import RequestCxtInfo, RequestCxt


def register_request_time_middleware(app: FastAPI):
    @app.middleware("http")
    async def request_time_middleware(request: Request, call_next) -> Response:
        start_time = time.perf_counter()
        response = await call_next(request)
        request_time = time.perf_counter() - start_time
        message = f'{request.client.host} {request.method} {request.url} {response.status_code} {request_time:.6f}'
        access_logger.info(message, extra={'url': request.url, 'method': request.method, 'remote': request.client.host,
                                           'status_code': response.status_code, 'request_time': request_time})
        return response

    @app.middleware("http")
    async def context_middleware(request: Request, call_next) -> Response:
        cookie = request.headers.get('Cookie')
        if cookie:
            resp = await MagicCubeRouter.get_user_info(cookie)
            if resp.get('code') == 200:
                data = resp.get('data')
                user = data.get('alias_name') or data.get('username')
                RequestCxt.set(RequestCxtInfo(user=user))
        response = await call_next(request)
        RequestCxt.set(None)
        return response

```

**code file end: middlewares/http.py**

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from tortoise import fields

from common.errors import ArithmeticSelectError
from common.logger import root_logger
from models import base_model


class TFeatureArithmeticModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    name = fields.CharField(max_length=128, null=False, description="name",unique=True)
    alias = fields.CharField(max_length=128, null=True, description="alias")
    describe = base_model.BlobField(null=False, description="description")
    en_describe = base_model.BlobField(null=True, description="en description")

    class Meta:
        table = 't_feature_arithmetic'
        table_description = 'airthmetic table'


"""
create table `t_feature_arithmetic`(
    `id` bigint(20) not null auto_increment comment 'id',
    `name` varchar(128) not null comment 'name',
    `alias` varchar(128) comment 'alias',
    `describe` blob comment 'description',
    `create_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'create time ',
    `update_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'update time',
    primary key `id`(`id`),
    key `idx_create_time`(`create_time`)
)ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='airthmetic table';
"""
```

### code file start: models/atomic_field_model.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from tortoise import fields

from common.logger import root_logger
from common.errors import AtomicFieldError
from models import base_model


class TFeatureAtomicFiledModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    name = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description="name", null=False)
    table_name = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description="table name ", null=False)
    column = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description="filed column", null=False)
    info = fields.JSONField(max_length=255, description="extra message", null=True)

    class Meta:
        table = 't_feature_atomic_field'
        table_description = 'automic filed table'
        unique_together = ('table_name', 'column')


"""
create table `t_feature_atomic_field`(
    `id` bigint(20) not null auto_increment comment 'id',
    `name` varchar(128) not null comment 'name',
    `table_name` varchar(128) not null comment 'table name ',
    `column` varchar(128) not null comment 'filed column',
    `info` varchar(255) not null comment 'extra message',
    `create_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'create time',
    `update_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'update time',
    primary key `id`(`id`),
    unique key idx_table_column (`table_name`, `column`),
    key `create_time`(`create_time`)
)ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='automic filed table';
"""
```

### code file start: models/base_model.py 

```python
from typing import Any, List, Union, Type

from tortoise import fields, models, Model
from tortoise.transactions import atomic, in_transaction
from tortoise.queryset import QuerySet, QuerySetSingle

from common.logger import root_logger
from utils.define_wrapper import orm_timeout_wrapper


class DescMixin:
    description = fields.CharField(max_length=512, description='description')


class TimeMixin:
    create_time = fields.DatetimeField(auto_now_add=True, description="create time")
    update_time = fields.DatetimeField(auto_now=True, description="update time")


class TimeStampMixin:
    create_time = fields.BigIntField(null=False, description="create time")
    update_time = fields.BigIntField(null=False, description="update time")


class BlobField(fields.BinaryField):
    def to_db_value(self, value: Any, instance: "Union[Type[Model], Model]") -> Any:
        self.validate(value)
        return value

    def to_python_value(self, value: Any) -> Any:
        self.validate(value)
        if isinstance(value, bytes):
            value = value.decode()
        return value


class BaseModel(models.Model):
    @classmethod
    def full_table_name(cls):
        return f'{cls._meta.db.database}.{cls._meta.db_table}'

    @classmethod
    async def insert_one(cls, **kwargs):
        try:
            return await cls._insert_one(**kwargs)
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)
            raise e

    @classmethod
    async def insert_many(cls, objects: List[Model]):
        try:
            return await cls._insert_many(objects)
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)
            raise e

    @classmethod
    @orm_timeout_wrapper()
    @atomic(connection_name="default")
    async def count(cls, query: models.Q):
        query_set = cls.filter(query)
        return await query_set.count()

    @classmethod
    async def select_many(cls, query: models.Q, values: List[Union[str, dict]], *,
                          order_by: Union[list, str] = None, offset: int = None, limit: int = None):
        try:
            return await cls._query_many(query, values, order_by, offset, limit)
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)
            raise e

    @classmethod
    async def select_one(cls, query: models.Q, values: List[Any], *,
                         order_by: Union[list, str] = None, offset: int = None):
        try:
            return await cls._query_one(query, values, order_by, offset)
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)
            raise e

    @classmethod
    async def update_many(cls, query: models.Q, **kwargs):
        try:
            return await cls._update(query, **kwargs)
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)
            raise e

    @classmethod
    async def delete_many(cls, query: models.Q):
        try:
            return await cls._delete(query)
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)
            raise e

    @classmethod
    async def execute(cls, sql: str):
        try:
            return await cls._execute(sql)
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)
            raise e

    @classmethod
    async def aggregate(cls, query: models.Q, aggregate: dict, values: List[Any],
                        group_by: List[str] = None, order_by: Union[list, str] = None,
                        offset: int = None, limit: int = None):
        try:
            return await cls._aggregate(query, aggregate, values, group_by, order_by, offset, limit)
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)
            raise e

    @classmethod
    def transaction(cls, connection_name='default'):
        return in_transaction(connection_name)

    @classmethod
    @orm_timeout_wrapper()
    @atomic(connection_name="default")
    async def _insert_one(cls, **kwargs):
        return await cls.create(**kwargs)

    @classmethod
    @orm_timeout_wrapper()
    @atomic(connection_name="default")
    async def _insert_many(cls, objects: List[Model]):
        return await cls.bulk_create(objects)

    @classmethod
    @orm_timeout_wrapper()
    @atomic(connection_name="default")
    async def _query_one(cls, query: models.Q, values: List[Union[str, dict]],
                         order_by: Union[list, str] = None, offset: int = None):
        query_set = cls.filter(query)
        if order_by is not None:
            query_set = query_set.order_by(*order_by) if isinstance(order_by, list) else query_set.order_by(order_by)
        if offset is not None:
            query_set = query_set.offset(offset)
        return await cls.__select_fields(query_set.first(), values)

    @classmethod
    @orm_timeout_wrapper()
    @atomic(connection_name="default")
    async def _query_many(cls, query: models.Q, values: List[Union[str, dict]],
                          order_by: Union[list, str] = None, offset: int = None, limit: int = None):
        query_set = cls.filter(query)
        query_set = cls.__order_by(query_set, order_by, offset, limit)
        return await cls.__select_fields(query_set, values)

    @classmethod
    async def __select_fields(cls, query_set: Union[QuerySet, QuerySetSingle], values: List[Union[str, dict]]):
        show_field = set()
        relate_field = {}
        for i in values:
            if isinstance(i, dict):
                relate_field.update(i)
            else:
                show_field.add(i)
        return await query_set.values(*show_field, **relate_field)

    @classmethod
    def __order_by(cls,  query_set: Union[QuerySet, QuerySetSingle], order_by: Union[list, str] = None,
                   offset: int = None, limit: int = None):
        if order_by is not None:
            query_set = query_set.order_by(*order_by) if isinstance(order_by, list) else query_set.order_by(order_by)
        if offset is not None and offset > 0:
            query_set = query_set.offset(offset)
        if limit is not None and limit > 0:
            query_set = query_set.limit(limit)
        return query_set

    @classmethod
    @orm_timeout_wrapper()
    @atomic(connection_name="default")
    async def _update(cls, query: models.Q, **kwargs):
        query_set = cls.filter(query)
        return await query_set.update(**kwargs)

    @classmethod
    @orm_timeout_wrapper()
    @atomic(connection_name="default")
    async def _execute(cls, sql: str):
        return await cls.raw(sql)

    @classmethod
    @orm_timeout_wrapper()
    @atomic(connection_name="default")
    async def _aggregate(cls, query: models.Q, aggregate: dict, values: List[Any],
                         group_by: List[str] = None, order_by: Union[list, str] = None, offset: int = None, limit: int = None):
        query_set = cls.filter(query)
        if group_by:
            query_set = query_set.annotate(**aggregate).group_by(*group_by)
        else:
            query_set = query_set.annotate(**aggregate)
        query_set = cls.__order_by(query_set, order_by, offset, limit)
        return await cls.__select_fields(query_set, values)

    @classmethod
    @orm_timeout_wrapper()
    @atomic(connection_name="default")
    async def _delete(cls, query: models.Q):
        query_set = cls.filter(query)
        return await query_set.delete()

```

**code file end: models/base_model.py**

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from tortoise import fields

from common.errors import CaliberError
from common.logger import root_logger
from models import base_model


class TFeatureCaliberModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    table_name = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description="table name", null=False)
    caliber_name = fields.CharField(max_length=64, description="caliber", null=False)
    describe = base_model.BlobField(null=False, description="description")
    en_describe = base_model.BlobField(null=True, description="en description")
    creator = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description="creator", null=False)
    online_code = fields.SmallIntField(null=False, description="Online status code value: 1-to be online, 2-under approval, 3-already online")
    content = base_model.BlobField(description="sql content", null=True)
    tree = fields.JSONField(description="sql Ast tree", null=False)
    business = fields.CharField(max_length=255, description="business type", null=False)
    country_ids = fields.JSONField(max_length=64, null=True, description="country_d")
    not_alis_content = base_model.BlobField(description="sql content(not alias)", null=True)

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_caliber"
        table_description = "caliber table"


"""
create table `t_feature_caliber`(
    `id` bigint(20) not null AUTO_INCREMENT comment 'id',
    `table_name` varchar (128) not null comment 'table name',
    `caliber_name` varchar (64) not null  comment 'caliber',
    `describe` blob not null comment 'description',
    `creator` varchar (128) not null comment 'creator',
    `online_code` tinyint(4) not null comment 'Online status, 0-no, 1-yes',
    `content` varchar (255) comment 'sql content',
    `not_alis_content` varchar(255) comment 'sql content(not alis content)',
    `country_ids` varchar(128) comment 'country id list ',
    `business` varchar(128) comment 'business ',
    `tree` blob not null comment 'sql Ast tree',
    `create_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'create time ',
    `update_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'update time',
    primary key(`id`),
    unique key `table_caliber`(`table_name`, `caliber_name`),
    key `create_time`(`create_time`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='caliber table';
"""
```

```python
from tortoise import fields

from common.errors import DomainError

class TFeatureDomainModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(max_length=20, description="id", pk=True)
    domain_name = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description="domain name", null=False, unique=True)
    describe = fields.CharField(max_length=255, description="domain description", null=False)
    en_describe = fields.CharField(max_length=255, description="domain description en", null=True)
    data_type = fields.CharField(max_length=64, description="data type", null=False)
    rule = fields.CharField(max_length=255, description="testing regulations", null=True)
    is_standard = fields.SmallIntField(description="Whether it is a standard dimension: 1-yes, 0-no")
    is_union = fields.IntField(description="Whether to combine dimensions: 1-yes, 0-no", default=0)
    relate_domain = fields.CharField(255, description="relate domain", null=False)
    relate_key = fields.CharField(255, description="relate key", null=False)
    encrypt_key = fields.CharField(255, description="encrypt key", null=True)
    alias = fields.CharField(255, description="alias", null=True)

    class Meta:
        table = 't_feature_domain'
        table_description = "domain table"

    `relate_domain` varchar(255) comment 'relate domaim',
    `encrypt_key` varchar(255) comment 'encrypt key',
    `create_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'create time',
    `update_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'update time',
    primary key(`id`),
    unique key `uniq_domain_name`(`domain_name`),
```

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from tortoise import fields

from common import errors
from common.logger import root_logger
from models import base_model

class TFeatureAnalysisTaskModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True, description="task id")
    task_type = fields.CharField(max_length=30, description="task type", null=False)
    # task_params = fields.CharField(max_length=1024, description="task input", null=False)
    task_params = fields.TextField(description="task input", null=False)
    desc = fields.CharField(max_length=255, description="task description", null=True)
    creator = fields.CharField(max_length=20, description="creator", null=True)
    status = fields.SmallIntField(description="Task status, 1=in progress, 2=ended, 3=exception occurred, 4=result has expired", null=False)
    begin_time = fields.BigIntField(description="task start time")
    end_time = fields.BigIntField(description="task end time")

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_analysis_task"
        table_description = "feature analysis task model"
        unique_together = ('table_name', 'column_name', 'time_interval')


"""
CREATE TABLE `t_feature_analysis_task` (
  `id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT 'task id',
  `task_type` varchar(30) NOT NULL COMMENT 'task type',
  `task_params` varchar(1024) NOT NULL COMMENT 'task input',
  `desc` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'task description',
  `creator` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'creator',
  `status` tinyint(4) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Task status, 1=in progress, 2=ended, 3=exception occurred, 4=result has expired',
  `begin_time` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'task start time',
  `end_time` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'task end time',
  `create_time` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'create time',
  `update_time` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'update time',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_create_time` (`create_time`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='feature analysis table'
"""

class TFeatureCompareTaskResultModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    task_id = fields.BigIntField(description="task id")

    total_compare_cnt = fields.IntField(description="total number of comparisons")

    normal_cnt = fields.IntField(description="number of normal requests")
    abnormal_cnt = fields.IntField(description="number of abnormal requests")
    consistent_cnt = fields.IntField(description="the consistent number in normal requests")
    inconsistent_cnt = fields.IntField(description="number of inconsistencies in normal requests")
    zero_cnt = fields.IntField(description="0 or empty number in normal request")
    nonzero_cnt = fields.IntField(description="non-zero and non-null numbers in normal requests")
    nonzero_consistent_cnt = fields.IntField(description="consistent numbers in non-zero and non-empty areas")
    nonzero_inconsistent_cnt = fields.IntField(description="inconsistent number in non-zero and non-empty areas")

    normal_rate = fields.CharField(max_length=20, description="normal request rate", null=True)
    abnormal_rate = fields.CharField(max_length=20, description="abnormal request rate", null=True)
    consistent_rate = fields.CharField(max_length=20, description="consistency rate in normal requests", null=True)
    inconsistent_rate = fields.CharField(max_length=20, description="inconsistency rate in normal requests", null=True)
    zero_rate = fields.CharField(max_length=20, description="0 or empty rate in normal requests", null=True)
    nonzero_rate = fields.CharField(max_length=20, description="Non-zero non-empty rate in normal requests", null=True)
    nonzero_consistent_rate = fields.CharField(max_length=20, description="consistency rate for non-zero non-empty miles", null=True)
    nonzero_inconsistent_rate = fields.CharField(max_length=20, description="inconsistency rate for non-zero non-empty miles", null=True)

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_compare_task_result"
        table_description = "feature comparison task results table"
        unique_together = ('table_name', 'column_name', 'time_interval')


"""
CREATE TABLE `t_feature_compare_task_result` (
  `task_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'task id',
  `total_compare_cnt` int(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'total number of comparisons',
  `normal_cnt` int(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'number of normal requests',
  `abnormal_cnt` int(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'number of abnormal requests',
  `consistent_cnt` int(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'the consistent number in normal requests',
  `inconsistent_cnt` int(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'number of inconsistencies in normal requests',
  `zero_cnt` int(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '0 or empty number in normal request',
  `nonzero_cnt` int(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'non-zero and non-null numbers in normal requests',
  `nonzero_consistent_cnt` int(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'consistent numbers in non-zero and non-empty areas',
  `nonzero_inconsistent_cnt` int(11) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'inconsistent number in non-zero and non-empty areas',
  `normal_rate` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'normal request rate',
  `abnormal_rate` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'abnormal request rate',
  `consistent_rate` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'consistency rate in normal requests',
  `inconsistent_rate` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'inconsistency rate in normal requests',
  `zero_rate` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '0 or empty rate in normal requests',
  `nonzero_rate` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '0 or empty rate in normal requests',
  `nonzero_consistent_rate` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'consistency rate for non-zero non-empty miles',
  `nonzero_inconsistent_rate` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'inconsistency rate for non-zero non-empty miles',
  `create_time` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'create time',
  `update_time` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'update time',
  PRIMARY KEY (`task_id`),
  KEY `idx_create_time` (`create_time`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='feature comparison task results table'
"""

class TFeatureCompareDetailExampleModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)

    task_id = fields.BigIntField(description="task id")

    domain_old = fields.CharField(max_length=50, description="control group dimensions", null=False)
    feature_old = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description="control group feature name", null=False)
    url_old = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description="old url", null=False)
    domain_new = fields.CharField(max_length=50, description="experimental group dimensions", null=False)
    feature_new = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description="experimental group features", null=False)
    url_new = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description="experimental group request url", null=False)
    payload = fields.CharField(max_length=255, description="request input", null=False)

    result_old = fields.CharField(max_length=255, description="old feature result", null=False)
    result_new = fields.CharField(max_length=255, description="new feature result", null=False)
    compare_express = fields.CharField(max_length=1024, description="result comparison expression", null=False)

    is_request_normal = fields.SmallIntField(description="is it a normal request", null=False)
    is_zero = fields.SmallIntField(description="whether it is 0 or empty", null=False)
    compare_result = fields.SmallIntField(description="is it consistent", null=False)
    nonzero_compare_result = fields.SmallIntField(description="not empty and not zerois it consistent", null=False)
    cost_time_old = fields.IntField(description="control group request cost time", null=False)
    cost_time_new = fields.IntField(description="experimental group request cost time", null=False)

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_compare_detail_example"
        table_description = "feature comparison task result example table"
        unique_together = ('table_name', 'column_name', 'time_interval')


"""
CREATE TABLE `t_feature_compare_detail_example` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT 'id',
  `task_id` int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT 'task id',
  `domain_old` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'control group dimensions',
  `feature_old` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'control group feature name',
  `url_old` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'old url',
  `domain_new` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'experimental group dimensions',
  `feature_new` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'experimental group features',
  `url_new` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'experimental group request url',
  `payload` varchar(255) NOT NULL COMMENT 'request input',
  `result_old` varchar(255) NOT NULL COMMENT 'old feature result',
  `result_new` varchar(255) NOT NULL COMMENT 'new feature result',
  `compare_express` varchar(1024) NOT NULL COMMENT 'result comparison expression',
  `is_request_normal` tinyint(1) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'is it a normal request',
  `is_zero` tinyint(1) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'whether it is 0 or empty',
  `compare_result` tinyint(4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'is it consistent',
  `nonzero_compare_result` tinyint(4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'not empty and not zerois it consistent',
  `cost_time_old` int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT 'control group request cost time',
  `cost_time_new` int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT 'experimental group request cost time',
  `create_time` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'create time',
  `update_time` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'update time',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='feature comparison task result example table'
"""



class TFeatureKafkaTriggerDetailExampleOrm(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    task_id = fields.BigIntField(description="task id")
    # feature_name = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description="feature name", null=False)
    # domain_name = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description="domain name", null=False)
    cost_time = fields.IntField(description=" request cost time", null=False)
    payload = fields.CharField(max_length=255, description="request input", null=False)
    req_time = fields.BigIntField(description="request time", null=False)
    resp_succ = fields.SmallIntField(description="response success", null=False)
    result = fields.TextField(description="response result", null=False)
    scene_str = fields.CharField(max_length=255, description="scene string", null=False)
    refer_id = fields.CharField(max_length=255, description="refer id", null=False)

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_kafka_trigger_detail_example"
        table_description = "feature kafka trigger detail example table"
```

```python
from tortoise import fields

from common.errors import FeatureError
from common.logger import root_logger
from models import base_model


class TFeatureDefineModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    name = fields.CharField(max_length=128, null=False, description="feature name")
    business = fields.CharField(max_length=64, null=False, description="business ")
    describe = fields.TextField(null=False, description="description")
    en_describe = fields.TextField(null=True, description="description en")
    delay = fields.SmallIntField(null=False, description="timeliness: 0-strong real-time, 1-millisecond level, 2-second level, 3-MINUTE level, 4-hour level, 5-T+1")
    sql_content = base_model.BlobField(null=True, description="sql format")
    default = fields.CharField(max_length=128, null=False, description="default values")
    data_type = fields.SmallIntField(null=False, description="data type")
    data_label = fields.CharField(max_length=128, null=True, description="data tag")
    relate_columns = fields.CharField(max_length=255, null=True, description="relate columns")
    status_code = fields.SmallIntField(null=False, description="status: 0-not online, 1-online, 99-new")
    is_engine_use = fields.SmallIntField(null=True, default=1, description="whether it can be used by the rule engine: 1-yes, 0-no")
    maintainer = fields.CharField(max_length=64, null=False, description="maintainer")
    is_standard = fields.SmallIntField(null=True, description="whether it is standard: 0-non-standard, 1-standard")
    limit_country = fields.SmallIntField(null=True, default=-1, description="whether to restrict country: 1-restrict country, -1 do not restrict country")
    online_time = fields.BigIntField(null=True, description="online time")
    domain_column_operate = base_model.BlobField(null=True, description="dimension column handling")
    country_ids = fields.CharField(max_length=32, null=True, description="country id")
    allow_event = fields.CharField(description="allow scenes", max_length=128, null=True)
    invalid_tags = fields.CharField(description="feature failure tag", max_length=128, null=True)
    uat_info = base_model.BlobField(description="uat verification information", null=True)
    offline_reason = fields.CharField(description="offline reason", max_length=128, null=True)
    top_id = fields.CharField(description="top id", max_length=255, null=True)
    database_name = fields.CharField(description="database name", max_length=30, null=True)
    store_in = fields.CharField(description="store in", max_length=30, null=True)

    # foreign key
    domain = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TFeatureDomainModel", related_name='features', to_field='id')
    caliber = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TFeatureCaliberModel", related_name='features', to_field='id')
    window = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TFeatureWindowModel", related_name='features', to_field='id')
    # top = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TFeatureTopModel", related_name='features', to_field='id')
    arithmetic = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TFeatureArithmeticModel", related_name='features', to_field='id')
    field = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TFeatureAtomicFiledModel", related_name='features', to_field='id')
    redundancy = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TFeatureDefineRedundancy", related_name='features', to_field='id')
    logic_table = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TFeatureLogicTableModel", related_name='features', to_field='table_name', source_field='table_name')
    extra_info = base_model.BlobField(description="extra_info", null=True)

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_define"
        table_description = "feature define table "
        unique_together = ('domain_id', 'name')


"""
create table `t_feature_define`(
    `id` bigint(20) not null AUTO_INCREMENT comment 'id',
    `name` varchar(128) not null comment 'feature name',
    `domain_id` bigint(20) not null comment 'domain id',
    `table_name` varchar(128) not null comment 'data source table name',

    `caliber_id` bigint(20) default null comment 'caliber  id',

    `delay` tinyint(4) not null comment 'timeliness: 0-strong real-time, 1-millisecond level, 2-second level, 3-MINUTE level, 4-hour level, 5-T+1',
    `sql_content` blob default null comment 'sql format',
    `default` varchar(128) not null comment 'default values',
    `data_type` tinyint(4) not null comment 'data type',
    `data_label` varchar(128) default null comment 'data tag',
    `relate_columns` varchar(255) default null comment 'relate columns',
    `status_code` tinyint(4) not null comment 'status: 0-not online, 1-online',
    `is_engine_use` tinyint(4) default 1 comment 'whether it can be used by the engine: 1-yes, 0-no',
    `maintainer` varchar(64) not null comment 'maintainer',
    `is_standard` tinyint(4) default 1 comment 'whether it is standard: 0-non-standard, 1-standard',
    `limit_country` tinyint(4) default -1 comment 'is limit country: whether to restrict country: 1-restrict country, -1 do not restrict country',

    `update_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'update time',
    `online_time` bigint(20) comment 'online time',

    unique key `idx_domain_feature` (`domain_id`,`name`),

) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='feature define table ';

    name = fields.CharField(max_length=255, null=False, description="scene feature name")

    en_describe = fields.TextField(null=True, description="description en")

    default = fields.CharField(max_length=64, null=True, description="default values")

    online_time = fields.BigIntField(null=True, description="create time")
    offline_reason = fields.CharField(null=True, max_length=255, description="offline reason")
    uat_info = fields.CharField(null=True, max_length=255, description="uat message")

    engine_event = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TScenesIdModel", related_name='scene_features', to_field='id')
    engine_business = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TScenesBusinessTypeModel", related_name='scene_features', to_field='id', source_field='business')

    class Meta:
        table = 't_scenes_feature_define'
        table_description = 'scenes feature define table '
        unique_together = ('country_id', 'channel_id', 'engine_event_id', 'business_id', 'name')
```
