```python
from models.base_model import BaseModel, TimeStampMixin
from tortoise import fields
from common.errors import FeatureError
from common.logger import root_logger


class TFeatureFuncModel(BaseModel, TimeStampMixin):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    mysql_func = fields.CharField(max_length=255, null=True, description="mysql func", unique=True)
    presto_func = fields.CharField(max_length=255, null=True, description="presto func")
    spark_func = fields.CharField(max_length=255, null=True, description="spark func")
    describe = fields.CharField(max_length=255, null=False, description="description")
    return_type = fields.CharField(max_length=255, null=True, description="return value type")
```

```python
import typing

from tortoise import fields, models
from tortoise.queryset import QuerySet
from common import errors
from common.logger import root_logger
from models import base_model


class TFeatureDefineTestCaseModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
   
    test_sql = fields.TextField(null=False, description="single test comparison sql statement")
   
    feature_id = fields.BigIntField(null=False, description="feature id")
    test_num = fields.BigIntField(null=False, description="test num")
    cycle_num = fields.BigIntField(null=False, description="number of sample test loops")


    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_define_integration_test_case"
        table_description = "standard feature test case table"


class TFeatureDefineSceneTestCaseModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    # feature_id = fields.BigIntField(null=False, description="feature id")
    test_sql = fields.TextField(null=False, description="single test comparison sql statement")

    feature_id = fields.BigIntField(null=False, description="feature id")
    test_num = fields.BigIntField(null=False, description="test num")
    cycle_num = fields.BigIntField(null=False, description="number of sample test loops")


    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_define_scene_integration_test_case"
        table_description = "standard feature test case table"


class TFeatureDefineIntTestTaskModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    task_id = fields.BigIntField(null=True, description="integration test task id")
    task_sample_id = fields.BigIntField(null=True, description="integration test sample task id")
    feature_id = fields.BigIntField(null=False, description="feature id")
    info = fields.TextField(null=True, description="integration test details")
    status_code = fields.IntField(null=False, description="integration test status 0 new 10 executing 20 failed 30 successful")
    test_conclusion = fields.IntField(null=False, description="integrated test conclusion 0 new, 10 failed, 20 passed")

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_define_integration_test_task"
        table_description = "integration testing task list"


class TFeatureDefineSceneIntTestTaskModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    task_id = fields.BigIntField(null=True, description="integration test task id")
    task_sample_id = fields.BigIntField(null=True, description="integration test sample task id")
    feature_id = fields.BigIntField(null=False, description="feature id")
    info = fields.TextField(null=True, description="integration test details")
    status_code = fields.IntField(null=False, description="integration test status 0 new 10 executing 20 failed 30 successful")
    test_conclusion = fields.IntField(null=False, description="integrated test conclusion 0 new, 10 failed, 20 passed")

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_define_scene_integration_test_task"
        table_description = "scene feature integration testing task list"


class TFeatureDefineSceneTestResultModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    refer_id = fields.CharField(null=False, description="refer_id", max_length=128)
    scene_domain_keys = fields.TextField(null=False, description="scene inteafe input")
    domain_keys = fields.TextField(null=False, description="domain input")
    task_id = fields.BigIntField(null=False, description='integration test task id')
    sceneapi_result = fields.CharField(null=False, description='result of scene feature', max_length=256)
    stdapi_result = fields.CharField(null=False, description='result of standard feature', max_length=256)
    sceneapi_cost_time = fields.IntField(null=False,description='scenario feature execution time')
    stdapi_cost_time = fields.IntField(null=False, description=' feature execution time')
    is_equal = fields.SmallIntField(null=False, description='are the scene feature test results consistent with the ordinary feature results')
    feature_id = fields.BigIntField(null=False, description='feature id')

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_define_scene_integration_test_result"
        table_description = "scenario feature test results table"

    sql_cost_time = fields.IntField(null=False,description='sql execution time')
    stdapi_cost_time = fields.IntField(null=False, description=' feature execution time')
    is_equal = fields.SmallIntField(null=False, description='are the sql test results consistent with the interface results')
    feature_id = fields.BigIntField(null=False, description='feature id')

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_define_integration_test_result"

USE taskinfodb;
CREATE TABLE `t_feature_define_integration_test_case`(
    `id`   BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED  NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT 'id',
    `test_sql` TEXT  COMMENT 'Test and compare sql statements' ,
    `feature_id` BIGINT COMMENT 'feature id' ,
    `test_num`    BIGINT COMMENT 'test num',
    `cycle_num`  BIGINT COMMENT 'number of sample test loops',
    `create_time` BIGINT(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'create time',
    `update_time` BIGINT(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'update time',
    PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
    UNIQUE KEY `uniq_feature_id`(`feature_id`),
    KEY `idx_create_time`(`create_time`)
) ENGINE=INNODB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='standard feature test case table';



create table `t_feature_define_integration_test_task`(    
    `id` bigint(20) UNSIGNED not null auto_increment comment 'id',
    `task_id` bigint COMMENT 'integration test task id' ,
     `task_sample_id` bigint default null COMMENT 'integration test sample task id' ,
     `feature_id`    BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'feature id',
     `info` mediumtext COMMENT 'integration test details',
     `status_code` int COMMENT 'status ',
     `test_conclusion` int COMMENT 'test conclusion',
     `create_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'create time',
     `update_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'update time',
     primary key(`id`),
     unique `uniq_feature_id`(`feature_id`),
     KEY `idx_task_id`(`task_id`),
     KEY `idx_task_sample_id` (`task_sample_id`),
     KEY `idx_create_time`(`create_time`)
 ) engine=innodb default charset=utf8mb4 comment='integration testing task list';
 
 
 

CREATE TABLE `t_feature_define_integration_test_result`(    
    `id` BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT 'id',
     `domain_keys` TEXT  COMMENT 'domain input' ,
     `task_id` BIGINT not NULL COMMENT 'integration test task id' ,
      `sql_result` varchar(255) COMMENT 'sql execute result',
      `feature_result` VARCHAR(255) COMMENT 'result of standard feature',
      `sql_cost_time`  int COMMENT 'sql execution cost time',
      `stdapi_cost_time`  int COMMENT 'feature cal cost time',
      `is_equal` tinyint not null COMMENT 'are the sql test results consistent with the interface results',
      `feature_id`    BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT 'feature id',
     `create_time` BIGINT(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'create time',
     `update_time` BIGINT(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'update time',
     PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
     KEY `idx_feature_id`(`feature_id`),
     KEY `idx_task_id`(`task_id`),
     KEY `idx_create_time`(`create_time`)
 ) ENGINE=INNODB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='standard characteristic test results table';
```

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from tortoise import fields
from models import base_model
from common.logger import root_logger
from common import errors

class TFeatureLandsatTaskModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True, description="landstat task id", source_field='landsat_task_id')
    task_name = fields.CharField(max_length=128, null=False, description="landstat task name")
    task_type = fields.CharField(max_length=128, null=False, description="task type")
    describe = base_model.BlobField(null=True, description="description")
    status_code = fields.SmallIntField(null=False, description="task release status, 0-no release, 1-release")
    sql = base_model.BlobField(null=True, description="task task sql")
    rely_landsat_task = base_model.BlobField(null=True, description="depends on upstream tasks")
    config_info = base_model.BlobField(null=True, description="task config")
    schedule_info = base_model.BlobField(null=True, description="schedule config")
    alter_info = base_model.BlobField(null=True, description="alter config")
    publish_time = fields.BigIntField(null=True, description="publish time")

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_landsat_task"
        table_description = "offline features landsat task list"


"""
CREATE TABLE `t_feature_landsat_task` (
    `landsat_task_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'landstat task id',
    `task_name` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'landstat task name',
    `task_type` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'task type',
    `describe` blob COMMENT 'description',
    `status_code` tinyint(4) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'task release status',
    `sql` blob COMMENT 'task task sql',
    `rely_landsat_task` blob COMMENT 'depends on upstream tasks',
    `config_info` blob COMMENT 'task config',
    `schedule_info` blob COMMENT 'schedule config',
    `alter_info` blob COMMENT 'alter config',
    `publish_time` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'publish time',
    `create_time` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'create time',
    `update_time` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'update time',
    PRIMARY KEY (`landsat_task_id`),
    UNIQUE KEY `uniq_task_name_type` (`task_name`,`task_type`),
    KEY `create_time` (`create_time`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='offline features landsat task list';
"""

    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True, description="id")

    # task_id = fields.BigIntField(description="landstat task id")

    class Meta:
        table = 't_feature_define_bind_landsat_task'
        table_description = 'feature bind lansat task model'
```

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from tortoise import fields

from common import errors
from common.logger import root_logger
from models import base_model


class TFeaturePhysicsTableModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    table_name = fields.CharField(null=False, max_length=128, description="table name")
    instance = fields.CharField(null=False, max_length=128, description="instance address")
    database = fields.CharField(null=False, max_length=128, description="db name")
    source = fields.CharField(null=False, max_length=128, description="source")

    logic_table = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TFeatureLogicTableModel", related_name="physics_table", to_field='id')

    class Meta:
        table = 't_feature_physics_table'
        table_description = 'physics table'


"""
CREATE TABLE `t_feature_physics_table` (
    `id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT 'id',
    `logic_table_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'logic table id',
    `table_name` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'table name',
    `instance` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'instance address',
    `database` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'db name',
    `source` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'source',
    `create_time` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'create time',
    `update_time` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'update time',
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    UNIQUE KEY `uniq_table` (`instance`,`database`,`table_name`),
    KEY `idx_logic_table_id` (`logic_table_id`),
    KEY `idx_create_time` (`create_time`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='physics table';
"""


class TFeatureWindowTableModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    table_name = fields.CharField(null=False, max_length=128, description="table name")
    instance = fields.CharField(null=False, max_length=128, description="instance address")
    database = fields.CharField(null=False, max_length=128, description="db name")
    window = fields.BigIntField(null=False, description="window days")
    window_column = fields.CharField(null=False, max_length=128, description="window filed")

    physics_table = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TFeaturePhysicsTableModel", related_name="window_table", to_field='id')

    class Meta:
        table = 't_feature_window_table'
        table_description = 'window table'
        unique_together = ('physics_table_id', 'window_column', 'window')


"""
CREATE TABLE `t_feature_window_table` (
    `id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT 'id',
    `physics_table_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'physics tableid',
    `table_name` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'table name',
    `database` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'db name',
    `instance` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'instance address',
    `window` bigint(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'window days',
    `window_column` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'window filed',

) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='wind table ';

class TFeatureLogicTableModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    table_name = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description="table name", null=False, unique=True)
    table_type = fields.CharField(max_length=64, description="table type", null=False)
    table_delay = fields.SmallIntField(description="table delay", null=True)
    business = fields.CharField(max_length=64, description="business", null=False)
    describe = base_model.BlobField(description="table desc", null=True)
    associated = fields.SmallIntField(description="whether it is a related table: 0-no, 1-yes", default=0, null=False)
    join_tables = base_model.BlobField(description="join condition", null=True)
    columns = base_model.BlobField(description="filed ", null=True)
    column_props = base_model.BlobField(description="table attributes, one-to-one correspondence with filed", null=True)
    table_rows = fields.BigIntField(description="row num", null=True)
    table_order_column = fields.CharField(max_length=256, description="column of sort", null=True)
    domain_delay = fields.JSONField(description="delay", null=True)
    timezone = fields.SmallIntField(description="timezone", null=True)
    column_info = fields.JSONField(description="column meta data info", null=True)

    class Meta:
        table = 't_feature_logic_table'
        table_description = 'logic table'


"""
CREATE TABLE `t_feature_logic_table` (
    `id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT 'id',
    `table_name` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'table name',
    `table_delay` tinyint(4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Table timeliness: 10-real-time, 11-offline, 12-real-time&offline',
    `table_type` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'table type',
    `business` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'business',
    `describe` blob COMMENT 'table desc',
    `associated` tinyint(4) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'whether it is a related table: 0-no, 1-yes',
    `join_tables` blob DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'join condition',
    `columns` blob COMMENT 'filed ',
    `column_props` blob COMMENT 'Field marking properties',
    `table_rows` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'row num',
    `create_time` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'create time',
    `update_time` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'update time',
    `table_order_column` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    UNIQUE KEY `uniq_table_name` (`table_name`),
    KEY `idx_create_time` (`create_time`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='logic table';
"""


class TFeatureVirtualFieldModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    logic_table_id = fields.BigIntField(description="logic table id", null=False)
    column_name = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description="virtual filed name", null=False)
    describe = base_model.BlobField(description="table desc", null=True)
    column_delay = fields.IntField(description="virtual filed delay", null=False)
    column_type = fields.CharField(max_length=128, null=False, description="virtual filed data type")
    logic = fields.JSONField(null=True, description="virtual filed logic ")
    logic_sql = fields.JSONField(null=True, description="virtual filed logic sql")

    class Meta:
        table = 't_feature_virtual_field'
        table_description = 'virtual file table'
        unique_together = ('logic_table_id', 'column_name')


"""
CREATE TABLE `t_feature_virtual_field` (
  `id` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT 'id',
  `logic_table_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'logic table id',
  `column_name` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'filed name',
  `describe` blob COMMENT 'describe',
  `column_delay` int(11) default '12' comment 'Field timeliness: 10-real-time, 11-offline, 12-real-time & offline',
  `column_type` varchar(128) not null comment 'filed type ',
  `logic` text default null comment 'virtual filed logic ',
  `logic_sql` text default null comment 'virtual filed logic sql ',
  `create_time` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'create time',
  `update_time` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'update time',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uniq_logic_table_column_name` (`logic_table_id`, `column_name`),
  KEY `idx_create_time` (`create_time`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='virtual filed table';
"""
```

```python
from tortoise import fields

from common.errors import FeatureError
from common.logger import root_logger
from models import base_model


class TFeatureOperationLogModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    operation_module = fields.CharField(max_length=30, null=False, description="operation module")
    operation_type = fields.CharField(max_length=60, null=False, description="operation type")
    operation_params = base_model.BlobField(null=True, description="operation params")
    operation_desc = base_model.BlobField(null=True, description="description")
    alter_table = fields.CharField(max_length=80, null=True, description="change table ")
    alter_column = fields.CharField(max_length=80, null=True, description="change column ")
    column_before_value = fields.TextField(null=True, description="value of change before")
    column_after_value = fields.TextField(null=True, description="value of change after")
    operator = fields.CharField(max_length=30, null=True, description="operator")
    approver = fields.CharField(max_length=30, null=True, description="approver")
    sql_work_order_alter = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TFeatureSqlWorkOrderAlterModel", related_name="sql_work_order_alter_model", to_field='id')

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_operation_log"
        table_description = "operation_log_model"
```

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

from tortoise import fields

from common import errors
from common.logger import root_logger
from models import base_model


class TFeatureDefinePressReportModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    info = base_model.BlobField(null=False, description="stress test details")
    task_id = fields.BigIntField(null=False, description="stress test task id")
    status_code = fields.SmallIntField(null=False, description="status")
    concurrency = fields.BigIntField(null=True, description="number of concurrencies")
    feature_type = fields.IntField(description="feature type")

    # ForeignKey
    feature = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TFeatureDefineModel", related_name='press_report', to_field='id')

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_define_press_report"
        table_description = "stress test details table"
        unique_together = ('feature_id', 'feature_type')


class TFeatureDefinePressReportLogModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    info = base_model.BlobField(null=False, description="stress test details")
    task_id = fields.BigIntField(null=False, description="stress test task id")
    status_code = fields.SmallIntField(null=False, description="status")
    concurrency = fields.BigIntField(null=True, description="number of concurrencies")
    feature_type = fields.IntField(description="feature type")

    # ForeignKey
    feature = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TFeatureDefineModel", related_name='press_report_logs', to_field='id')

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_define_press_report_log"
        table_description = "stress test log"
        unique_together = ('feature_id', 'feature_type', 'task_id')


class TFeatureGetDomainKeySqlModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)

    sql = fields.JSONField(null=True, description="get input sql")
    domain_keys = fields.CharField(null=True, max_length=128, description="input")
    schedule_time = fields.BigIntField(null=True, description="hotspot data scheduling time")

    # foreign key
    domain = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TFeatureDomainModel", related_name='sql', to_field='id')
    caliber = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TFeatureCaliberModel", related_name='sql', to_field='id')
    logic_table = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TFeatureLogicTableModel", related_name='sql', to_field='table_name', source_field='table_name')

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_get_domain_key_sql"
        table_description = "get input sql"
        unique_together = ('table_name', 'domain_id', 'caliber_id', 'domain_keys')


"""
create table `t_feature_define_press_report`(
    `id` bigint(20) not null AUTO_INCREMENT comment 'id',
    `feature_id` bigint(20) not null comment 'feature id',
    `info` blob not null comment 'stress test details',
    `task_id` bigint(20) not null comment 'stress test task id',
    `status_code` tinyint(4) not null comment 'status: 0-not begin, 1-stressing, 2-Finish',
    `create_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'create time',
    `update_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'update time',
    `concurrency` bigint(20) comment 'parallelism',
    primary key `id`(`id`),
    unique key `idx_feature`(`feature_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='stress result';
"""


"""
CREATE TABLE `t_feature_define_press_report_log` (
  `id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT 'id',
  `feature_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'feature id',
  `info` blob COMMENT 'stress test details',
  `task_id` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'stress test task id',
  `status_code` tinyint(4) NOT NULL COMMENT 'status: 0-no fnish, 1-finsh',
  `create_time` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'create time',
  `update_time` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'update time',
  `concurrency` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'parallelism',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uniq_feature_id_task_id` (`feature_id`,`task_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='stress log table '
"""

"""
create table `t_feature_get_domain_key_sql` (
    `id` bigint(20) unsigned not null auto_increment comment 'id',
    `table_name` varchar(128) not null comment 'table name',
    `domain_id` bigint(20) not null comment 'domian id',
    `domain_keys` varchar(128) not null comment 'input',
    `caliber_id` bigint(20) comment 'caliber id',
    `sql` blob comment 'sql',
    `schedule_time` bigint(20) comment 'Hotspot data acquisition scheduling time',
    `create_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'create time',
    `update_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'update time',
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    UNIQUE KEY `idx_table_domain_caliber` (`table_name`, `domain_id`, `caliber_id`, `domain_keys`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='get input sql table';
```

```python
# encoding: utf-8
from tortoise.models import Q
from tortoise import fields
from models import base_model
from common.logger import root_logger


class _BaseReportModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):

    create_time = fields.BigIntField(null=True)
    update_time = fields.BigIntField(null=True)

    @classmethod
    async def select_many(cls, query, values, *, order_by=None, offset=None, limit=None):
        if isinstance(query, dict):
            query = Q(**query)
        try:
            return await cls._query_many(query, values, order_by, offset, limit)
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)
            raise e

    @classmethod
    async def select_one(cls, query, values, *, order_by=None, offset=None):
        if isinstance(query, dict):
            query = Q(**query)
        try:
            return await cls._query_one(query, values)
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)
            raise e

    @classmethod
    async def update_many(cls, query, **kwargs):
        if isinstance(query, dict):
            query = Q(**query)
        try:
            return await cls._update(query, **kwargs)
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)
            raise e

    @classmethod
    async def insert_one(cls, **kwargs):
        try:
            return await cls._insert_one(**kwargs)
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)
            raise e

    @classmethod
    async def delete_many(cls, query):
        if isinstance(query, dict):
            query = Q(**query)
        try:
            return await cls._delete(query)
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)
            raise e


class ReportFieldModel(_BaseReportModel):

    id = fields.IntField(pk=True)
    name = fields.CharField(max_length=64)
    field_type = fields.CharField(max_length=64)
    description = fields.CharField(max_length=255, null=True)
    enumeration = fields.JSONField(null=True)
    is_process = fields.IntField(default=0)
    is_apply = fields.IntField(default=0)
    parent_id = fields.IntField()
    creator = fields.CharField(max_length=64, null=True)
    label_names = fields.CharField(max_length=255, null=True, default="")

    class Meta:
        table = "r_report_field"

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name


class ReportLabelModel(_BaseReportModel):

    id = fields.IntField(pk=True)
    name = fields.CharField(max_length=128, null=True)

    class Meta:
        table = "r_report_label"

    def __str__(self):
        return self.name

    @classmethod
    async def get_labels(cls):
        rows = await cls.select_many({}, ["id", "name"])
        return {r["id"]: r["name"] for r in rows}


class ReportSceneModel(_BaseReportModel):
    id = fields.IntField(pk=True)
    scene_desc = fields.CharField(max_length=255, null=True)
    refer_id_desc = fields.CharField(max_length=255, null=True)
    is_apply = fields.IntField(default=0)
    status = fields.IntField(default=0)
    creator = fields.CharField(max_length=64, null=True)
    updator = fields.CharField(max_length=64, null=True)
    online_time = fields.BigIntField()
    country = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TScenesCountryIdModel", related_name='rpscenes', to_field='id')
    event = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TScenesIdModel", related_name='rpscenes', to_field='id')
    engine_channel = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TScenesChannelIdModel", related_name='rpscenes', to_field='id')
    business = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TScenesBusinessTypeModel", related_name='rpscenes', to_field='id',
                                      source_field='business_type')

    class Meta:
        table = "r_report_scene"

    def __str__(self):
        return f"ReportScene {self.id}"

    @classmethod
    async def get_scene(cls, scene_id):
        return await cls.select_one({"id": scene_id}, ["id", "status"])


class ReportSceneStatusModel(_BaseReportModel):
    status = fields.IntField()
    description = fields.CharField(max_length=255)

    class Meta:
        table = "r_report_scene_status"


class ReportSceneFieldConfModel(_BaseReportModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    info = fields.JSONField(null=True)
    is_del = fields.IntField(default=0)
    is_apply = fields.IntField(default=0)
    status = fields.IntField(default=0, null=True)
    business_map = fields.CharField(max_length=128, null=True)
    enumeration = fields.JSONField(null=True)
    field = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.ReportFieldModel", related_name='report_field', to_field='id')
    scene = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.ReportSceneModel", related_name='report_scene', to_field='id')

    class Meta:
        table = "r_report_scene_field_conf"
        unique_together = (("field_id", "scene_id"),)


    def __str__(self):
        return f"ReportSceneFieldConf {self.id}"

    @classmethod
    async def get_scene(cls, scene_id):
        return await cls.select_one({"id": scene_id}, ["id"])

    @classmethod
    async def delete_fields(cls, scene_fields: list):
        await cls.update_many({"id__in": scene_fields}, is_del=1)

    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
```

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from tortoise import fields

from common.errors import TopError
from common.logger import root_logger
from models import base_model


class TFeatureTopModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    table_name = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description="data source table name", null=False)
    column_name = fields.CharField(max_length=64, description="filed name", null=False)
    describe = base_model.BlobField(description="description", null=True)
    limit = fields.IntField(null=False, description="limit of records")
    sort_type = fields.SmallIntField(description="sort 0|asc 1|desc", null=False, default=0)

    class Meta:
        table = 't_feature_top'
        table_description = 'topN table '
        unique_together = ('table_name', 'column_name', 'sort_type', 'limit')


"""
create table `t_feature_top`(
    `id` bigint(20) not null auto_increment comment 'id',
    `table_name` varchar(128) not null comment 'data source table name',
    `column_name` varchar(64) not null comment 'filed name',
    `describe` blob comment 'description',
    `sort_type` tinyint(4) not null comment 'sort',
    `limit` int not null comment 'limit of records',
    `create_time` bigint(20) comment 'create time',
    `update_time` bigint(20) comment 'update time',
    primary key `id`(`id`),
    unique key `idx_table_column_sort_limit`(`table_name`, `column_name`, `sort_type`, `limit`),
    key `create_time`(`create_time`)
)ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='topN table';
"""
```

```python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from tortoise import fields

from common.errors import WindowError
from common.logger import root_logger
from models import base_model


class TFeatureWindowModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    table_name = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description="data source table name", null=False)
    column_name = fields.CharField(max_length=64, description="filed name", null=False)
    describe = base_model.BlobField(null=False, description="description")
    en_describe = base_model.BlobField(null=True, description="description en")
    time_interval = fields.BigIntField(description="time interval", null=True)

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_window"
        table_description = "window table"
        unique_together = ('table_name', 'column_name', 'time_interval')


"""
create table `t_feature_window`(
    `id` bigint(20) not null auto_increment comment 'id',
    `table_name` varchar (128) not null comment 'data source table name',
    `column_name` varchar (64) not null comment 'filed name',
    `describe` blob not null comment 'description',
    `time_interval` bigint(20) default null comment 'time interval',
    `create_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'create time',
    `update_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'update time',
    primary key (`id`),
    unique key `idx_table_column_time`(`table_name`, `column_name`, `time_interval`),
    key `idx_create_time`(`create_time`)
) engine=innnodb default charset=utf8mb4 comment='window table';
"""
```

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from tortoise import fields

from common import errors
from common.logger import root_logger
from models import base_model, IsDeletedManager


class TFeatureWorkOrderModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(max_length=20, pk=True, null=False)
    tapd_id = fields.CharField(max_length=50, null=True, description="tapd id")
    type_code = fields.IntField(default=1, description="code")
    applier = fields.CharField(max_length=128, null=False, description="applier")
    status_code = fields.IntField(null=False, description="status ")
    apply_time = fields.BigIntField(null=True, description="apply time ")
    press_time = fields.BigIntField(null=True, description="press time")
    is_deleted = fields.SmallIntField(default=0, description="is deleted, 0-NO, 1-YES")
    tester = fields.CharField(max_length=128, null=True, description="tester")
    next_operator = fields.CharField(max_length=128, null=True, description="next operator")
    order_delay = fields.SmallIntField(null=True, description="order delay ", default=10)

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_work_order"
        table_description = "work order table "
        manager = IsDeletedManager()


class TFeatureWordOrderBindDefineModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(max_length=20, pk=True, null=False)
   

    feature = fields.ForeignKeyField('fms.TFeatureDefineModel', related_name='bind', to_field='id')
    order = fields.ForeignKeyField('fms.TFeatureWorkOrderModel', related_name="bind", to_field='id')

    class Meta:
        table = "t_feature_work_order_bind_define"
        table_description = "work order bind feature define"


class TFeatureWorkOrderLog(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(max_length=20, pk=True, null=False)
    order_id = fields.BigIntField(max_length=20, null=False, description="work order id")
    origin_status_code = fields.SmallIntField(null=False, description="status of work order change before")
    status_code = fields.SmallIntField(null=False, description="status of work order change after")
    operator = fields.CharField(max_length=128, null=True, description="operator")
    info = base_model.BlobField(null=True, description="info")

    class Meta:
        table = 't_feature_work_order_log'
        table_description = 'work order log change record'


"""
create table `t_feature_work_order`(
    `id` bigint(20) not null auto_increment comment 'id',
    `applier` varchar (128) not null comment 'applier',
    `status_code` int(11) not null comment 'status',
    `type_code` int(11) default 1 comment 'order type',
    `create_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'create time',
    `update_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'update time',
    `apply_time` bigint(20)  comment 'apply time',
    `press_time` bigint(20) comment 'stress press time',
    `is_deleted` tinyint(4) not null default 0 comment 'is deleted',
    primary key (`id`),
    key `idx_create_time`(`create_time`)
) engine=innodb default charset=utf8mb4 comment='work order ';
"""

"""
create table `t_feature_work_order_bind_define`(
    `id` bigint(20) not null auto_increment comment 'id',
    `order_id` bigint(20) not null comment 'work order id',
    `feature_id` bigint(20) not null comment 'feature id',
    `create_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'create time',
    `update_time` bigint(20) not null comment 'update time',
    primary key `id`(`id`),
    key `idx_feature_id`(`feature_id`),
    key `idx_order_id`(`order_id`)
) engine=innodb default charset=utf8mb4 comment='wor order bind feature';
```

### code file start: models/__init__.py 

```python
from tortoise.models import Q
from tortoise.queryset import QuerySet

from tortoise.manager import Manager


class IsDeletedManager(Manager):
    def get_queryset(self) -> QuerySet:
        return super().get_queryset().filter(is_deleted=0)

```

**code file end: models/__init__.py**

### code file start: models/scenes_model/dimrtfeaturedb_model.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

from tortoise import fields
from models import base_model
from common.logger import root_logger


class RSceneReportKeyRouteModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):

    key = fields.CharField(max_length=64, null=False, description="field alias")
    route = fields.CharField(max_length=128, null=False, description="node")
    tag = fields.SmallIntField(default=0, description='0:Automatic parsingпјҢ1:Manual modification')

    country = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TScenesCountryIdModel", related_name='scenes_key', to_field='id')
    event = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TScenesIdModel", related_name='scenes_key', to_field='id')
    engine_channel = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TScenesChannelIdModel", related_name='scenes_key', to_field='id')
    engine_business = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TScenesBusinessTypeModel", related_name='scenes_key', to_field='id', source_field='business_type')

    class Meta:
        schema = 'dimrtfeaturedb'
        table = "r_scene_report_key_route"
        table_description = "scens field alias table"
        unique_together = (
            ('event_id', 'country_id', 'business_type', 'engine_channel_id', 'key'),
            ('route', 'event_id', 'country_id', 'business_type', 'engine_channel_id')
        )


class ReportSceneDataModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(pk=True)
    refer_id = fields.CharField(max_length=128)
    business_type = fields.SmallIntField()
    event_id = fields.IntField()
    engine_channel_id = fields.IntField()
    country_id = fields.SmallIntField()
    report_data = fields.TextField(null=True)
    business_time = fields.BigIntField(null=True)

    class Meta:
        table = "r_report_scene_data"
        schema = "dimrtfeaturedb"

    def __str__(self):
        return f"ReportSceneData {self.id}"

    @classmethod
    async def select_many(cls, query, values, *, order_by=None, offset=None, limit=None):
        try:
            return await cls._query_many(query, values, order_by, offset, limit)
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)
            raise e

    @classmethod
    async def select_one(cls, query, values, *, order_by=None, offset=None):
        try:
            return await cls._query_one(query, values)
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)
            raise e

    @classmethod
    async def insert_one(cls, **kwargs):
        try:
            return await cls._insert_one(**kwargs)
        except Exception as e:
            print(e)
            root_logger.error(e)
            raise e


"""
CREATE TABLE `r_scene_report_key_route` (
  `event_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `country_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `business_type` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `engine_channel_id` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `key` varchar(64) NOT NULL COMMENT 'field alias',
  `route` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Corresponding reporting data node',
  `tag` tinyint(4) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0: Automatic analysis, 1: Manual modification',
  `create_time` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `update_time` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`event_id`,`country_id`,`business_type`,`engine_channel_id`,`key`),
  UNIQUE KEY `route` (`route`,`event_id`,`country_id`,`business_type`,`engine_channel_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
"""
```

**code file end: models/scenes_model/dimrtfeaturedb_model.py**

```python
# coding: utf-8

from tortoise import fields
from models import base_model
from common.logger import root_logger


class TScenesCountryIdModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(description='country id', pk=True, source_field='val')
    description = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description='description')
    create_time = fields.BigIntField(description="create time", null=False)
    update_time = fields.BigIntField(description="update time", null=False)

    class Meta:
        table = "r_report_country_id"
        table_description = "country dict table "


class TScenesIdModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(description='scene id', pk=True, source_field='val')
    description = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description='description')
    create_time = fields.BigIntField(description="create time", null=False)
    update_time = fields.BigIntField(description="update time", null=False)

    class Meta:
        table = "r_report_scene_id"
        table_description = "report dict table"


class TScenesBusinessTypeModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(description='business id', pk=True, source_field='val')
    description = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description='description')
    create_time = fields.BigIntField(description="create time", null=False)
    update_time = fields.BigIntField(description="update time", null=False)

    class Meta:
        table = "r_report_engine_business_type"
        table_description = "repost business type dict table"


class TScenesChannelIdModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(description='business id', pk=True, source_field='val')
    description = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description='description')
    create_time = fields.BigIntField(description="create time", null=False)
    update_time = fields.BigIntField(description="update time", null=False)

    class Meta:
        table = "r_report_engine_channel_id"
        table_description = "repost channel id dict table"


class TScenesModel(base_model.TimeStampMixin, base_model.BaseModel):
    id = fields.BigIntField(description='id', pk=True)

    args_doc = fields.TextField(description="report content( json)")
    maintainer = fields.CharField(max_length=64, description="maintainer")
    create_time = fields.BigIntField(description="create time", null=False)
    update_time = fields.BigIntField(description="update time", null=False)
    result_args_doc = fields.TextField(description="struct report content( json)")
    refer_id_desc = fields.CharField(max_length=128, description='refer id description')

    country = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TScenesCountryIdModel", related_name='scenes', to_field='id')
    event = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TScenesIdModel", related_name='scenes', to_field='id')
    engine_channel = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TScenesChannelIdModel", related_name='scenes', to_field='id')
    engine_business = fields.ForeignKeyField("fms.TScenesBusinessTypeModel", related_name='scenes', to_field='id', source_field='business_type')

    class Meta:
        table = "r_report_scene_document"
        table_description = "report scene document"
        unique_together = ('country_id', 'event_id', 'business_type', 'engine_channel_id')
```

### code file start: mo_sql_parsing/convert_condition.py 

```python
# coding: utf-8

Logic = set(['and', 'or'])
Judge = set(['eq',  'neq', 'in', 'nin', 'lt', 'lte', 'gt', 'gte', 'missing', 'exists', 'between', 'not_between', 'like'])
Type =  set(['double', 'signed', 'unsigned', 'char'])


def convert_condition(where, root):
    if isinstance(where, str):
        #
        if where.lower() in Type:
            return {"type": "constants", "val": [where], "val_type": "string"}
        return {"type": "column", "val":  where}
    if isinstance(where, int):
        #         
        return {"type": "constants", "val": [where], "val_type": "long"}
    if isinstance(where, float):
        #         
        return {"type": "constants", "val": [where], "val_type": "float"}
    if isinstance(where, list):
        #         
        if len(where) == 0:
            return {"type": "constants", "val": [where], "val_type": "emtpy"}
        else:
            value_type = "string"
            if isinstance(where[0], int):
                value_type = "long"
            elif isinstance(where[0], float):
                value_type = "float"
            return {"type": "constants", "val": where, "val_type": value_type}

    for key, val in where.items():
        if key in Logic:
            #         and or
            ob = root.setdefault(key, {})
            ob['type'] = 'logic'
            ob['args'] = []

            if isinstance(val, list):
                for one in val:
                    ob['args'].append(convert_condition(one, {}))
            else:
                ob['args'].append(convert_condition(val, {}))

        elif key in Judge:
            ob = root.setdefault(key, {})
            ob['type'] = 'judge'
            ob['args'] = []
            if isinstance(val, list):
                for one in val:
                    ob['args'].append(convert_condition(one, {}))
            else:
                ob['args'] = [convert_condition(val, {})]
        elif key == "literal":
            #        
            root["type"] = "constants"
            if isinstance(val, list):
                root['val'] = val
            else:
                root['val'] = [val]
            root["val_type"] = "string"
        else:
            root["type"] = "func"
            root['name'] = key
            root['args'] = []

            if isinstance(val, list):
                for one in val:
                    root['args'].append(convert_condition(one, {}))
            else:
                root['args'].append(convert_condition(val, {}))

    return root


```

**code file end: mo_sql_parsing/convert_condition.py**

### code file start: mo_sql_parsing/formatting.py 

```python
# encoding: utf-8
#
# This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public
# License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this file,
# You can obtain one at http://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/.
#
# Author: Beto Dealmeida (beto@dealmeida.net)
#

from __future__ import absolute_import, division, unicode_literals

import re

from mo_dots import split_field
from mo_future import first, is_text, string_types, text
from mo_parsing import listwrap

from mo_sql_parsing.keywords import RESERVED, join_keywords, precedence
from mo_sql_parsing.utils import binary_ops, is_set_op

MAX_PRECEDENCE = 100
VALID = re.compile(r"^[a-zA-Z_]\w*$")


def is_keyword(identifier):
    try:
        RESERVED.parse_string(identifier)
        return True
    except Exception:
        return False


def should_quote(identifier):
    """
    Return true if a given identifier should be quoted.

    This is usually true when the identifier:

      - is a reserved word
      - contain spaces
      - does not match the regex `[a-zA-Z_]\\w*`

    """
    return identifier != "*" and (not VALID.match(identifier) or is_keyword(identifier))


def escape(ident, ansi_quotes, should_quote):
    """
    Escape identifiers.

    ANSI uses double quotes, but many databases use back quotes.

    """

    def esc(identifier):
        if not should_quote(identifier):
            return identifier

        quote = '"' if ansi_quotes else "`"
        identifier = identifier.replace(quote, 2 * quote)
        return "{0}{1}{2}".format(quote, identifier, quote)

    return ".".join(esc(f) for f in split_field(ident))


def Operator(_op):
    op_prec = precedence[binary_ops[_op]]
    op = " {0} ".format(_op).replace("_", " ").upper()

    def func(self, json, prec):
        acc = []

        if isinstance(json, dict):
            # {VARIABLE: VALUE} FORM
            k, v = first(json.items())
            json = [k, {"literal": v}]

        for i, v in enumerate(listwrap(json)):
            if i == 0:
                acc.append(self.dispatch(v, op_prec + 0.25))
            else:
                acc.append(self.dispatch(v, op_prec))
        if prec >= op_prec:
            return op.join(acc)
        else:
            return f"({op.join(acc)})"

    return func


def isolate(expr, sql, prec):
    """
    RETURN sql IN PARENTHESIS IF PREEDENCE > prec
    :param expr: expression to isolate
    :param sql: sql to return
    :param prec: current precedence
    """
    if is_text(expr):
        return sql
    ps = [p for k in expr.keys() for p in [precedence.get(k)] if p is not None]
    if not ps:
        return sql
    elif min(ps) >= prec:
        return f"({sql})"
    else:
        return sql


unordered_clauses = [
    "with",
    "distinct_on",
    "select_distinct",
    "select",
    "from",
    "where",
    "groupby",
    "having",
]

ordered_clauses = [
    "orderby",
    "limit",
    "offset",
    "fetch",
]


class Formatter:
    # infix operators
    _mul = Operator("*")
    _div = Operator("/")
    _mod = Operator("%")
    _add = Operator("+")
    _sub = Operator("-")
    _neq = Operator("<>")
    _gt = Operator(">")
    _lt = Operator("<")
    _gte = Operator(">=")
    _lte = Operator("<=")
    _eq = Operator("=")
    _or = Operator("or")
    _and = Operator("and")
    _binary_and = Operator("&")
    _binary_or = Operator("|")
    _like = Operator("like")
    _not_like = Operator("not like")
    _rlike = Operator("rlike")
    _not_rlike = Operator("not rlike")
    _union = Operator("union")
    _union_all = Operator("union all")
    _intersect = Operator("intersect")
    _minus = Operator("minus")
    _except = Operator("except")

    def __init__(self, ansi_quotes=True, should_quote=should_quote):
        self.ansi_quotes = ansi_quotes
        self.should_quote = should_quote

    def format(self, json):
        return self.dispatch(json, 50)

    def dispatch(self, json, prec=100):
        if isinstance(json, list):
            return self.sql_list(json, prec=precedence["list"])
        if isinstance(json, dict):
            if len(json) == 0:
                return ""
            elif "value" in json:
                return self.value(json, prec)
            elif "join" in json:
                return self._join_on(json)
            elif "insert" in json:
                return self.insert(json)
            elif json.keys() & set(ordered_clauses):
                return self.ordered_query(json, prec)
            elif json.keys() & set(unordered_clauses):
                return self.unordered_query(json, prec)
            elif "null" in json:
                return "NULL"
            elif "trim" in json:
                return self._trim(json, prec)
            elif "extract" in json:
                return self._extract(json, prec)
            else:
                return self.op(json, prec)
        if isinstance(json, string_types):
            return escape(json, self.ansi_quotes, self.should_quote)
        if json == None:
            return "NULL"

        return text(json)

    def sql_list(self, json, prec=precedence["from"] - 1):
        sql = ", ".join(self.dispatch(element, prec=MAX_PRECEDENCE) for element in json)
        if prec >= precedence["from"]:
            return sql
        else:
            return f"({sql})"

    def value(self, json, prec=precedence["from"]):
        parts = [self.dispatch(json["value"], prec)]
        if "over" in json:
            over = json["over"]
            parts.append("OVER")
            window = []
            if "partitionby" in over:
                window.append(self.partitionby(over, precedence["window"]))
            if "orderby" in over:
                window.append(self.orderby(over, precedence["window"]))
            if "range" in over:

                def wordy(v):
                    if v < 0:
                        return [text(abs(v)), "PRECEDING"]
                    elif v > 0:
                        return [text(v), "FOLLOWING"]

                window.append("ROWS")
                range = over["range"]
                min = range.get("min")
                max = range.get("max")

                if min is None:
                    if max is None:
                        window.pop()  # not expected, but deal
                    elif max == 0:
                        window.append("UNBOUNDED PRECEDING")
                    else:
                        window.append("BETWEEN")
                        window.append("UNBOUNDED PRECEDING")
                        window.append("AND")
                        window.extend(wordy(max))
                elif min == 0:
                    if max is None:
                        window.append("UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING")
                    elif max == 0:
                        window.append("CURRENT ROW")
                    else:
                        window.extend(wordy(max))
                else:
                    if max is None:
                        window.append("BETWEEN")
                        window.extend(wordy(min))
                        window.append("AND")
                        window.append("UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING")
                    elif max == 0:
                        window.extend(wordy(min))
                    else:
                        window.append("BETWEEN")
                        window.extend(wordy(min))
                        window.append("AND")
                        window.extend(wordy(max))

            window = " ".join(window)
            parts.append(f"({window})")
        if "name" in json:
            parts.extend(["AS", self.dispatch(json["name"])])

        return " ".join(parts)

    def op(self, json, prec):
        if len(json) > 1:
            raise Exception("Operators should have only one key!")
        key, value = list(json.items())[0]

        # check if the attribute exists, and call the corresponding method;
        # note that we disallow keys that start with `_` to avoid giving access
        # to magic methods
        attr = f"_{key}"
        if hasattr(self, attr) and not key.startswith("_"):
            method = getattr(self, attr)
            op_prec = precedence.get(key, MAX_PRECEDENCE)
            if prec >= op_prec:
                return method(value, op_prec)
            else:
                return f"({method(value, op_prec)})"

        # treat as regular function call
        if isinstance(value, dict) and len(value) == 0:
            return (
                key.upper() + "()"
            )  # NOT SURE IF AN EMPTY dict SHOULD BE DELT WITH HERE, OR IN self.format()
        else:
            params = ", ".join(self.dispatch(p) for p in listwrap(value))
            return f"{key.upper()}({params})"

    def _binary_not(self, value, prec):
        return "~{0}".format(self.dispatch(value))

    def _exists(self, value, prec):
        return "{0} IS NOT NULL".format(self.dispatch(value, precedence["is"]))

    def _missing(self, value, prec):
        return "{0} IS NULL".format(self.dispatch(value, precedence["is"]))

    def _collate(self, pair, prec):
        return "{0} COLLATE {1}".format(
            self.dispatch(pair[0], precedence["collate"]), pair[1]
        )

    def _in(self, json, prec):
        member, set = json
        if "literal" in set:
            set = {"literal": listwrap(set["literal"])}
        sql = (
            self.dispatch(member, precedence["in"])
            + " IN "
            + self.dispatch(set, precedence["in"])
        )
        if prec < precedence["in"]:
            sql = f"({sql})"
        return sql

    def _nin(self, json, prec):
        member, set = json
        if "literal" in set:
            set = {"literal": listwrap(set["literal"])}
        sql = (
            self.dispatch(member, precedence["in"])
            + " NOT IN "
            + self.dispatch(set, precedence["in"])
        )
        if prec < precedence["in"]:
            sql = f"({sql})"
        return sql

    def _case(self, checks, prec):
        parts = ["CASE"]
        for check in checks if isinstance(checks, list) else [checks]:
            if isinstance(check, dict):
                if "when" in check and "then" in check:
                    parts.extend(["WHEN", self.dispatch(check["when"])])
                    parts.extend(["THEN", self.dispatch(check["then"])])
                else:
                    parts.extend(["ELSE", self.dispatch(check)])
            else:
                parts.extend(["ELSE", self.dispatch(check)])
        parts.append("END")
        return " ".join(parts)

    def _cast(self, json, prec):
        expr, type = json

        type_name, params = first(type.items())
        if not params:
            type = type_name.upper()
        else:
            type = {type_name.upper(): params}

        return f"CAST({self.dispatch(expr)} AS {self.dispatch(type)})"

    def _extract(self, json, prec):
        interval, value = json["extract"]
        i = self.dispatch(interval).upper()
        v = self.dispatch(value)
        return f"EXTRACT({i} FROM {v})"

    def _interval(self, json, prec):
        amount = self.dispatch(json[0], precedence["and"])
        type = self.dispatch(json[1], precedence["and"])
        return f"INTERVAL {amount} {type.upper()}"

    def _literal(self, json, prec=0):
        if isinstance(json, list):
            return "({0})".format(", ".join(
                self._literal(v, precedence["literal"]) for v in json
            ))
        elif isinstance(json, string_types):
            return "'{0}'".format(json.replace("'", "''"))
        else:
            return str(json)

    def _get(self, json, prec):
        v, i = json
        v_sql = self.dispatch(v, prec=precedence["literal"])
        i_sql = self.dispatch(i)
        return f"{v_sql}[{i_sql}]"

    def _between(self, json, prec):
        return "{0} BETWEEN {1} AND {2}".format(
            self.dispatch(json[0], precedence["between"]),
            self.dispatch(json[1], precedence["between"]),
            self.dispatch(json[2], precedence["between"]),
        )

    def _trim(self, json, prec):
        c = json.get("characters")
        d = json.get("direction")
        v = json["trim"]
        acc = ["TRIM("]
        if d:
            acc.append(d.upper())
            acc.append(" ")
        if c:
            acc.append(self.dispatch(c))
            acc.append(" ")
        if c or d:
            acc.append("FROM ")
        acc.append(self.dispatch(v))
        acc.append(")")
        return "".join(acc)

    def _not_between(self, json, prec):
        return "{0} NOT BETWEEN {1} AND {2}".format(
            self.dispatch(json[0], precedence["between"]),
            self.dispatch(json[1], precedence["between"]),
            self.dispatch(json[2], precedence["between"]),
        )

    def _distinct(self, json, prec):
        return "DISTINCT " + ", ".join(
            self.dispatch(v, precedence["select"]) for v in listwrap(json)
        )

    def _select_distinct(self, json, prec):
        return "SELECT DISTINCT " + ", ".join(self.dispatch(v) for v in listwrap(json))

    def _distinct_on(self, json, prec):
        return (
            "DISTINCT ON (" + ", ".join(self.dispatch(v) for v in listwrap(json)) + ")"
        )

    def _join_on(self, json, prec):
        detected_join = join_keywords & set(json.keys())
        if len(detected_join) == 0:
            raise Exception(
                'Fail to detect join type! Detected: "{}" Except one of: "{}"'.format(
                    [on_keyword for on_keyword in json if on_keyword != "on"][0],
                    '", "'.join(join_keywords),
                )
            )

        join_keyword = detected_join.pop()

        acc = []
        acc.append(join_keyword.upper())
        acc.append(self.dispatch(json[join_keyword], precedence["join"]))

        if json.get("on"):
            acc.append("ON")
            acc.append(self.dispatch(json["on"]))
        if json.get("using"):
            acc.append("USING")
            acc.append(self.dispatch(json["using"]))
        return " ".join(acc)

    def ordered_query(self, json, prec):
        if json.keys() & set(unordered_clauses) - {"from"}:
            # regular query
            acc = [self.unordered_query(json, precedence["order"])]
        else:
            # set-op expression
            acc = [self.dispatch(json["from"], precedence["order"])]

        acc.extend(
            part
            for clause in ordered_clauses
            if clause in json
            for part in [getattr(self, clause)(json, precedence["order"])]
            if part
        )
        sql = " ".join(acc)
        if prec >= precedence["order"]:
            return sql
        else:
            return f"({sql})"

    def unordered_query(self, json, prec):
        sql = " ".join(
            part
            for clause in unordered_clauses
            if clause in json
            for part in [getattr(self, clause)(json, precedence["from"])]
            if part
        )
        if prec >= precedence["from"]:
            return sql
        else:
            return f"({sql})"

    def with_(self, json, prec):
        if "with" in json:
            with_ = json["with"]
            if not isinstance(with_, list):
                with_ = [with_]
            parts = ", ".join(
                "{0} AS ({1})".format(part["name"], self.dispatch(part["value"]))
                for part in with_
            )
            return "WITH {0}".format(parts)

    def select(self, json, prec):
        param = ", ".join(self.dispatch(s) for s in listwrap(json["select"]))
        if "top" in json:
            top = self.dispatch(json["top"])
            return f"SELECT TOP ({top}) {param}"
        if "distinct_on" in json:
            return param
        else:
            return f"SELECT {param}"

    def distinct_on(self, json, prec):
        param = ", ".join(self.dispatch(s) for s in listwrap(json["distinct_on"]))
        return f"SELECT DISTINCT ON ({param})"

    def select_distinct(self, json, prec):
        param = ", ".join(self.dispatch(s) for s in listwrap(json["select_distinct"]))
        return f"SELECT DISTINCT {param}"

    def from_(self, json, prec):
        is_join = False
        from_ = json["from"]
        if isinstance(from_, dict) and is_set_op & from_.keys():
            source = self.op(from_, precedence["from"])
            return f"FROM {source}"

        from_ = listwrap(from_)
        parts = []
        for v in from_:
            if join_keywords & set(v):
                is_join = True
                parts.append(self._join_on(v, precedence["from"] - 1))
            else:
                parts.append(self.dispatch(v, precedence["from"] - 1))
        joiner = " " if is_join else ", "
        rest = joiner.join(parts)
        return f"FROM {rest}"

    def where(self, json, prec):
        expr = self.dispatch(json["where"])
        return f"WHERE {expr}"

    def groupby(self, json, prec):
        param = ", ".join(self.dispatch(s) for s in listwrap(json["groupby"]))
        return f"GROUP BY {param}"

    def having(self, json, prec):
        return "HAVING {0}".format(self.dispatch(json["having"]))

    def orderby(self, json, prec):
        param = ", ".join(
            (
                self.dispatch(s["value"], precedence["order"])
                + " "
                + s.get("sort", "").upper()
            ).strip()
            for s in listwrap(json["orderby"])
        )
        return f"ORDER BY {param}"

    def partitionby(self, json, prec):
        param = ", ".join(
            self.dispatch(s, precedence["order"]) for s in listwrap(json["partitionby"])
        )
        return f"PARTITION BY {param}"

    def limit(self, json, prec):
        num = self.dispatch(json["limit"], precedence["order"])
        return f"LIMIT {num}"

    def offset(self, json, prec):
        num = self.dispatch(json["offset"], precedence["order"])
        return f"OFFSET {num}"

    def fetch(self, json, prec):
        num = self.dispatch(json["offset"], precedence["order"])
        return f"FETCH {num} ROWS ONLY"

    def insert(self, json, prec=precedence["from"]):
        acc = ["INSERT"]
        if "overwrite" in json:
            acc.append("OVERWRITE")
        else:
            acc.append("INTO")
        acc.append(json["insert"])

        if "columns" in json:
            acc.append(self.sql_list(json))
        if "values" in json:
            values = json["values"]
            if all(isinstance(row, dict) for row in values):
                columns = list(sorted(set(k for row in values for k in row.keys())))
                acc.append(self.sql_list(columns))
                if "if exists" in json:
                    acc.append("IF EXISTS")
                acc.append("VALUES")
                acc.append(",\n".join(
                    "(" + ", ".join(self._literal(row[c]) for c in columns) + ")"
                    for row in values
                ))
            else:
                if "if exists" in json:
                    acc.append("IF EXISTS")
                acc.append("VALUES")
                for row in values:
                    acc.append("(" + ", ".join(self._literal(row)) + ")")

        else:
            if json["if exists"]:
                acc.append("IF EXISTS")
            acc.append(self.dispatch(json["query"]))
        return " ".join(acc)


setattr(Formatter, "with", Formatter.with_)
setattr(Formatter, "from", Formatter.from_)
```

**code file end: mo_sql_parsing/formatting.py**

---


### code file start: mo_sql_parsing/keywords.py 

```python
# encoding: utf-8
#
# This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public
# License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this file,
# You can obtain one at http://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/.
#
# Contact: Kyle Lahnakoski (kyle@lahnakoski.com)
#

# SQL CONSTANTS
from mo_parsing import *

from mo_sql_parsing.utils import SQL_NULL, keyword

NULL = keyword("null") / (lambda: SQL_NULL)
TRUE = keyword("true") / (lambda: True)
FALSE = keyword("false") / (lambda: False)
NOCASE = keyword("nocase")
ASC = keyword("asc")
DESC = keyword("desc")

# SIMPLE KEYWORDS
AS = keyword("as").suppress()
ALL = keyword("all")
BY = keyword("by").suppress()
CAST = keyword("cast")
CONSTRAINT = keyword("constraint").suppress()
CREATE = keyword("create").suppress()
CROSS = keyword("cross")
DISTINCT = keyword("distinct")
EXCEPT = keyword("except")
FETCH = keyword("fetch").suppress()
FROM = keyword("from").suppress()
FULL = keyword("full")
GROUP = keyword("group").suppress()
HAVING = keyword("having").suppress()
INNER = keyword("inner")
INTERVAL = keyword("interval")
JOIN = keyword("join")
LEFT = keyword("left")
LIKE = keyword("like")
LIMIT = keyword("limit").suppress()
MINUS = keyword("minus")
OFFSET = keyword("offset").suppress()
ON = keyword("on").suppress()
ORDER = keyword("order").suppress()
OUTER = keyword("outer")
OVER = keyword("over").suppress()
PARTITION = keyword("partition").suppress()
# PERCENT = keyword("percent").suppress()
RIGHT = keyword("right")
RLIKE = keyword("rlike")
SELECT = keyword("select").suppress()
TABLE = keyword("table").suppress()
THEN = keyword("then").suppress()
TOP = keyword("top").suppress()
UNION = keyword("union")
INTERSECT = keyword("intersect")
USING = keyword("using").suppress()
WHEN = keyword("when").suppress()
WHERE = keyword("where").suppress()
WITH = keyword("with").suppress()
WITHIN = keyword("within").suppress()
PRIMARY = keyword("primary").suppress()
FOREIGN = keyword("foreign").suppress()
KEY = keyword("key").suppress()
UNIQUE = keyword("unique").suppress()
INDEX = keyword("index").suppress()
REFERENCES = keyword("references").suppress()
RECURSIVE = keyword("recursive").suppress()
VALUES = keyword("values").suppress()
WINDOW = keyword("window")

PRIMARY_KEY = Group(PRIMARY + KEY).set_parser_name("primary_key")
FOREIGN_KEY = Group(FOREIGN + KEY).set_parser_name("foreign_key")

# SIMPLE OPERATORS
CONCAT = Literal("||").set_parser_name("concat")
MUL = Literal("*").set_parser_name("mul")
DIV = Literal("/").set_parser_name("div")
MOD = Literal("%").set_parser_name("mod")
NEG = Literal("-").set_parser_name("neg")
ADD = Literal("+").set_parser_name("add")
SUB = Literal("-").set_parser_name("sub")
BINARY_NOT = Literal("~").set_parser_name("binary_not")
BINARY_AND = Literal("&").set_parser_name("binary_and")
BINARY_OR = Literal("|").set_parser_name("binary_or")
GTE = Literal(">=").set_parser_name("gte")
LTE = Literal("<=").set_parser_name("lte")
LT = Literal("<").set_parser_name("lt")
GT = Literal(">").set_parser_name("gt")
EEQ = (
    # conservative equality  https://github.com/klahnakoski/jx-sqlite/blob/dev/docs/Logical%20Equality.md#definitions
    Literal("==")
    | Literal("=")
).set_parser_name("eq")
DEQ = (
    # decisive equality
    # https://sparkbyexamples.com/apache-hive/hive-relational-arithmetic-logical-operators/
    Literal("<=>").set_parser_name("eq!")
)
IDF = (
    # decisive equality
    # https://prestodb.io/docs/current/functions/comparison.html#is-distinct-from-and-is-not-distinct-from
    keyword("is distinct from").set_parser_name("eq!")
)
INDF = (
    # decisive equality
    # https://prestodb.io/docs/current/functions/comparison.html#is-distinct-from-and-is-not-distinct-from
    keyword("is not distinct from").set_parser_name("ne!")
)
NEQ = (Literal("!=") | Literal("<>")).set_parser_name("neq")
LAMBDA = Literal("->").set_parser_name("lambda")

AND = keyword("and")
APPLY = keyword("apply")
BETWEEN = keyword("between")
CASE = keyword("case").suppress()
COLLATE = keyword("collate")
END = keyword("end")
ELSE = keyword("else").suppress()
IN = keyword("in")
IS = keyword("is")
NOT = keyword("not")
OR = keyword("or")
LATERAL = keyword("lateral")
VIEW = keyword("view")

# COMPOUND KEYWORDS


joins = (
    (
        Optional(
            CROSS | OUTER | INNER | ((FULL | LEFT | RIGHT) + Optional(INNER | OUTER))
        )
        + JOIN
        + Optional(LATERAL)
    )
    | LATERAL + VIEW + Optional(OUTER)
    | (CROSS | OUTER) + APPLY
) / (lambda tokens: " ".join(tokens).lower())

UNION_ALL = (UNION + ALL).set_parser_name("union_all")
WITHIN_GROUP = Group(WITHIN + GROUP).set_parser_name("within_group")
SELECT_DISTINCT = Group(SELECT + DISTINCT).set_parser_name("select distinct")
PARTITION_BY = Group(PARTITION + BY).set_parser_name("partition by")
GROUP_BY = Group(GROUP + BY).set_parser_name("group by")
ORDER_BY = Group(ORDER + BY).set_parser_name("order by")

# COMPOUND OPERATORS
AT_TIME_ZONE = Group(keyword("at") + keyword("time") + keyword("zone"))
NOT_BETWEEN = Group(NOT + BETWEEN).set_parser_name("not_between")
NOT_LIKE = Group(NOT + LIKE).set_parser_name("not_like")
NOT_RLIKE = Group(NOT + RLIKE).set_parser_name("not_rlike")
NOT_IN = Group(NOT + IN).set_parser_name("nin")
IS_NOT = Group(IS + NOT).set_parser_name("is_not")

_SIMILAR = keyword("similar")
_TO = keyword("to")
SIMILAR_TO = Group(_SIMILAR + _TO).set_parser_name("similar_to")
NOT_SIMILAR_TO = Group(NOT + _SIMILAR + _TO).set_parser_name("not_similar_to")

RESERVED = MatchFirst([
    # ONY INCLUDE SINGLE WORDS
    ALL,
    AND,
    AS,
    ASC,
    BETWEEN,
    BY,
    CASE,
    COLLATE,
    CONSTRAINT,
    CREATE,
    CROSS,
    DESC,
    DISTINCT,
    EXCEPT,
    ELSE,
    END,
    FALSE,
    FETCH,
    FOREIGN,
    FROM,
    FULL,
    GROUP_BY,
    GROUP,
    HAVING,
    IN,
    INDEX,
    INNER,
    INTERSECT,
    INTERVAL,
    IS_NOT,
    IS,
    JOIN,
    KEY,
    LATERAL,
    LEFT,
    LIKE,
    LIMIT,
    MINUS,
    NOCASE,
    NOT,
    NULL,
    OFFSET,
    ON,
    OR,
    ORDER,
    OUTER,
    OVER,
    PARTITION,
    PRIMARY,
    REFERENCES,
    RIGHT,
    RLIKE,
    SELECT,
    THEN,
    TRUE,
    UNION,
    UNIQUE,
    USING,
    WHEN,
    WHERE,
    WINDOW,
    WITH,
    WITHIN,
])

LB = Literal("(").suppress()
RB = Literal(")").suppress()
EQ = Char("=").suppress()

join_keywords = {
    "join",
    "full join",
    "cross join",
    "inner join",
    "left join",
    "right join",
    "full outer join",
    "right outer join",
    "left outer join",
    "cross apply",
    "outer apply",
}

precedence = {
    # https://www.sqlite.org/lang_expr.html
    "literal": -1,
    "interval": 0,
    "cast": 0,
    "collate": 0,
    "concat": 1,
    "mul": 2,
    "div": 1.5,
    "mod": 2,
    "neg": 3,
    "add": 3,
    "sub": 2.5,
    "binary_not": 4,
    "binary_and": 4,
    "binary_or": 4,
    "gte": 5,
    "lte": 5,
    "lt": 5,
    "gt": 6,
    "eq": 7,
    "neq": 7,
    "missing": 7,
    "exists": 7,
    "at_time_zone": 8,
    "between": 8,
    "not_between": 8,
    "in": 8,
    "nin": 8,
    "is": 8,
    "like": 8,
    "not_like": 8,
    "rlike": 8,
    "not_rlike": 8,
    "similar_to": 8,
    "not_similar_to": 8,
    "and": 10,
    "or": 11,
    "lambda": 12,
    "join": 18,
    "list": 18,
    "select": 30,
    "from": 30,
    "window": 35,
    "union": 40,
    "union_all": 40,
    "except": 40,
    "minus": 40,
    "intersect": 40,
    "order": 50,
}

KNOWN_OPS = [
    COLLATE,
    CONCAT,
    MUL | DIV | MOD,
    NEG,
    ADD | SUB,
    BINARY_NOT,
    BINARY_AND,
    BINARY_OR,
    GTE | LTE | LT | GT,
    EEQ | NEQ | DEQ | IDF | INDF,
    AT_TIME_ZONE,
    (BETWEEN, AND),
    (NOT_BETWEEN, AND),
    IN,
    NOT_IN,
    IS_NOT,
    IS,
    LIKE,
    NOT_LIKE,
    RLIKE,
    NOT_RLIKE,
    SIMILAR_TO,
    NOT_SIMILAR_TO,
    NOT,
    AND,
    OR,
    LAMBDA,
]

times = ["now", "today", "tomorrow", "eod"]

durations = {
    "microseconds": "microsecond",
    "microsecond": "microsecond",
    "microsecs": "microsecond",
    "microsec": "microsecond",
    "useconds": "microsecond",
    "usecond": "microsecond",
    "usecs": "microsecond",
    "usec": "microsecond",
    "us": "microsecond",
    "milliseconds": "millisecond",
    "millisecond": "millisecond",
    "millisecon": "millisecond",
    "mseconds": "millisecond",
    "msecond": "millisecond",
    "millisecs": "millisecond",
    "millisec": "millisecond",
    "msecs": "millisecond",
    "msec": "millisecond",
    "ms": "millisecond",
    "seconds": "second",
    "second": "second",
    "secs": "second",
    "sec": "second",
    "s": "second",
    "minutes": "minute",
    "minute": "minute",
    "mins": "minute",
    "min": "minute",
    "m": "minute",
    "hours": "hour",
    "hour": "hour",
    "hrs": "hour",
    "hr": "hour",
    "h": "hour",
    "days": "day",
    "day": "day",
    "d": "day",
    "dayofweek": "dow",
    "dow": "dow",
    "weekday": "dow",
    "weeks": "week",
    "week": "week",
    "w": "week",
    "months": "month",
    "month": "month",
    "mons": "month",
    "mon": "month",
    "quarters": "quarter",
    "quarter": "quarter",
    "years": "year",
    "year": "year",
    "decades": "decade",
    "decade": "decade",
    "decs": "decade",
    "dec": "decade",
    "centuries": "century",
    "century": "century",
    "cents": "century",
    "cent": "century",
    "c": "century",
    "millennia": "millennium",
    "millennium": "millennium",
    "mils": "millennium",
    "mil": "millennium",
    "epoch": "epoch",
}
```
