### code file start: mo_sql_parsing/sql_parser.py 

```python
# encoding: utf-8
#
# This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public
# License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this file,
# You can obtain one at http://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/.
#
# Contact: Kyle Lahnakoski (kyle@lahnakoski.com)
#


from mo_parsing.helpers import restOfLine
from mo_parsing.infix import delimited_list
from mo_parsing.whitespaces import NO_WHITESPACE, Whitespace

from mo_sql_parsing import utils
from mo_sql_parsing.keywords import *
from mo_sql_parsing.types import get_column_type, time_functions
from mo_sql_parsing.utils import *
from mo_sql_parsing.windows import window


def no_dashes(tokens, start, string):
    if "-" in tokens[0]:
        index = tokens[0].find("-")
        raise ParseException(
            tokens.type,
            start + index + 1,  # +1 TO ENSURE THIS MESSAGE HAS PRIORITY
            string,
            """Ambiguity: Use backticks (``) around identifiers with dashes, or add space around subtraction operator.""",
        )


digit = Char("0123456789")
simple_ident = (
    Char(FIRST_IDENT_CHAR)
    + (Regex("(?<=[^ 0-9])\\-(?=[^ 0-9])") | Char(IDENT_CHAR))[...]
)
simple_ident = Regex(simple_ident.__regex__()[1]) / no_dashes


def common_parser():
    combined_ident = Combine(delimited_list(
        ansi_ident | mysql_backtick_ident | simple_ident, separator=".", combine=True,
    )).set_parser_name("identifier")

    return parser(ansi_string, combined_ident)


def mysql_parser():
    utils.emit_warning_for_double_quotes = False

    mysql_string = ansi_string | mysql_doublequote_string
    mysql_ident = Combine(delimited_list(
        mysql_backtick_ident | sqlserver_ident | simple_ident,
        separator=".",
        combine=True,
    )).set_parser_name("mysql identifier")

    return parser(mysql_string, mysql_ident)


def sqlserver_parser():
    combined_ident = Combine(delimited_list(
        ansi_ident
        | mysql_backtick_ident
        | sqlserver_ident
        | Word(FIRST_IDENT_CHAR, IDENT_CHAR),
        separator=".",
        combine=True,
    )).set_parser_name("identifier")

    return parser(ansi_string, combined_ident, sqlserver=True)


def parser(literal_string, ident, sqlserver=False):
    with Whitespace() as engine:
        engine.add_ignore(Literal("--") + restOfLine)
        engine.add_ignore(Literal("#") + restOfLine)
        engine.add_ignore(Literal("/*") + SkipTo("*/", include=True))

        var_name = ~RESERVED + ident
        func_name = ~FROM + ident

        # EXPRESSIONS
        expr = Forward()
        column_type, column_definition, column_def_references = get_column_type(
            expr, var_name, literal_string
        )

        # CASE
        case = (
            CASE
            + Group(ZeroOrMore(
                (WHEN + expr("when") + THEN + expr("then")) / to_when_call
            ))("case")
            + Optional(ELSE + expr("else"))
            + END
        ) / to_case_call

        switch = (
            CASE
            + expr("value")
            + Group(ZeroOrMore(
                (WHEN + expr("when") + THEN + expr("then")) / to_when_call
            ))("case")
            + Optional(ELSE + expr("else"))
            + END
        ) / to_switch_call

        cast = (
            Group(CAST("op") + LB + expr("params") + AS + column_type("params") + RB)
            / to_json_call
        )

        trim = (
            Group(
                keyword("trim").suppress()
                + LB
                + Optional(
                    (keyword("both") | keyword("trailing") | keyword("leading"))
                    / (lambda t: t[0].lower())
                )("direction")
                + (
                    assign("from", expr)
                    | expr("chars") + Optional(assign("from", expr))
                )
                + RB
            ).set_parser_name("trim")
            / to_trim_call
        )

        _standard_time_intervals = MatchFirst([
            keyword(d) / (lambda t: durations[t[0].lower()]) for d in durations.keys()
        ]).set_parser_name("duration")("params")

        duration = (
            real_num | int_num | literal_string
        )("params") + _standard_time_intervals

        interval = (
            INTERVAL + ("'" + delimited_list(duration) + "'" | duration)
        ) / to_interval_call

        timestamp = (
            time_functions("op")
            + (
                literal_string("params")
                | MatchFirst([
                    keyword(t) / (lambda t: t.lower()) for t in times
                ])("params")
            )
        ) / to_json_call

        extract = (
            keyword("extract")("op")
            + LB
            + (_standard_time_intervals | expr("params"))
            + FROM
            + expr("params")
            + RB
        ) / to_json_call

        alias = Optional((
            (
                AS
                + (var_name("name") + Optional(LB + delimited_list(ident("col")) + RB))
                | (
                    var_name("name")
                    + Optional(
                        (LB + delimited_list(ident("col")) + RB)
                        | (AS + delimited_list(var_name("col")))
                    )
                )
            )
            / to_alias
        )("name"))

        named_column = Group(Group(expr)("value") + alias)

        stack = (
            keyword("stack")("op")
            + LB
            + int_num("width")
            + ","
            + delimited_list(expr)("args")
            + RB
        ) / to_stack

        # ARRAY[foo],
        # ARRAY < STRING > [foo, bar], INVALID
        # ARRAY < STRING > [foo, bar],
        create_array = (
            keyword("array")("op")
            + Optional(LT.suppress() + column_type("type") + GT.suppress())
            + (
                LB + delimited_list(Group(expr))("args") + RB
                | (Literal("[") + delimited_list(Group(expr))("args") + Literal("]"))
            )
        )

        if not sqlserver:
            # SQL SERVER DOES NOT SUPPORT [] FOR ARRAY CONSTRUCTION (USED FOR IDENTIFIERS)
            create_array = (
                Literal("[") + delimited_list(Group(expr))("args") + Literal("]")
                | create_array
            )

        create_array = create_array / to_array

        create_map = (
            keyword("map")
            + Literal("[")
            + expr("keys")
            + ","
            + expr("values")
            + Literal("]")
        ) / to_map

        create_struct = (
            keyword("struct")("op")
            + Optional(
                LT.suppress() + delimited_list(column_type)("types") + GT.suppress()
            )
            + LB
            + delimited_list(Group((expr("value") + alias) / to_select_call))("args")
            + RB
        ).set_parser_name("create struct") / to_struct

        distinct = (
            DISTINCT("op") + delimited_list(named_column)("params")
        ) / to_json_call

        query = Forward().set_parser_name("query")

        call_function = (
            func_name("op")
            + LB
            + Optional(Group(query) | delimited_list(Group(expr)))("params")
            + Optional(
                (keyword("respect") | keyword("ignore"))("nulls")
                + keyword("nulls").suppress()
            )
            + RB
        ).set_parser_name("call function") / to_json_call

        with NO_WHITESPACE:

            def scale(tokens):
                return {"mul": [tokens[0], tokens[1]]}

            scale_function = ((real_num | int_num) + call_function) / scale
            scale_ident = ((real_num | int_num) + ident) / scale

        compound = (
            NULL
            | TRUE
            | FALSE
            | NOCASE
            | interval
            | timestamp
            | extract
            | case
            | switch
            | cast
            | distinct
            | trim
            | stack
            | create_array
            | create_map
            | create_struct
            | (LB + Group(query) + RB)
            | (LB + Group(delimited_list(expr)) / to_tuple_call + RB)
            | literal_string.set_parser_name("string")
            | hex_num.set_parser_name("hex")
            | scale_function
            | scale_ident
            | real_num.set_parser_name("float")
            | int_num.set_parser_name("int")
            | call_function
            | Combine(var_name + Optional(".*"))
        )

        sort_column = (
            expr("value").set_parser_name("sort1")
            + Optional(DESC("sort") | ASC("sort"))
            + Optional(assign("nulls", keyword("first") | keyword("last")))
        )

        window_clause, over_clause = window(expr, var_name, sort_column)

        expr << (
            (
                Literal("*")
                | infix_notation(
                    compound,
                    [
                        (
                            Literal("[").suppress() + expr + Literal("]").suppress(),
                            1,
                            LEFT_ASSOC,
                            to_offset,
                        ),
                        (
                            Literal(".").suppress() + simple_ident,
                            1,
                            LEFT_ASSOC,
                            to_offset,
                        ),
                        (window_clause, 1, LEFT_ASSOC, to_window_mod),
                        (
                            assign("filter", LB + WHERE + expr + RB),
                            1,
                            LEFT_ASSOC,
                            to_window_mod,
                        ),
                    ]
                    + [
                        (
                            o,
                            1 if o in unary_ops else (3 if isinstance(o, tuple) else 2),
                            unary_ops.get(o, LEFT_ASSOC),
                            to_lambda if o is LAMBDA else to_json_operator,
                        )
                        for o in KNOWN_OPS
                    ],
                )
            )("value").set_parser_name("expression")
        )

        select_column = (
            Group(
                expr("value") + alias | Literal("*")("value")
            ).set_parser_name("column")
            / to_select_call
        )

        table_source = Forward()

        join = (
            Group(joins)("op")
            + table_source("join")
            + Optional((ON + expr("on")) | (USING + expr("using")))
            | (
                Group(WINDOW)("op")
                + Group(var_name("name") + AS + over_clause("value"))("join")
            )
        ) / to_join_call

        selection = (
            (SELECT + DISTINCT + ON + LB)
            + delimited_list(select_column)("distinct_on")
            + RB
            + delimited_list(select_column)("select")
            | SELECT + DISTINCT + delimited_list(select_column)("select_distinct")
            | (
                SELECT
                + Optional(
                    TOP
                    + expr("value")
                    + Optional(keyword("percent"))("percent")
                    + Optional(WITH + keyword("ties"))("ties")
                )("top")
                / to_top_clause
                + delimited_list(select_column)("select")
            )
        )

        row = (LB + delimited_list(Group(expr)) + RB) / to_row
        values = VALUES + delimited_list(row) / to_values

        unordered_sql = Group(
            values
            | selection
            + Optional(
                (FROM + delimited_list(table_source) + ZeroOrMore(join))("from")
                + Optional(WHERE + expr("where"))
                + Optional(GROUP_BY + delimited_list(Group(named_column))("groupby"))
                + Optional(HAVING + expr("having"))
            )
        ).set_parser_name("unordered sql")

        with NO_WHITESPACE:

            def mult(tokens):
                amount = tokens["bytes"]
                scale = tokens["scale"].lower()
                return {
                    "bytes": amount
                    * {"b": 1, "k": 1_000, "m": 1_000_000, "g": 1_000_000_000}[scale]
                }

            ts_bytes = (
                (real_num | int_num)("bytes") + Char("bBkKmMgG")("scale")
            ) / mult

        tablesample = assign(
            "tablesample",
            LB
            + (
                (
                    keyword("bucket")("op")
                    + int_num("params")
                    + keyword("out of")
                    + int_num("params")
                    + Optional(ON + expr("on"))
                )
                / to_json_call
                | (real_num | int_num)("percent") + keyword("percent")
                | int_num("rows") + keyword("rows")
                | ts_bytes
            )
            + RB,
        )

        table_source << Group(
            ((LB + query + RB) | stack | call_function | var_name)("value")
            + Optional(flag("with ordinality"))
            + Optional(WITH + LB + keyword("nolock")("hint") + RB)
            + Optional(tablesample)
            + alias
        ).set_parser_name("table_source") / to_table

        rows = Optional(keyword("row") | keyword("rows"))
        limit = (
            Optional(assign("offset", expr) + rows)
            & Optional(
                FETCH
                + Optional(keyword("first") | keyword("next"))
                + expr("fetch")
                + rows
                + Optional(keyword("only"))
            )
            & Optional(assign("limit", expr))
        )

        ordered_sql = (
            (
                (unordered_sql | (LB + query + RB))
                + ZeroOrMore(
                    Group(
                        (UNION | INTERSECT | EXCEPT | MINUS) + Optional(ALL | DISTINCT)
                    )("op")
                    + (unordered_sql | (LB + query + RB))
                )
            )("union")
            + Optional(ORDER_BY + delimited_list(Group(sort_column))("orderby"))
            + limit
        ).set_parser_name("ordered sql") / to_union_call

        with_expr = delimited_list(Group(
            (
                (var_name("name") + Optional(LB + delimited_list(ident("col")) + RB))
                / to_alias
            )("name")
            + (AS + LB + (query | expr)("value") + RB)
        ))

        query << (
            Optional(assign("with recursive", with_expr) | assign("with", with_expr))
            + Group(ordered_sql)("query")
        ) / to_query

        #####################################################################
        # DML STATEMENTS
        #####################################################################

        # MySQL's index_type := Using + ( "BTREE" | "HASH" )
        index_type = Optional(assign("using", ident("index_type")))

        index_column_names = LB + delimited_list(var_name("columns")) + RB

        column_def_delete = assign(
            "on delete",
            (keyword("cascade") | keyword("set null") | keyword("set default")),
        )

        table_def_foreign_key = FOREIGN_KEY + Optional(
            Optional(var_name("index_name"))
            + index_column_names
            + column_def_references
            + Optional(column_def_delete)
        )

        index_options = ZeroOrMore(var_name)("table_constraint_options")

        table_constraint_definition = Optional(CONSTRAINT + var_name("name")) + (
            assign("primary key", index_type + index_column_names + index_options)
            | (
                Optional(flag("unique"))
                + Optional(INDEX | KEY)
                + Optional(var_name("name"))
                + index_type
                + index_column_names
                + index_options
            )("index")
            | assign("check", LB + expr + RB)
            | table_def_foreign_key("foreign_key")
        )

        table_element = (
            column_definition("columns") | table_constraint_definition("constraint")
        )

        create_table = (
            keyword("create")
            + Optional(keyword("or") + flag("replace"))
            + Optional(flag("temporary"))
            + TABLE
            + Optional((keyword("if not exists") / (lambda: False))("replace"))
            + var_name("name")
            + Optional(LB + delimited_list(table_element) + RB)
            + ZeroOrMore(
                assign("engine", EQ + var_name)
                | assign("collate", EQ + var_name)
                | assign("auto_increment", EQ + int_num)
                | assign("comment", EQ + literal_string)
                | assign("default character set", EQ + var_name)
                | assign("default charset", EQ + var_name)
            )
            + Optional(AS.suppress() + infix_notation(query, [])("query"))
        )("create table")

        create_view = (
            keyword("create")
            + Optional(keyword("or") + flag("replace"))
            + Optional(flag("temporary"))
            + VIEW.suppress()
            + Optional((keyword("if not exists") / (lambda: False))("replace"))
            + var_name("name")
            + AS
            + query("query")
        )("create view")

        #  CREATE INDEX a ON u USING btree (e);
        create_index = (
            keyword("create index")
            + Optional(keyword("or") + flag("replace"))(INDEX | KEY)
            + Optional((keyword("if not exists") / (lambda: False))("replace"))
            + var_name("name")
            + ON
            + var_name("table")
            + index_type
            + index_column_names
            + index_options
        )("create index")

        cache_options = Optional((
            keyword("options").suppress()
            + LB
            + Dict(delimited_list(Group(
                literal_string / (lambda tokens: tokens[0]["literal"])
                + Optional(EQ)
                + var_name
            )))
            + RB
        )("options"))

        create_cache = (
            keyword("cache").suppress()
            + Optional(flag("lazy"))
            + TABLE
            + var_name("name")
            + cache_options
            + Optional(AS + query("query"))
        )("cache")

        drop_table = (
            keyword("drop table") + Optional(flag("if exists")) + var_name("table")
        )("drop")

        drop_view = (
            keyword("drop view") + Optional(flag("if exists")) + var_name("view")
        )("drop")

        drop_index = (
            keyword("drop index") + Optional(flag("if exists")) + var_name("index")
        )("drop")

        insert = (
            keyword("insert").suppress()
            + (
                flag("overwrite") + keyword("table").suppress()
                | keyword("into").suppress() + Optional(keyword("table").suppress())
            )
            + var_name("table")
            + Optional(LB + delimited_list(var_name)("columns") + RB)
            + Optional(flag("if exists"))
            + (values | query)("query")
        ) / to_insert_call

        update = (
            keyword("update")("op")
            + var_name("params")
            + assign("set", Dict(delimited_list(Group(var_name + EQ + expr))))
            + Optional(assign("where", expr))
        ) / to_json_call

        delete = (
            keyword("delete")("op")
            + keyword("from").suppress()
            + var_name("params")
            + Optional(assign("where", expr))
        ) / to_json_call

        return (
            query
            | (insert | update | delete)
            | (create_table | create_view | create_cache | create_index)
            | (drop_table | drop_view | drop_index)
        ).finalize()
```

**code file end: mo_sql_parsing/sql_parser.py**

### code file start: mo_sql_parsing/types.py 

```python
# encoding: utf-8
#
# This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public
# License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this file,
# You can obtain one at http://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/.
#
# Contact: Kyle Lahnakoski (kyle@lahnakoski.com)
#


# KNOWN TYPES
from mo_parsing import Forward, Group, Optional, MatchFirst, Literal, ZeroOrMore, export
from mo_parsing.infix import delimited_list, RIGHT_ASSOC, LEFT_ASSOC

from mo_sql_parsing.keywords import (
    RB,
    LB,
    NEG,
    NOT,
    BINARY_NOT,
    NULL,
    EQ,
    KNOWN_OPS,
    LT,
    GT,
)
from mo_sql_parsing.utils import (
    keyword,
    to_json_call,
    int_num,
    ansi_string,
    ansi_ident,
    assign,
    flag,
)

_size = Optional(LB + int_num("params") + RB)
_sizes = Optional(LB + delimited_list(int_num("params")) + RB)

simple_types = Forward()

BIGINT = (
    Group(keyword("bigint")("op") + Optional(_size) + Optional(flag("unsigned")))
    / to_json_call
)
BOOL = Group(keyword("bool")("op")) / to_json_call
BOOLEAN = Group(keyword("boolean")("op")) / to_json_call
DOUBLE = Group(keyword("double")("op") + Optional(flag("unsigned"))) / to_json_call
FLOAT64 = Group(keyword("float64")("op")) / to_json_call
FLOAT = Group(keyword("float")("op") + Optional(flag("unsigned"))) / to_json_call
GEOMETRY = Group(keyword("geometry")("op")) / to_json_call
INTEGER = Group(keyword("integer")("op") + Optional(flag("unsigned"))) / to_json_call
INT = (keyword("int")("op") + _size + Optional(flag("unsigned"))) / to_json_call
INT32 = Group(keyword("int32")("op")) / to_json_call
INT64 = Group(keyword("int64")("op")) / to_json_call
REAL = Group(keyword("real")("op") + Optional(flag("unsigned"))) / to_json_call
TEXT = Group(keyword("text")("op")) / to_json_call
SMALLINT = Group(keyword("smallint")("op") + Optional(flag("unsigned"))) / to_json_call
STRING = Group(keyword("string")("op")) / to_json_call

BLOB = (keyword("blob")("op") + _size) / to_json_call
BYTES = (keyword("bytes")("op") + _size) / to_json_call
CHAR = (keyword("char")("op") + _size) / to_json_call
NCHAR = (keyword("nchar")("op") + _size) / to_json_call
VARCHAR = (keyword("varchar")("op") + _size) / to_json_call
VARCHAR2 = (keyword("varchar2")("op") + _size) / to_json_call
VARBINARY = (keyword("varbinary")("op") + _size) / to_json_call
TINYINT = (keyword("tinyint")("op") + _size + Optional(flag("unsigned"))) / to_json_call
UUID = Group(keyword("uuid")("op")) / to_json_call

DECIMAL = (keyword("decimal")("op") + _sizes) / to_json_call
DOUBLE_PRECISION = (
    Group((keyword("double precision") / (lambda: "double_precision"))("op"))
    / to_json_call
)
NUMERIC = (keyword("numeric")("op") + _sizes) / to_json_call
NUMBER = (keyword("number")("op") + _sizes) / to_json_call

MAP_TYPE = (
    keyword("map")("op") + LB + delimited_list(simple_types("params")) + RB
) / to_json_call
ARRAY_TYPE = (keyword("array")("op") + LB + simple_types("params") + RB) / to_json_call

DATE = keyword("date")
DATETIME = keyword("datetime")
DATETIME_W_TIMEZONE = keyword("datetime with time zone")
TIME = keyword("time")
TIMESTAMP = keyword("timestamp")
TIMESTAMP_W_TIMEZONE = keyword("timestamp with time zone")
TIMESTAMPTZ = keyword("timestamptz")
TIMETZ = keyword("timetz")

time_functions = DATE | DATETIME | TIME | TIMESTAMP | TIMESTAMPTZ | TIMETZ

# KNOWNN TIME TYPES
_format = Optional((ansi_string | ansi_ident)("params"))

DATE_TYPE = (DATE("op") + _format) / to_json_call
DATETIME_TYPE = (DATETIME("op") + _format) / to_json_call
DATETIME_W_TIMEZONE_TYPE = (DATETIME_W_TIMEZONE("op") + _format) / to_json_call
TIME_TYPE = (TIME("op") + _format) / to_json_call
TIMESTAMP_TYPE = (TIMESTAMP("op") + _format) / to_json_call
TIMESTAMP_W_TIMEZONE_TYPE = (TIMESTAMP_W_TIMEZONE("op") + _format) / to_json_call
TIMESTAMPTZ_TYPE = (TIMESTAMPTZ("op") + _format) / to_json_call
TIMETZ_TYPE = (TIMETZ("op") + _format) / to_json_call

simple_types << MatchFirst([
    ARRAY_TYPE,
    BIGINT,
    BOOL,
    BOOLEAN,
    BLOB,
    BYTES,
    CHAR,
    DATE_TYPE,
    DATETIME_W_TIMEZONE_TYPE,
    DATETIME_TYPE,
    DECIMAL,
    DOUBLE_PRECISION,
    DOUBLE,
    FLOAT64,
    FLOAT,
    GEOMETRY,
    MAP_TYPE,
    INTEGER,
    INT,
    INT32,
    INT64,
    NCHAR,
    NUMBER,
    NUMERIC,
    REAL,
    TEXT,
    SMALLINT,
    STRING,
    TIME_TYPE,
    TIMESTAMP_W_TIMEZONE_TYPE,
    TIMESTAMP_TYPE,
    TIMESTAMPTZ_TYPE,
    TIMETZ_TYPE,
    TINYINT,
    UUID,
    VARCHAR,
    VARCHAR2,
    VARBINARY,
])

CASTING = (Literal("::").suppress() + simple_types("params")).set_parser_name("cast")
KNOWN_OPS.insert(0, CASTING)

unary_ops = {
    NEG: RIGHT_ASSOC,
    NOT: RIGHT_ASSOC,
    BINARY_NOT: RIGHT_ASSOC,
    CASTING: LEFT_ASSOC,
}


def get_column_type(expr, var_name, literal_string):
    column_definition = Forward()
    column_type = Forward().set_parser_name("column type")

    struct_type = (
        keyword("struct")("op")
        + LT.suppress()
        + Group(delimited_list(column_definition))("params")
        + GT.suppress()
    ) / to_json_call

    row_type = (
        keyword("row")("op")
        + LB
        + Group(delimited_list(column_definition))("params")
        + RB
    ) / to_json_call

    array_type = (
        keyword("array")("op")
        + (
            (
                LT.suppress()
                + Group(delimited_list(column_type))("params")
                + GT.suppress()
            )
            | (LB + Group(delimited_list(column_type))("params") + RB)
        )
    ) / to_json_call

    column_type << (struct_type | row_type | array_type | simple_types)

    column_def_identity = (
        assign(
            "generated",
            (keyword("always") | keyword("by default") / (lambda: "by_default")),
        )
        + keyword("as identity").suppress()
        + Optional(assign("start with", int_num))
        + Optional(assign("increment by", int_num))
    )

    column_def_references = assign(
        "references", var_name("table") + LB + delimited_list(var_name)("columns") + RB,
    )

    column_options = ZeroOrMore(
        ((NOT + NULL) / (lambda: False))("nullable")
        | (NULL / (lambda t: True))("nullable")
        | flag("unique")
        | flag("auto_increment")
        | assign("comment", literal_string)
        | assign("collate", Optional(EQ) + var_name)
        | flag("primary key")
        | column_def_identity("identity")
        | column_def_references
        | assign("check", LB + expr + RB)
        | assign("default", expr)
    ).set_parser_name("column_options")

    column_definition << Group(
        var_name("name") + (column_type | var_name)("type") + column_options
    ).set_parser_name("column_definition")

    return column_type, column_definition, column_def_references


export("mo_sql_parsing.utils", unary_ops)
```

**code file end: mo_sql_parsing/types.py**

### code file start: mo_sql_parsing/utils.py 

```python
# encoding: utf-8
#
# This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public
# License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this file,
# You can obtain one at http://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/.
#
# Contact: Kyle Lahnakoski (kyle@lahnakoski.com)
#

import ast
import sys

from mo_dots import is_data, is_null, Data, from_data, literal_field
from mo_future import text, number_types, binary_type, flatten
from mo_imports import expect
from mo_parsing import *
from mo_parsing.utils import is_number, listwrap

unary_ops = expect("unary_ops")


class Call(object):
    __slots__ = ["op", "args", "kwargs"]

    def __init__(self, op, args, kwargs):
        self.op = op
        self.args = args
        self.kwargs = kwargs


IDENT_CHAR = Regex("[@_$0-9A-Za-zГҖ-Г–Гҳ-Г¶Гё-Жҝ]").expr.parser_config.include
FIRST_IDENT_CHAR = "".join(set(IDENT_CHAR) - set("0123456789"))
SQL_NULL = Call("null", [], {})

null_locations = []


def keyword(keywords):
    return And([
        Keyword(k, caseless=True) for k in keywords.split(" ")
    ]).set_parser_name(keywords) / (lambda: keywords.replace(" ", "_"))


def flag(keywords):
    """
    RETURN {keywords: True}
    """
    return (keyword(keywords) / (lambda: True))(keywords.replace(" ", "_"))


def assign(key: str, value: ParserElement):
    return keyword(key).suppress() + value(key.replace(" ", "_"))


def simple_op(op, args, kwargs):
    if args is None:
        kwargs[op] = {}
    else:
        kwargs[op] = args
    return kwargs


def normal_op(op, args, kwargs):
    output = Data(op=op)
    args = listwrap(args)
    if args and (not isinstance(args[0], dict) or args[0]):
        output.args = args
    if kwargs:
        output.kwargs = kwargs
    return from_data(output)


scrub_op = simple_op


def scrub(result):
    if result is SQL_NULL:
        return SQL_NULL
    elif result == None:
        return None
    elif isinstance(result, text):
        return result
    elif isinstance(result, binary_type):
        return result.decode("utf8")
    elif isinstance(result, number_types):
        return result
    elif isinstance(result, Call):
        kwargs = scrub(result.kwargs)
        args = scrub(result.args)
        if args is SQL_NULL:
            null_locations.append((kwargs, result.op))
        return scrub_op(result.op, args, kwargs)
    elif isinstance(result, dict) and not result:
        return result
    elif isinstance(result, list):
        output = [rr for r in result for rr in [scrub(r)]]

        if not output:
            return None
        elif len(output) == 1:
            return output[0]
        else:
            for i, v in enumerate(output):
                if v is SQL_NULL:
                    null_locations.append((output, i))
            return output
    else:
        # ATTEMPT A DICT INTERPRETATION
        try:
            kv_pairs = list(result.items())
        except Exception as c:
            print(c)
        output = {k: vv for k, v in kv_pairs for vv in [scrub(v)] if not is_null(vv)}
        if isinstance(result, dict) or output:
            for k, v in output.items():
                if v is SQL_NULL:
                    null_locations.append((output, k))
            return output
        return scrub(list(result))


def _chunk(values, size):
    acc = []
    for v in values:
        acc.append(v)
        if len(acc) == size:
            yield acc
            acc = []
    if acc:
        yield acc


def to_lambda(tokens):
    params, op, expr = list(tokens)
    return Call("lambda", [expr], {"params": list(params)})


def to_json_operator(tokens):
    # ARRANGE INTO {op: params} FORMAT
    length = len(tokens.tokens)
    if length == 2:
        if tokens.tokens[1].type.parser_name == "cast":
            return Call("cast", list(tokens), {})
        # UNARY OPERATOR
        op = tokens.tokens[0].type.parser_name
        if op == "neg" and is_number(tokens[1]):
            return -tokens[1]
        return Call(op, [tokens[1]], {})
    elif length == 5:
        # TRINARY OPERATOR
        return Call(
            tokens.tokens[1].type.parser_name, [tokens[0], tokens[2], tokens[4]], {}
        )

    op = tokens[1]
    if not isinstance(op, text):
        op = op.type.parser_name
    op = binary_ops.get(op, op)
    if op == "eq":
        if tokens[2] is SQL_NULL:
            return Call("missing", tokens[0], {})
        elif tokens[0] is SQL_NULL:
            return Call("missing", tokens[2], {})
    elif op == "neq":
        if tokens[2] is SQL_NULL:
            return Call("exists", tokens[0], {})
        elif tokens[0] is SQL_NULL:
            return Call("exists", tokens[2], {})
    elif op == "eq!":
        if tokens[2] is SQL_NULL:
            return Call("missing", tokens[0], {})
        elif tokens[0] is SQL_NULL:
            return Call("missing", tokens[2], {})
    elif op == "ne!":
        if tokens[2] is SQL_NULL:
            return Call("exists", tokens[0], {})
        elif tokens[0] is SQL_NULL:
            return Call("exists", tokens[2], {})
    elif op == "is":
        if tokens[2] is SQL_NULL:
            return Call("missing", tokens[0], {})
        else:
            return Call("exists", tokens[0], {})
    elif op == "is_not":
        if tokens[2] is SQL_NULL:
            return Call("exists", tokens[0], {})
        else:
            return Call("missing", tokens[0], {})

    operands = [tokens[0], tokens[2]]
    binary_op = Call(op, operands, {})

    if op in {"add", "mul", "and", "or"}:
        # ASSOCIATIVE OPERATORS
        acc = []
        for operand in operands:
            while isinstance(operand, ParseResults) and isinstance(operand.type, Group):
                # PARENTHESES CAUSE EXTRA GROUP LAYERS
                operand = operand[0]
                if isinstance(operand, ParseResults) and isinstance(
                    operand.type, Forward
                ):
                    operand = operand[0]

            if isinstance(operand, Call) and operand.op == op:
                acc.extend(operand.args)
            elif isinstance(operand, list):
                acc.append(operand)
            elif isinstance(operand, dict) and operand.get(op):
                acc.extend(operand.get(op))
            else:
                acc.append(operand)
        binary_op = Call(op, acc, {})
    return binary_op


def to_offset(tokens):
    expr, offset = tokens.tokens
    return Call("get", [expr, offset], {})


def to_window_mod(tokens):
    expr, window = tokens.tokens
    return Call("value", [expr], {**window})


def to_tuple_call(tokens):
    # IS THIS ONE VALUE IN (), OR MANY?
    tokens = list(tokens)
    if len(tokens) == 1:
        return [tokens[0]]
    if all(isinstance(r, number_types) for r in tokens):
        return [tokens]
    if all(
        isinstance(r, number_types) or (is_data(r) and "literal" in r.keys())
        for r in tokens
    ):
        candidate = {"literal": [r["literal"] if is_data(r) else r for r in tokens]}
        return candidate

    return [tokens]


binary_ops = {
    "::": "cast",
    "COLLATE": "collate",
    "||": "concat",
    "*": "mul",
    "/": "div",
    "%": "mod",
    "+": "add",
    "-": "sub",
    "&": "binary_and",
    "|": "binary_or",
    "<": "lt",
    "<=": "lte",
    ">": "gt",
    ">=": "gte",
    "=": "eq",
    "==": "eq",
    "is distinct from": "eq!",  # https://sparkbyexamples.com/apache-hive/hive-relational-arithmetic-logical-operators/
    "is_distinct_from": "eq!",
    "is not distinct from": "ne!",
    "is_not_distinct_from": "ne!",
    "<=>": "eq!",  # https://sparkbyexamples.com/apache-hive/hive-relational-arithmetic-logical-operators/
    "!=": "neq",
    "<>": "neq",
    "not in": "nin",
    "in": "in",
    "is_not": "neq",
    "is": "eq",
    "similar_to": "similar_to",
    "like": "like",
    "rlike": "rlike",
    "not like": "not_like",
    "not_like": "not_like",
    "not rlike": "not_rlike",
    "not_rlike": "not_rlike",
    "not_simlilar_to": "not_similar_to",
    "or": "or",
    "and": "and",
    "->": "lambda",
    "union": "union",
    "union_all": "union_all",
    "union all": "union_all",
    "except": "except",
    "minus": "minus",
    "intersect": "intersect",
}

is_set_op = ("union", "union_all", "except", "minus", "intersect")


def to_trim_call(tokens):
    frum = tokens["from"]
    if not frum:
        return Call("trim", [tokens["chars"]], {"direction": tokens["direction"]})
    return Call(
        "trim",
        [frum],
        {"characters": tokens["chars"], "direction": tokens["direction"]},
    )


def to_json_call(tokens):
    # ARRANGE INTO {op: params} FORMAT
    op = tokens["op"].lower()
    op = binary_ops.get(op, op)
    params = tokens["params"]
    if isinstance(params, (dict, str, int, Call)):
        args = [params]
    else:
        args = list(params)

    kwargs = {k: v for k, v in tokens.items() if k not in ("op", "params")}

    return ParseResults(
        tokens.type,
        tokens.start,
        tokens.end,
        [Call(op, args, kwargs)],
        tokens.failures,
    )


def to_interval_call(tokens):
    # ARRANGE INTO {interval: [amount, type]} FORMAT
    params = tokens["params"]
    if not params:
        params = {}
    if params.length() == 2:
        return Call("interval", params, {})

    return Call("add", [Call("interval", p, {}) for p in _chunk(params, size=2)], {})


def to_case_call(tokens):
    cases = list(tokens["case"])
    elze = tokens["else"]
    if elze != None:
        cases.append(elze)
    return Call("case", cases, {})


def to_switch_call(tokens):
    # CONVERT TO CLASSIC CASE STATEMENT
    value = tokens["value"]
    acc = []
    for c in list(tokens["case"]):
        acc.append(Call("when", [Call("eq", [value] + c.args, {})], c.kwargs))
    elze = tokens["else"]
    if elze != None:
        acc.append(elze)
    return Call("case", acc, {})


def to_when_call(tokens):
    tok = tokens
    return Call("when", [tok["when"]], {"then": tok["then"]})


def to_join_call(tokens):
    op = " ".join(tokens["op"])
    if tokens["join"]["name"]:
        output = {op: {
            "name": tokens["join"]["name"],
            "value": tokens["join"]["value"],
        }}
    else:
        output = {op: tokens["join"]}

    output["on"] = tokens["on"]
    output["using"] = tokens["using"]
    return output


def to_expression_call(tokens):
    if set(tokens.keys()) & {"over", "within", "filter"}:
        return

    return ParseResults(
        tokens.type,
        tokens.start,
        tokens.end,
        listwrap(tokens["value"]),
        tokens.failures,
    )


def to_over(tokens):
    if not tokens:
        return {}


def to_alias(tokens):
    cols = tokens["col"]
    name = tokens["name"]
    if cols:
        return {name: cols}
    return name


def to_top_clause(tokens):
    value = tokens["value"]
    if not value:
        return None

    value = value.value()
    if tokens["ties"]:
        output = {}
        output["ties"] = True
        if tokens["percent"]:
            output["percent"] = value
        else:
            output["value"] = value
        return output
    elif tokens["percent"]:
        return {"percent": value}
    else:
        return [value]


def to_row(tokens):
    columns = list(tokens)
    if len(columns) > 1:
        return {"select": [{"value": v[0]} for v in columns]}
    else:
        return {"select": {"value": columns[0]}}


def get_literal(value):
    if isinstance(value, (int, float)):
        return value
    elif isinstance(value, Call):
        return
    elif value is SQL_NULL:
        return value
    elif "literal" in value:
        return value["literal"]


def to_values(tokens):
    rows = list(tokens)
    if len(rows) > 1:
        values = [
            [get_literal(s["value"]) for s in listwrap(row["select"])] for row in rows
        ]
        if all(flatten(values)):
            return {"from": {"literal": values}}
        return {"union_all": list(tokens)}
    else:
        return rows


def to_stack(tokens):
    width = tokens["width"]
    args = listwrap(tokens["args"])
    return Call("stack", args, {"width": width})


def to_array(tokens):
    types = list(tokens["type"])
    args = list(tokens["args"])
    output = Call("create_array", args, {})
    if types:
        output = Call("cast", [output, Call("array", types, {})], {})
    return output


def to_map(tokens):
    keys = tokens["keys"]
    values = tokens["values"]
    return Call("create_map", [keys, values], {})


def to_struct(tokens):
    types = list(tokens["types"])
    args = list(d for a in tokens["args"] for d in [a if a["name"] else a["value"]])

    output = Call("create_struct", args, {})
    if types:
        output = Call("cast", [output, Call("struct", types, {})], {})
    return output


def to_select_call(tokens):
    expr = tokens["value"]
    if expr == "*":
        return ["*"]
    try:
        call = expr[0][0]
        if call.op == "value":
            return {"name": tokens["name"], "value": call.args, **call.kwargs}
    except:
        pass


def to_union_call(tokens):
    unions = tokens["union"]
    if isinstance(unions, dict):
        return unions
    elif unions.type.parser_name == "unordered sql":
        output = {k: v for k, v in unions.items()}  # REMOVE THE Group()
    else:
        unions = list(unions)
        sources = [unions[i] for i in range(0, len(unions), 2)]
        operators = ["_".join(unions[i]) for i in range(1, len(unions), 2)]
        acc = sources[0]
        last_union = None
        for op, so in list(zip(operators, sources[1:])):
            if op == last_union and "union" in op:
                acc[op] = acc[op] + [so]
            else:
                acc = {op: [acc, so]}
            last_union = op

        if not tokens["orderby"] and not tokens["offset"] and not tokens["limit"]:
            return acc
        else:
            output = {"from": acc}

    output["orderby"] = tokens["orderby"]
    output["limit"] = tokens["limit"]
    output["offset"] = tokens["offset"]
    output["fetch"] = tokens["fetch"]
    return output


def to_insert_call(tokens):
    options = {
        k: v for k, v in tokens.items() if k not in ["columns", "table", "query"]
    }
    query = tokens["query"]
    columns = tokens["columns"]
    try:
        values = query["from"]["literal"]
        if values:
            if columns:
                data = [dict(zip(columns, row)) for row in values]
                return Call("insert", [tokens["table"]], {"values": data, **options})
            else:
                return Call("insert", [tokens["table"]], {"values": values, **options})
    except Exception:
        pass

    return Call(
        "insert", [tokens["table"]], {"columns": columns, "query": query, **options}
    )


def to_query(tokens):
    output = tokens["query"][0]
    try:
        output["with"] = tokens["with"]
        output["with_recursive"] = tokens["with_recursive"]

        return output
    except Exception as cause:
        return


def to_table(tokens):
    output = dict(tokens)
    if len(list(output.keys())) > 1:
        return output
    else:
        return output["value"]


def single_literal(tokens):
    val = tokens[0]
    val = "'" + val[1:-1].replace("''", "\\'") + "'"
    return {"literal": ast.literal_eval(val)}
    # return ast.literal_eval(val)


def double_literal(tokens):
    val = tokens[0]
    val = '"' + val[1:-1].replace('""', '\\"') + '"'
    return {"literal": ast.literal_eval(val)}
    # return ast.literal_eval(val)

# TODO: SET TO TRUE TO ENABLE DOUBLE-QUOTE WARNING. NOT SURE IF True IS A GOOD DEFAULT
emit_warning_for_double_quotes = False


def double_column(tokens):
    global emit_warning_for_double_quotes
    if emit_warning_for_double_quotes:
        emit_warning_for_double_quotes = False
        sys.stderr.write(
            """Double quotes are used to quote column names, not literal strings.  To hide this message: mo_sql_parsing.utils.emit_warning_for_double_quotes = False"""
        )

    val = tokens[0]
    val = '"' + val[1:-1].replace('""', '\\"') + '"'
    un = literal_field(ast.literal_eval(val))
    return un


def backtick_column(tokens):
    val = tokens[0]
    val = '"' + val[1:-1].replace("``", "`").replace('"', '\\"') + '"'
    un = literal_field(ast.literal_eval(val))
    return un


def square_column(tokens):
    val = tokens[0]
    val = '"' + val[1:-1].replace("]]", "]").replace('"', '\\"') + '"'
    un = literal_field(ast.literal_eval(val))
    return un


# NUMBERS
real_num = (
    Regex(r"[+-]?(\d+\.\d*|\.\d+)([eE][+-]?\d+)?").set_parser_name("float")
    / (lambda t: float(t[0]))
)


def parse_int(tokens):
    if "e" in tokens[0].lower():
        return int(float(tokens[0]))
    else:
        return int(tokens[0])


int_num = Regex(r"[+-]?\d+([eE]\+?\d+)?").set_parser_name("int") / parse_int
hex_num = (
    Regex(r"0x[0-9a-fA-F]+").set_parser_name("hex") / (lambda t: {"hex": t[0][2:]})
)

# STRINGS
ansi_string = Regex(r"\'(\'\'|[^'])*\'") / single_literal
mysql_doublequote_string = Regex(r'\"(\"\"|[^"])*\"') / double_literal

# BASIC IDENTIFIERS
ansi_ident = Regex(r'\"(\"\"|[^"])*\"') / double_column
mysql_backtick_ident = Regex(r"\`(\`\`|[^`])*\`") / backtick_column
sqlserver_ident = Regex(r"\[(\]\]|[^\]])*\]") / square_column
```

**code file end: mo_sql_parsing/utils.py**

### code file start: mo_sql_parsing/windows.py 

```python
# encoding: utf-8
#
# This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public
# License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this file,
# You can obtain one at http://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/.
#
# Contact: Kyle Lahnakoski (kyle@lahnakoski.com)
#

from __future__ import absolute_import, division, unicode_literals

from mo_parsing.infix import delimited_list

from mo_sql_parsing.keywords import *
from mo_sql_parsing.utils import *


# https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/sql/t-sql/queries/select-over-clause-transact-sql?view=sql-server-ver15


def _to_bound_call(tokens):
    zero = tokens["zero"]
    if zero:
        return {"min": 0, "max": 0}

    direction = scrub(tokens["direction"])
    limit = scrub(tokens["limit"])
    if direction == "preceding":
        if limit == "unbounded":
            return {"max": 0}
        elif is_data(limit):
            return {"min": {"neg": limit}, "max": 0}
        else:
            return {"min": -limit, "max": 0}
    else:  # following
        if limit == "unbounded":
            return {"min": 0}
        elif is_data(limit):
            return {"min": {"neg": limit}, "max": 0}
        else:
            return {"min": 0, "max": limit}


def _to_between_call(tokens):
    minn = scrub(tokens["min"])
    maxx = scrub(tokens["max"])

    if maxx.get("max") == 0:
        # following
        return {
            "min": minn.get("min"),
            "max": maxx.get("min"),
        }
    elif minn.get("min") == 0:
        # preceding
        return {"min": minn.get("max"), "max": maxx.get("max")}
    else:
        return {
            "min": minn.get("min"),
            "max": maxx.get("max"),
        }


UNBOUNDED = keyword("unbounded")
PRECEDING = keyword("preceding")
FOLLOWING = keyword("following")
CURRENT_ROW = keyword("current row")
ROWS = keyword("rows")
RANGE = keyword("range")


def window(expr, var_name, sort_column):
    bound_row = (
        CURRENT_ROW("zero")
        | (UNBOUNDED | int_num)("limit") + (PRECEDING | FOLLOWING)("direction")
    ) / _to_bound_call
    bound_expr = (
        CURRENT_ROW("zero")
        | (UNBOUNDED | expr)("limit") + (PRECEDING | FOLLOWING)("direction")
    ) / _to_bound_call
    between_row = (
        BETWEEN + bound_row("min") + AND + bound_row("max")
    ) / _to_between_call
    between_expr = (
        BETWEEN + bound_expr("min") + AND + bound_expr("max")
    ) / _to_between_call

    row_clause = (ROWS.suppress() + (between_row | bound_row)) | (
        RANGE.suppress() + (between_expr | bound_expr)
    )

    over_clause = (
        LB
        + Optional(PARTITION_BY + delimited_list(Group(expr))("partitionby"))
        + Optional(ORDER_BY + delimited_list(Group(sort_column))("orderby"))
        + Optional(row_clause("range"))
        + RB
    )

    window_clause = Optional((
        WITHIN_GROUP
        + LB
        + Optional(ORDER_BY + delimited_list(Group(sort_column))("orderby"))
        + RB
    )("within")) + ((OVER + (over_clause | var_name) / to_over)("over"))

    return window_clause, over_clause
```

**code file end: mo_sql_parsing/windows.py**

### code file start: mo_sql_parsing/__init__.py 

```python
# encoding: utf-8
#
# This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public
# License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this file,
# You can obtain one at http://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/.
#
# Contact: Kyle Lahnakoski (kyle@lahnakoski.com)
#

from __future__ import absolute_import, division, unicode_literals

import json
from threading import Lock

from mo_sql_parsing.sql_parser import scrub
from mo_sql_parsing.utils import ansi_string, simple_op, normal_op

parse_locker = Lock()  # ENSURE ONLY ONE PARSING AT A TIME
common_parser = None
mysql_parser = None
sqlserver_parser = None

SQL_NULL = {"null": {}}


def parse(sql, null=SQL_NULL, calls=simple_op):
    """
    :param sql: String of SQL
    :param null: What value to use as NULL (default is the null function `{"null":{}}`)
    :return: parse tree
    """
    global common_parser

    with parse_locker:
        if not common_parser:
            common_parser = sql_parser.common_parser()
        result = _parse(common_parser, sql, null, calls)
        return result


def parse_mysql(sql, null=SQL_NULL, calls=simple_op):
    """
    PARSE MySQL ASSUME DOUBLE QUOTED STRINGS ARE LITERALS
    :param sql: String of SQL
    :param null: What value to use as NULL (default is the null function `{"null":{}}`)
    :return: parse tree
    """
    global mysql_parser

    with parse_locker:
        if not mysql_parser:
            mysql_parser = sql_parser.mysql_parser()
        return _parse(mysql_parser, sql, null, calls)


def parse_sqlserver(sql, null=SQL_NULL, calls=simple_op):
    """
    PARSE MySQL ASSUME DOUBLE QUOTED STRINGS ARE LITERALS
    :param sql: String of SQL
    :param null: What value to use as NULL (default is the null function `{"null":{}}`)
    :return: parse tree
    """
    global sqlserver_parser

    with parse_locker:
        if not sqlserver_parser:
            sqlserver_parser = sql_parser.sqlserver_parser()
        return _parse(sqlserver_parser, sql, null, calls)


parse_bigquery = parse_mysql


def _parse(parser, sql, null, calls):
    utils.null_locations = []
    utils.scrub_op = calls
    sql = sql.rstrip().rstrip(";")
    parse_result = parser.parse_string(sql, parse_all=True)
    output = scrub(parse_result)
    for o, n in utils.null_locations:
        o[n] = null
    return output


def format(json, **kwargs):
    from mo_sql_parsing.formatting import Formatter

    return Formatter(**kwargs).dispatch(json)


_ = json.dumps

__all__ = ["parse", "format", "parse_mysql", "parse_bigquery", "normal_op", "simple_op"]
```

**code file end: mo_sql_parsing/__init__.py**

#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

from fastapi import APIRouter

from schemas.back_trace_consistency_schema import (
    BackTraceConsistencyListReq,
    BackTraceConsistencyListOut
)
from service.back_trace_service.consistency_rate_service import ConsistencyRateService

router = APIRouter(prefix="/meta/back_trace_consistency", tags=["Back trace consistency rate management interface"])


@router.post("/list", name="Get back trace consistency rate list", response_model=BackTraceConsistencyListOut, response_model_exclude_unset=True)
async def get_consistency_rate_list(list_req: BackTraceConsistencyListReq):
    """
    Get back trace feature consistency rate list with pagination
    
    Request example:
    ```json
    {
        "field_names": ["feature_1", "feature_2"],  // Optional: filter by field names
        "size": 10,                                 // Page size
        "page": 1                                   // Page number
    }
    ```
    
    Response example:
    ```json
    {
        "success": true,
        "code": 200,
        "data": {
            "total": 100,
            "list": [
                {
                    "id": 1,
                    "featue_name": "feature_1",
                    "after_fill_name": "domain___key__feature_1",
                    "consistency_rate": 0.9500,
                    "samples_cnt": 1000,
                    "create_time": 1640995200000,
                    "update_time": 1640995200000
                }
            ]
        }
    }
    ```
    
    Args:
        list_req: Request parameters including field_names, size, page
        
    Returns:
        BackTraceConsistencyListOut: Response with success, code, and data
    """
    payload = await ConsistencyRateService.get_consistency_rate_list(list_req)
    return BackTraceConsistencyListOut(success=True, code=200, data=payload) 
```

import asyncio

    CheckCaliberResponse, CheckCaliberResult, CaliberDetailResponse

    return ListResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)

    return AddCaliberResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)

    return DetailResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)

#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from fastapi import APIRouter

from common import errors
from schemas import domain_schema
from schemas.domain_schema import DomainSetStandardReq
from service.domain_service import DomainService

async def get_list(list_req: domain_schema.ListReq = None):
    payload = await DomainService.get_list(list_req)
    return domain_schema.ListResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post('/create', name='Add dimension information', response_model=domain_schema.ResponseBase)
async def create_domain(create_domain_req: domain_schema.CreateDomainReq):
    await DomainService.create_domain(create_domain_req)
    return domain_schema.ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)


@router.post('/check', name='Dimension verification', response_model=domain_schema.UnionDomainCheckResponse)
async def check_union_domain_exists(union_domain_req: domain_schema.UnionDomainReq):
    payload, tip = await DomainService.generate_define(union_domain_req.domains)
    if tip:
        raise errors.DomainExistsError(tip)
    return domain_schema.UnionDomainCheckResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.get('/domain_column', name='Get the corresponding field of the dimension', response_model=domain_schema.DomainColumnResponse)
async def get_domain_column(table_name: str, domain_name: str):
    payload = await DomainService.get_domain_column(table_name, domain_name)
    return domain_schema.DomainColumnResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.get('/basic_domain', name="Get basic dimensions", response_model=domain_schema.BasicDomainResponse)
async def get_basic_domain():
    payload = await DomainService().get_all_basic_domain()
    return domain_schema.BasicDomainResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post('/set_standard', name="set standard", response_model=domain_schema.ResponseBase)
async def set_standard(set_standard_req: DomainSetStandardReq):
    await DomainService.set_standard(set_standard_req)
    return domain_schema.ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)

### code file start: routers/feature_analysis_router.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Body
from starlette.responses import StreamingResponse

from internal.service.magic_cube_service import MagicCubeService
from schemas import ResponseBase, feature_analysis_schema
from schemas.feature_analysis_schema import FeatureScreenTaskResultListResponse
from service.feature_analysis_service import FeatureAnalysisService
from utils.time import timestamp

router = APIRouter(prefix="/meta/feature_analysis", tags=["feature_analysis"])

@router.get('/get_creator_list', name="Feature analysis task creator list", )
async def get_creator_list(creator:str=''):
    payload = await FeatureAnalysisService.get_creator_list(creator)
    return dict(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post('/get_list', name="Feature analysis task list", response_model=feature_analysis_schema.FeatureAnalysisTaskListResponse)
async def get_list(list_req: feature_analysis_schema.ListReq = None):
    payload = await FeatureAnalysisService.get_list(list_req)
    return feature_analysis_schema.FeatureAnalysisTaskListResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post('/feature_compare/create_task', name="Create a feature comparison task", response_model=ResponseBase)
async def create_feature_compare_task(create_req: feature_analysis_schema.CreateFeatureCompare = None):
    if create_req.domain_old == create_req.domain_new \
            and create_req.feature_old == create_req.feature_new \
            and create_req.url_old == create_req.url_new:
        return ResponseBase(success=False, code=1000, msg='The task creation failed. The characteristics of the control group and the experimental group are the same.')
    await FeatureAnalysisService.create_feature_compare_task(create_req)
    return ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)

@router.get('/feature_compare/task_result', name="Feature comparison task results", response_model=feature_analysis_schema.FeatureCompareTaskResultResponse)
async def feature_compare_task_result(task_id: int):
    payload = await FeatureAnalysisService.get_feature_compare_task_result(task_id)
    return feature_analysis_schema.FeatureCompareTaskResultResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)

@router.get('/feature_compare/inconsistent_example', name="Examples of inconsistent feature comparisons", response_model=feature_analysis_schema.FeatureCompareDetailExampleListResponse)
async def inconsistent_example(task_id: int):
    payload = await FeatureAnalysisService.inconsistent_example(task_id)
    return feature_analysis_schema.FeatureCompareDetailExampleListResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)

@router.post('/feature_screen/create_task', name="Create a feature troubleshooting task", response_model=ResponseBase)
async def create_feature_screen_task(create_req: feature_analysis_schema.CreateFeatureScreen = None):
    await FeatureAnalysisService.create_feature_screen_task(create_req)
    return ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)

@router.post('/feature_screen/task_result', name="Feature troubleshooting task results", response_model=FeatureScreenTaskResultListResponse)
async def feature_screen_task_result(list_req: feature_analysis_schema.FeatureScreenTaskResultListReq = None):
    payload = await FeatureAnalysisService.get_feature_screen_task_result(list_req)
    return feature_analysis_schema.FeatureScreenTaskResultListResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)

@router.post('/feature_screen/run_again', name="Re-execute the feature troubleshooting task", response_model=ResponseBase)
async def feature_screen_task_result(task_id: int = Body(None, embed=True)):
    await FeatureAnalysisService.execute_feature_screen_task(task_id)
    return ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)

@router.get('/feature_screen/task_result_download', name="Feature troubleshooting task export results")
async def task_result_download(task_id: int):
    content = await FeatureAnalysisService.download(task_id)
    base = 'Feature troubleshooting task results(id=%s)' % str(task_id)
    file_name = f'{base}-{timestamp()}'.encode('utf8').decode('latin-1')
    headers = {"content-type": "application/vnd.ms-excel", "content-disposition": f'attachment;filename={file_name}.xls'}
    return StreamingResponse(content, media_type="text/xlsx", headers=headers)


@router.post('/feature_kafka_trigger/create_task', name="Create a feature kafka trigger task", response_model=ResponseBase)
async def create_feature_kafka_trigger_task(create_req: feature_analysis_schema.CreateFeatureKafkaTriggerTaskPydantic = None):
    await FeatureAnalysisService.create_feature_kafka_trigger_task(create_req)
    return ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)

@router.get('/feature_kafka_trigger/task_summary', name="Feature kafka trigger task summary", 
response_model=feature_analysis_schema.FeatureKafkaTriggerTaskSummaryResponse)
async def feature_kafka_trigger_task_summary(task_id: int):
    payload = await FeatureAnalysisService.get_feature_kafka_trigger_task_summary(task_id)
    return feature_analysis_schema.FeatureKafkaTriggerTaskSummaryResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)

@router.get('/feature_kafka_trigger/task_detail_example', name="Feature kafka trigger task detail example", 
response_model=feature_analysis_schema.FeatureKafkaTriggerTaskDetailExampleListResponse)
async def feature_kafka_trigger_task_detail_example(task_id: int):
    payload = await FeatureAnalysisService.get_feature_kafka_trigger_task_detail_example(task_id)
    return feature_analysis_schema.FeatureKafkaTriggerTaskDetailExampleListResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Header

from common import constants
from schemas import CategoriesTreeResp, ResponseBase, feature_schema, press_schema
from schemas import t1_work_order_schema as t1_schema
from service.common_service.left_tree_builder import FeatureLeftTreeBuilder, SceneFeatureLeftTreeBuilder
from service.feature_task_service.feature_bind_task_service import FeatureBindTaskService
from service.feature_service.feature_service import FeatureService
from service.feature_service.feature_offline_service import FeatureOffLineService
from service.feature_service.feature_stat_service import FeatureStatService
from service.feature_service.scene_feature_service import SceneFeatureService
from service.feature_service.nonstandard_feature_service import NonstandardFeatureService
from service.press_test_service.press_test_report_service import PressTestReportService
from service.feature_service.generate_service import  GenerateDefineService
from service.feature_service.feature_query_service import FeatureQueryService

router = APIRouter(prefix="/meta/feature", tags=["Feature management interface"])


@router.get("/standard_meta", name="Standard feature list", response_model=feature_schema.ListResponse, response_model_exclude_none=True)
async def get_standard_list():
    payload = await FeatureService.get_standard_all()
    return feature_schema.ListResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post("/list", name="feature list", response_model=feature_schema.ListResponse, response_model_exclude_unset=True)
async def get_list(list_req: feature_schema.ListReq = None):
    if list_req and list_req.filter.is_scene:
        payload = await SceneFeatureService.get_list(list_req)
    else:
        payload = await FeatureService.get_list(list_req)
    return feature_schema.ListResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post("/my_feature_list", name="й©¬жқҘзү№еҫҒеҲ—иЎЁ", response_model=feature_schema.ListResponse)
async def get_my_feature_list(list_req: feature_schema.MyFeatureListReq = None):
    if list_req and list_req.filter.is_scene:
        payload = feature_schema.ListOut.parse_obj({'total': 0, 'list': []})
    else:
        payload = await FeatureService.get_my_feature_list(list_req)
    return feature_schema.ListResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.get("/test", name="Feature Details-Test Information", response_model=press_schema.PressTestResponse)
async def get_test(feature_id: int, feature_type: int = None):
    press_reports = await PressTestReportService(feature_ids=[feature_id], feature_type=feature_type).get_press_test_reports()
    payload = press_reports[0] if press_reports else []
    return press_schema.PressTestResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post("/press_details", name="Feature stress test information", response_model=press_schema.ListPressResponse)
async def get_press_details(req: feature_schema.ListPressDetailReq):
    feat_req = feature_schema.ListReq.parse_obj({'filter': {'domain_name': req.domain_name, 'feature_names': req.feature_names}})
    features = await FeatureService.get_list(feat_req)
    press_reports = await PressTestReportService(
        feature_ids=[one.id for one in features.list],
        feature_type=constants.FeatureType.StandardFeature.CODE
    ).get_press_test_reports()
    return press_schema.ListPressResponse(success=True, code=200, data=press_reports)


@router.get("/ladder_test", name="Feature details-stress test ladder tps information", response_model=press_schema.ListPressResponse)
async def get_ladder_test(feature_id: int, feature_type: int = None):
    payload = await PressTestReportService(feature_ids=[feature_id], feature_type=feature_type).get_ladder_press_test_reports()
    return press_schema.ListPressResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post("/query", name="Feature details-interface query", response_model=feature_schema.BatchQueryResponse)
async def get_query(feature_id: int, query_req: feature_schema.QueryReq):
    query_req.feature_ids = [feature_id]
    payload = await FeatureQueryService.batch_query(feature_schema.BatchQueryReq.parse_obj({'params': [query_req]}))
    return feature_schema.BatchQueryResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post("/call", name="Feature details-call record", response_model=feature_schema.CallInfoResponse)
async def get_call_info(feature_id: int, call_req: feature_schema.CallReq = None):
    payload = await FeatureService(feature_id).get_call_info(call_req)
    return feature_schema.CallInfoResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post("/batch", name="Batch query", response_model=feature_schema.BatchQueryResponse)
async def batch_query(batch_query_req: feature_schema.BatchQueryReq):
    payload = await FeatureQueryService.batch_query(batch_query_req)
    return feature_schema.BatchQueryResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)



@router.post('/unique', name="feature name uniqueness check", response_model=feature_schema.NonStandardFeatResponse)
async def check_feature_unique(nonstandard_req: feature_schema.NonStandardFeatReq):
    payload = await FeatureService.check_feature_unique(nonstandard_req)
    return feature_schema.NonStandardFeatResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)

    await NonstandardFeatureService.write_nonstandard_feat(nonstandard_req)

@router.delete('/nonstandard', name="Remove non-standard feature meta-information", response_model=ResponseBase, include_in_schema=False)

    await NonstandardFeatureService.delete_nonstandard_feat(nonstandard_req)
    return ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)

            response_model_exclude_unset=True)

    payload = await NonstandardFeatureService.get_online_nonstandard_feat_details()
    return feature_schema.NonStandardFeatResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)

    return feature_schema.DistributedResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.get("/left_tree", name="Feature details-tree navigation on the left", response_model=CategoriesTreeResp)
async def left_tree(is_scene: bool = False, key_words: str = ''):
    if is_scene:
        payload = await SceneFeatureLeftTreeBuilder(key_words).build_left_tree()
    else:
        payload = await FeatureLeftTreeBuilder(key_words).build_left_tree()
    return CategoriesTreeResp(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.get("/task_log", name="Task running logs in the past 3 days", response_model=t1_schema.T1OrderTaskInstInfoResp)
async def get_all_landsat_task_inst_info(feature_id: int):
    obj = await FeatureBindTaskService(feature_id).async_init()
    payload = await obj.get_all_landsat_task_inst_info()
    return t1_schema.T1OrderTaskInstInfoResp(success=True, code=200, data=payload)

async def get_lineage(feature_id: int):
    payload = await FeatureService(feature_id).get_feature_consanguinity()
    return feature_schema.LineageResp(success=True,code=200,data=payload)


@router.post('/properties', name="feature attributes", response_model=feature_schema.FeatureDetailPropertyResponse,
             response_model_exclude_unset=True)
async def get_feature_properties(feature_define: feature_schema.FeatureDefine):
    payload = await GenerateDefineService.generate_define_properties(feature_define)
    # payload = await FeatureService().async_init(feature_define)
    return feature_schema.FeatureDetailPropertyResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.get("/{feature_id}", name="Feature details - basic information", response_model=feature_schema.FeatureDetailResponse)
async def get_detail(feature_id: int, is_scene: bool = False):
    if is_scene:
        payload = await SceneFeatureService(feature_id).get_detail()
    else:
        payload = await FeatureService(feature_id).get_detail()
    return feature_schema.FeatureDetailResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post("/offline_check", name="Feature offline inspection", response_model=feature_schema.OfflineCheckResponse)
async def offline_feature_check(feature_ids: feature_schema.FeatureIds, cookie: str = Header(None)):
    payload = await FeatureOffLineService.offline_feature_check(feature_ids.feature_ids, cookie)
    return feature_schema.OfflineCheckResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post("/offline", name="Feature offline",  response_model=feature_schema.ResponseBase)
async def offline_feature(req: feature_schema.OfflineFeatureReq):
    await FeatureOffLineService.offline_feature(req)
    return feature_schema.ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)

### code file start: routers/meta_router.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

from fastapi import APIRouter, Body, Query, Path
from pydantic import Required

from schemas import meta_schema, CategoriesTreeResp, ResponseBase
from service.common_service.left_tree_builder import TableLeftTreeBuilder
from service.meta_service.feature_meta_service import MetaService
from service.meta_service.feature_view_service import FeatureViewService
from common import constants

router = APIRouter(prefix="/meta/source", tags=["Data source management interface"])


@router.post('/check', name="Configure virtual tables-check duplicate virtual table", response_model=ResponseBase)
async def check_view(view_req: meta_schema.ViewReq):
    await FeatureViewService.check_view(view_req)
    return ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)


@router.post('/fields', name="Configure virtual table-field details", response_model=meta_schema.DetailResponse)
async def get_fields(view_req: meta_schema.ViewReq):
    payload = await FeatureViewService.get_view_fields(view_req)
    return meta_schema.DetailResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post('/sample', name="Configuring virtual tables-sample data", response_model=meta_schema.SampleResponse)
async def get_sample(view_req: meta_schema.ViewReq):
    payload = await FeatureViewService.get_sample(view_req)
    return meta_schema.SampleResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post('/view', name="Configure virtual table", response_model=ResponseBase)
async def add_view(view_req: meta_schema.ViewReq):
    await FeatureViewService.add_view(view_req)
    return ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)


@router.get('/get_inr_column', name="get add columns ", response_model=meta_schema.ViewFieldResponse)
async def add_view(table_id: int = Query(Required, description='logic table id', gt=0)):
    payload = await FeatureViewService.get_add_columns(table_id)
    return meta_schema.ViewFieldResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post('/add_column', name="", response_model=meta_schema.ResponseBase)
async def add_view(req: meta_schema.ViewAddColumnReq):
    await FeatureViewService.add_view_columns(req.table_id, [one.column_name for one in req.columns])
    return meta_schema.ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)


@router.post('/unique', name='Virtual table field deduplication', response_model=meta_schema.ViewFieldResponse)
async def unique_view(view_req: meta_schema.ViewReq):
    payload = await FeatureViewService.unique_view(view_req)
    return meta_schema.ViewFieldResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post('/list', name="Data source list", response_model=meta_schema.ListResponse)
async def get_list(list_req: meta_schema.ListReq = None):
    payload = await MetaService.get_list(list_req)
    return meta_schema.ListResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post('/refresh', name="Flush metadata cache", response_model=ResponseBase, include_in_schema=False)
async def refresh_cache():
    await MetaService.refresh_meta_table_cache()
    return ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)


@router.post('/mark_column_check', name="Metadata field marking check", response_model=meta_schema.ColumnMarkCheckResponse)
async def check_mark_table_column_props(props_req: meta_schema.PropsReq):
    data = await MetaService.mark_column_props_check(props_req)
    return meta_schema.ColumnMarkCheckResponse(success=True, code=200, data=data)


@router.post('/mark_column', name="Metadata field marking", response_model=ResponseBase)
async def mark_table_column_props(props_req: meta_schema.PropsReq):
    await MetaService.mark_table_column_props(props_req)
    return ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)


@router.get('/entity_table', name="Entity table details", response_model=meta_schema.EntityTableResponse)
async def get_entity_table(table_id: int = Query(Required, description='logic table id', gt=0)):
    payload = await MetaService(table_id=table_id).get_entity_table()
    return meta_schema.EntityTableResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.get("/left_tree", name="Data source-left tree navigation", response_model=CategoriesTreeResp)
async def left_tree(key_words: str = ''):
    payload = await TableLeftTreeBuilder(key_words).build_left_tree()
    return CategoriesTreeResp(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.get('/delay', name="delay", response_model=meta_schema.TableDomainDelayResponse)
async def get_delay(table_id: int = Query(Required, description="logic table id", gt=0)):
    payload = await MetaService(table_id=table_id).get_table_domain_delay()
    return meta_schema.TableDomainDelayResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.get('/lineage', name="Bloodline", response_model=meta_schema.LineageResponse)
async def get_lineage(table_id: int = Query(Required, description="logic table id", gt=0)):
    payload = await MetaService(table_id=table_id).get_lineage()
    return meta_schema.LineageResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.get('/func_meta', name="func meta", response_model=meta_schema.FuncResponse)
async def get_func_meta(table_id: int = Query(Required, description="logic table id", gt=0)):
    payload = await MetaService(table_id=table_id).get_func_meta()
    return meta_schema.FuncResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.get('/{table_id}', name="Data source details", response_model=meta_schema.DetailResponse)
async def get_table(table_id: int = Path(Required, description="logic table id", gt=0),
                    table_type: str = Query(None, description="table type")):
    if table_type and table_type != constants.EntityTableType.Logic.CODE:
        payload = await MetaService(table_id=table_id).get_entity_table_details(table_type)
    else:
        payload = await MetaService(table_id=table_id).get_logic_table_detail()
    return meta_schema.DetailResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.put('/{table_id}', name="Edit data source", response_model=ResponseBase)
async def update_table(table_id: int = Path(Required, description="logic table id", gt=0),
                       update_req: meta_schema.UpdateTableReq = Body(Required)):
    await MetaService(table_id=table_id).update_table(update_req)
    return ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)


@router.post('/pre/virtual_field', name='virtual_field sql generate', response_model=meta_schema.VirtualFieldResponse)
async def pre_virtual_field(req:meta_schema.VirtualFieldReq):
    data = await MetaService(table_id=req.table_id).pre_virtual_filed(req.virtual_field)
    return meta_schema.VirtualFieldResponse(success=True, code=200, data=data)


```

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends

from internal.service.magic_cube_service import MagicCubeService
from schemas import DictResponse, ResponseBase
from schemas.report_schemas import report_field_schema, report_label_schema, report_scene_schema, \
    report_scene_field_schema, report_scene_field_history_schema, report_scene_data_schema, report_scene_rule_schema, \
    report_event_schema, report_event_field_schema

    payload = await ReportService.field_edit(info)
    if payload.errno != 200:
        return report_field_schema.ReportFieldEditResponse(success=False, code=1000, msg=payload.msg)

    return report_field_schema.ReportFieldEditResponse(success=True, code=200, msg=payload.msg, data=payload.data)

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Header
from internal.service.magic_cube_service import MagicCubeService
from schemas import DictResponse, ResponseBase, scenes_schema
from service.scenes_service import ScenesService


router = APIRouter(prefix="/meta/scenes", tags=["Scene management"])


@router.post('/list', name="scene list", response_model=scenes_schema.ScenesListResponse)
async def get_list(list_req: scenes_schema.ListReq = None):
    payload = await ScenesService.get_list(list_req)
    return scenes_schema.ScenesListResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post('/detail', name="scene detail", response_model=scenes_schema.ScenesDetailRep)
async def get_detail(req: scenes_schema.ScenesDetailReq = None):
    payload = await ScenesService.get_scenes_detail(req)
    return scenes_schema.ScenesDetailRep(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post('/scenes_columns', name="scene field list", response_model=DictResponse)
async def get_flatten_scene_column(req: scenes_schema.ScenesDetailReq):
    payload = await ScenesService.get_scenes_columns(req)
    return DictResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.post('/edit_scenes_detail', name="Edit scene field aliases", response_model=ResponseBase)
async def edit_scenes_detail(req: scenes_schema.ScenesRouteKeyReq):
    msg = await ScenesService.edit_scenes_detail(req)
    code = 200 if not msg else 403
    success = True if not msg else False
    return ResponseBase(success=success, code=code, msg=msg)

```

**code file end: routers/scenes_router.py**

### code file start: routers/sre_platform_notify_router.py 

```python

import json

from fastapi import APIRouter

import schemas
from common.logger import root_logger
from schemas import sre_platform_schema
from schemas.sre_platform_schema import SqlWorkOrderPreCheckStep, SqlWorkOrderPreCheckResp, SqlWorkOrderPreCheckData
from service.operation_log_service import OperationLogService

router = APIRouter(prefix="/meta/sre_platform", tags=["Operation and maintenance platform"])

@router.post("/sql_work_order_notify", name="sql work order callback", response_model=schemas.ResponseBase)
async def sql_work_order_notify(sql_notify_req: sre_platform_schema.SqlWorkOrderNotifyReq):
    root_logger.info('sql_work_order_notify: ' + json.dumps(sql_notify_req.dict()))
    await OperationLogService.add_sql_work_order_alter_operation_log(sql_notify_req)
    return schemas.ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)

@router.post("/sql_work_order_pre_check", name="sql_work_order_pre_check", response_model=SqlWorkOrderPreCheckResp)
async def sql_work_order_pre_check(sql_notify_req: sre_platform_schema.SqlWorkOrderNotifyReq):
    root_logger.info('sql_work_order_pre_check: ' + json.dumps(sql_notify_req.dict()))
    steps = []
    for i in range(1, 4):
        steps.append(SqlWorkOrderPreCheckStep(name='CheckItem' + str(i), is_risk=False))
    return SqlWorkOrderPreCheckResp(success=True, code=200, data=SqlWorkOrderPreCheckData(is_risk=False, steps=steps))
```

**code file end: routers/sre_platform_notify_router.py**

from common.logger import root_logger
from internal.service.sre_service import SreService
from schemas import feature_schema, press_schema, work_order_schema, ResponseBase
from service.feature_service.import_batch_nonstandard_features_service import ImportBatchNonstandardFeaturesService

    ImportBatchPolardb2MongodbFeaturesService

from utils.time import timestamp

router = APIRouter(prefix="/meta/order", tags=["Work order management"])


@router.get('/applier', name="Fuzzy query for work order applicants", )
async def get_applier(applier:str=''):
    payload = await WorkOrderService.get_applier(applier)
    return dict(success=True, code=200, data=payload)
