```python
@router.post('/change_status', name="change_statusпјҲcommon apiпјү", response_model=work_order_schema.ResponseBase)
async def change_status(req: work_order_schema.ChangeStatusReq, cookie: str = Header(None)):
    await WorkOrderStatusMachine(order_id=req.order_id, dest_order_status=req.dest_order_status,info=req.info,
                                 tester=req.tester, order_feature_infos=req.order_feature_infos, cookie=cookie).change_status()
    return work_order_schema.ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)


@router.post('/batch_change_status', name="batch_change_statusпјҲcommon apiпјү", response_model=work_order_schema.ResponseBase)
async def batch_change_status(req: work_order_schema.BatchChangeStatusReq, cookie: str = Header(None)):
    await WorkOrderStatusMachine().batch_change_status(req.order_ids, req.dest_order_status, req.tester, cookie)
    return work_order_schema.ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)


@router.post('/remove_feature', name="remove feature", response_model=work_order_schema.ResponseBase)
async def remove_feature(req: work_order_schema.RemoveFeatureReq):
    await WorkOrderBindFeatureService(req.order_id).remove_features(remove_feature_ids=req.feature_ids)
    return work_order_schema.ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)


@router.post('/import_batch_scene_features', name="import_batch_scene_features", response_model=work_order_schema.ResponseBase)
async def import_batch_scene_features(file: UploadFile=File(...)):
    content = await ImportBatchSceneFeaturesService.batch_scenes_features(file)
    file_name = f'import-result-{timestamp()}'.encode('utf8').decode('latin-1')
    headers = {"content-type": "application/vnd.ms-excel",
               "content-disposition": f'attachment;filename={file_name}.xls'}
    return StreamingResponse(content, media_type="text/xlsx", headers=headers)


@router.post('/import_batch_nonstandard_features', name="import_batch_nonstandard_features", response_model=work_order_schema.ResponseBase)
async def import_batch_nonstandard_features(file: UploadFile=File(...)):
    content = await ImportBatchNonstandardFeaturesService.batch_nonstandard_features(file)
    file_name = f'import-result-{timestamp()}'.encode('utf8').decode('latin-1')
    headers = {"content-type": "application/vnd.ms-excel",
               "content-disposition": f'attachment;filename={file_name}.xls'}
    return StreamingResponse(content, media_type="text/xlsx", headers=headers)


@router.post('/import_batch_polardb2mongodb_features', name="import_batch_polardb2mongodb_features", response_model=work_order_schema.ResponseBase)
async def import_batch_polardb2mongodb_features(file: UploadFile=File(...)):
    content = await ImportBatchPolardb2MongodbFeaturesService.batch_polardb2mongodb_features(file)
    file_name = f'import-result-{timestamp()}'.encode('utf8').decode('latin-1')
    headers = {"content-type": "application/vnd.ms-excel",
               "content-disposition": f'attachment;filename={file_name}.xls'}
    return StreamingResponse(content, media_type="text/xlsx", headers=headers)
```

### code file start: routers/__init__.py 

```python
from typing import Optional

from fastapi import APIRouter, Query
from fastapi.responses import StreamingResponse

from schemas import DictReq, DictResponse, ResponseBase
from service.common_service.excel_service import ExcelService
from service.dict_service import DictService
from utils.time import timestamp

router = APIRouter(prefix="/meta/common", tags=["public management interface"])


@router.post("/dict", name="Get data dictionary", response_model=DictResponse)
async def get_dict(dict_req: DictReq = None):
    payload = await DictService.get_dict(dict_req)
    return DictResponse(success=True, code=200, data=payload)


@router.get('/download', name="Export results")
async def download(order_id: int = None, label: str = Query(default='test',
                   description="data type: test-result, feature-info, batch-scene-features-model, batch-nonstandard-features-model, batch-polardb2mongodb-features-model")):
    content = await ExcelService().download(order_id, label)
    # base = 'feature info' if label == 'feature' else 'press result'
    file_name = f'{label}-{timestamp()}'.encode('utf8').decode('latin-1')
    headers = {"content-type": "application/vnd.ms-excel", "content-disposition": f'attachment;filename={file_name}.xls'}
    return StreamingResponse(content, media_type="text/xlsx", headers=headers)


@router.get('/refresh', name="Refresh the data dictionary cache", response_model=ResponseBase, include_in_schema=False)
async def refresh_dict_cache():
    await DictService.refresh_dict_cache()
    return ResponseBase(success=True, code=200)

```

```python
class AtomicField(BaseModel):

    is_exp: int = Field(default=0, description="Whether processing is required: 1-Required")
```

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from typing import List, Optional
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from schemas import Page, FuzzyWord, ResponseBase


class BackTraceConsistencyItem(BaseModel):
    """Back trace consistency item"""
    id: int = Field(description="ID")
    featue_name: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Feature name")
    after_fill_name: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Feature name after filling (domain___key__feature_name)")
    consistency_rate: Optional[float] = Field(None, description="Consistency rate")
    compare_sql: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Compare SQL")
    samples_cnt: int = Field(description="Sample count")
    create_time: int = Field(description="Create time")
    update_time: int = Field(description="Update time")



class BackTraceConsistencyListReq(BaseModel):
    """Back trace consistency list request"""
    # field_names: Optional[List[str]] = Field(None, description="Field names list for filtering")
    size: int = Field(10, ge=1, description="Page size")
    page: int = Field(1, ge=1, description="Page number")



class BackTraceConsistencyListResponse(BaseModel):
    """Back trace consistency list response"""
    total: int = Field(description="Total count")
    list: List[BackTraceConsistencyItem] = Field(description="Data list")


class BackTraceConsistencyListOut(ResponseBase):
    """Back trace consistency list output"""
    data: BackTraceConsistencyListResponse = Field(description="Response data")

```

### code file start: schemas/caliber_schema.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from typing import Any, Dict, List

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from schemas import FuzzyWord, Page, ResponseBase
from schemas.func_schema import FuncDetail


#  - condition 
class CaliberFilter(FuzzyWord, Page, BaseModel):
    country_id: int = Field(-1, description="country id")
    business: str = Field(None, description="business type")
    table_name: str = Field(None, description="table name")
    table_type: str = Field(None, description="table type")
    caliber_names: List[str] = Field(None, description="caliber names")
    caliber_ids: List[int] = Field(None, description="caliber id")


class ListReq(BaseModel):
    filter: CaliberFilter = Field(None, description="filter conditions")


class CaliberReq(BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(None, description='caliber id')
    caliber_name: str = Field(..., description='caliber name')
    describe: str = Field(..., description='desc')
    en_describe: str = Field(..., description='en desc')
    table_name: str = Field(..., description='table name ')
    country_id: int = Field(None, description='country')
    content: str = Field(None, description="condition")


#  - 
class CaliberDetail(BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(description="id")
    table_name: str = Field(description="data source table name ")
    caliber_name: str = Field(description="caliber name")
    describe: str = Field(description="desc")
    en_describe: str = Field(None, description="en desc")
    content: str = Field(None, description="condition")
    creator: str = Field(None, description="creator")
    online_code: int = Field(None, description="Online status code: 1-To be online, 2-Under review, 3-online")
    business: str = Field(description="business type")
    country_ids: str = Field(None, description="country id")
    country_id: int = Field(None, description="country id")
    country: str = Field(None, description="country")
    online_status: str = Field(None, description="Online status")
    create_time: int = Field(None, description="create time")
    tree: Any = Field(None, description="tree sql")
    not_alis_content: str = Field(None, description="sql not alis content")
    func_list: List[FuncDetail] = Field(None, description='func content')


class CaliberList(BaseModel):
    list: List[CaliberDetail]
    total: int = Field(description="total")


class ListResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: CaliberList


class CaliberDetailResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: CaliberDetail = Field(None)


#   - Check quantity
class CaliberInfo(BaseModel):
    table_name: str = Field(description="data source table name ")
    caliber_name: str = Field(description="caliber name")
    describe: str = Field(description="desc")
    condition: str = Field(None, description="condition")
    num: int = Field(description="Check quantity")


class CaliberAddResult(BaseModel):
    caliber_name: str = Field(description='caliber name')
    describe: str = Field(description='desc')
    en_describe: str = Field(None, description='en desc')
    table_name: str = Field(description='table name ')
    country_id: int = Field(description='country')
    content: str = Field(None, description="condition")
    is_pass: bool = Field(description="pass or not true pass false fail")
    extra_info: str = Field(description="extra info")


class AddCaliberResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: CaliberAddResult


class DetailResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: CaliberInfo


class Condition(BaseModel):
    tree: Dict[Any, Any] = Field(description="condition")
    sql: str = Field(description="sql")


class CheckCaliberResult(BaseModel):
    is_used: bool = Field(description="is used")
    extra_info: str = Field(None, description="extra info")


class CheckCaliberResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: CheckCaliberResult
```

**code file end: schemas/caliber_schema.py**

### code file start: schemas/common_schema.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from enum import Enum
from typing import Any, Dict, List, Union
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field


class SqlType(str, Enum):
    mysql = 'mysql'
    presto = 'presto'
    spark = 'spark'


class DefineSqlRespModel(BaseModel):
    delay: int = Field(description="delay")
    delays: List[int] = Field(None, description="select delay")
    format_sql: str = Field(description="define sql")
    msg: str = Field(None, description="only offline reason")


class DomainKeysSqlRespModel(BaseModel):
    sql_type: int = Field(description="SQL category: 0-stress test non-hot spots, 1-stress test hot spots, 2-caliber hits, 4-join table record statistics")
    db_type: SqlType = Field(description="sql syntax category")
    sql: str = Field(description="sql")
    caliber_id: int = Field(None, description="caliber id")
    domain_keys: str = Field(None, description="Dimension input parameters")


class SqlListRespModel(BaseModel):
    feature_list: List[DefineSqlRespModel] = Field(description="feature list")
    sql_list: List[DomainKeysSqlRespModel] = Field(None, description="sql list")


class GetDomainKeySql(BaseModel):
    press_hot_sql: str = Field(None, description="Stress testing hotspot sql")
    press_not_hot_sql: str = Field(None, description="Stress testing non-hotspot sql")
    table_record_sql: str = Field(None, description="Table record statistics sql")
    hit_caliber_sql: str = Field(None, description="caliber hit sql")
    sql_type: SqlType = Field(None, description="sql syntax type")


class GetDomainKeySqlDetail(BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(description="id")
    table_name: str = Field(description="table name")
    domain_name: str = Field(description="domain")
    caliber_id: int = Field(None, description="caliber id")
    schedule_time: int = Field(None, description="Scheduling time")
    sql: List[GetDomainKeySql] = Field(None, description="sql")


class DomainKeysListReq(BaseModel):
    table_name: str = Field(None, description="table name")
    domain_name: str = Field(None, description="domain")
    domain_id: int = Field(None, description="domain id")
    caliber_id: int = Field(-1, description="caliber id: -1: Indicates that it is related to stress testing")


class UpdateParamsReq(BaseModel):
    query: Union[dict, Any] = Field(description="query condition")
    kwargs: Dict[str, Any] = Field(description="update content")
    log_kwargs: Dict[str, Any] = Field(None, description="Record log parameters")

```

**code file end: schemas/common_schema.py**

### code file start: schemas/dbmeta_schema.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from typing import List

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field

from schemas import FuzzyWord, Page, ResponseBase, meta_schema


# -
class _DbFilter(FuzzyWord, Page, BaseModel):
    instance: str = Field(None, description="instance")
    catalog: str = Field(None, description="catalog")
    database: str = Field(None, description="db name")


class ListReq(BaseModel):
    filter: _DbFilter = Field(default_factory=_DbFilter, description="filter condition")


class DbDetail(BaseModel):
    instance: str = Field(None, description="instance address")
    table_name: str = Field(None, description="table name")
    table_id: str = Field(None, description="metadata system table id")
    db_type: str = Field(description="Data source type")
    catalog: str = Field(None, description="catalog")
    database: str = Field(None, description="db name")
    describe: str = Field(None, description="table describe")
    feature: bool = Field(False, description="Whether you have joined the feature platform")
    is_real_time: bool = Field(description="Whether real-time table")


class DbInfoList(BaseModel):
    list: List[DbDetail] = Field(description="data source")
    total: int = Field(description="total")


class ListResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: DbInfoList


# -
class DbEditReq(BaseModel):
    table_id: str = Field(None, description="metadata system table id")
    instance: str = Field(description="instance address")
    database: str = Field(description="db name")
    table_name: str = Field(description="table name")
    table_props: meta_schema.TableProps = Field(None, description="Table marking content")
    column: List[meta_schema.Column] = Field(description="filed")
    is_real_time: bool = Field(description="Whether real-time table")
    business: str = Field(None, description="business")


# -
class ColumnDetailReq(BaseModel):
    table_id: str = Field(None, description="metadata system table id")
    instance: str = Field(description="instance address")
    database: str = Field(description="db name")
    table_name: str = Field(description="table name")
    table_props: meta_schema.TableProps = Field(None, description="Table marking content")
    is_real_time: bool = Field(description="Whether real-time table")


class ColumnDetail(meta_schema.Column):
    upstream_table: List[str] = Field(None, description="Source table")


class ColumnDetailResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: List[ColumnDetail] = Field(description="filed")
    business: str = Field(description="business")


# 
class SourceTable(BaseModel):
    table_id: str = Field(None, description="metadata system table id")
    instance: str = Field(description="instance address")
    database: str = Field(description="db name")
    table_name: str = Field(description="table name")
    source: str = Field(description="Data source type:mysql/hive/hive")


class DbTable(SourceTable):
    schema_id: str = Field(description="Metadata system schema_id")
    table_id: str = Field(description="metadata system table id")
    is_real_time: bool = Field(description="Is it real-time?")


```

**code file end: schemas/dbmeta_schema.py**

### code file start: schemas/domain_schema.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from typing import Any, Dict, List

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from schemas import Detail, FuzzyWord, Page, ResponseBase


# -
class DomainFilter(FuzzyWord, Page, BaseModel):
    lang: str = Field(None, description="en=english")
    domain_names: List[str] = Field(None, description="Dimension name")
    is_union: int = Field(None, description="Whether to join dimensions")
    is_standard: int = Field(None, description="is standard")
    update_time: int = Field(None, description="update time")


class ListReq(BaseModel):
    filter: DomainFilter = Field(default_factory=DomainFilter, description="filter conditions")


# 
class DomainDetail(BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(description="id")
    domain_name: str = Field(description="Dimension name")
    describe: str = Field(description="Dimension description")
    is_standard: int = Field(None, description="is standard")
    is_union: int = Field(None, description="is union")
    data_type: str = Field(description="type of data")
    rule: str = Field(None, description="testing regulations")
    sample: str = Field(None, description="Sample data")
    validate_type: str = Field(None, description="Check type")
    create_time: int = Field(None, description="create time")
    update_time: int = Field(None, description="update time")
    relate_domain: List[str] = Field(None, description="Dimension key")
    relate_key: List[str] = Field(None, description="Dimension key")
    key_type: Dict[str, str] = Field(None, description="Dimension key type")
    encrypt_key: Dict[str, str] = Field(None, description="encrypted key")
    alias: str = Field(None, description="alias")


class DomainList(BaseModel):
    list: List[DomainDetail]
    total: int = Field(description="total number of domains")


class ListResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: DomainList


class CreateDomainReq(BaseModel):
    is_union: int = Field(description="is union")

    # is_union=True, use these union domain params
    domain_name_list: List[str] = Field(None, description="domain name list")

    # is_union=False, use these single domain params
    domain_name: str = Field(None, description="domain name")
    data_type: str = Field(None, description="data_type")
    describe: str = Field(None, description="describe")
    rule: str = Field(None, description="rule")
    sample_data: str = Field(None, description="sample data")

class DomainSetStandardReq(BaseModel):
    domain_name: str = Field(None, description="domain_name")
    is_standard: int = Field(None, description="is_standard")

class UnionDomainReq(BaseModel):
    domains: List[str] = Field(description="Dimension name", max_items=3)


class UnionDomainCheckResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: DomainDetail


class DomainRequire(BaseModel):
    column_name: str = Field(None, description="filed")
    op: str = Field(None, description="Logical Operators")
    value: str = Field(None, description="value")

    require: DomainRequire = Field(None, description="necessary conditions")
    exp_sql: str = Field(None, description="SQL form of condition")
    alias: str = Field(None, description="condition abbreviation")

    domain_name: str = Field(description="Dimension name")

    column_name: str = Field(description="filed name")

    alias: str = Field(None, description="condition abbreviation")

    require: DomainRequire = Field(None, description="necessary conditions")
    alias: str = Field(None, description="condition abbreviation")

    domain_name: str = Field(description="Dimension name")
```

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from typing import Any, Dict, List, Union, Optional
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field,  validator, root_validator

from schemas import FuzzyWord, Page, ResponseBase
from schemas import atomic_field_schema, caliber_schema, domain_schema, meta_schema, top_schema, window_schema


class PropertyDefine(BaseModel):
    default: str = Field(None, description="default value")
    delay: int = Field(None, description="delay")
    allow_event: List[int] = Field(None, description="allow scene")


class FeatureDetailProperty(PropertyDefine):
    caliber_id: int = Field(None, description="caliber id")
    caliber_name: str = Field(None, description="caliber")
    calculate: str = Field(None, description="Calculation")
    arithmetic: str = Field(None, description="Statistical methods")
    atomic_field: str = Field(None, description="Atomic fields")
    window: str = Field(None, description="time window")
    window_column: str = Field(None, description="time window field")
    top: str = Field(None, description="top select ")
    top_column: str = Field(None, description="top filed")
    delays: List[int] = Field(None, description="select delay")
    msg: str = Field(None, description="only offline reason")

    data: List[FeatureDetailProperty]

    keys: List[Any] = Field(description="domain keys")

class BatchQueryParam(BaseModel):
    """з»ҹдёҖзҡ„жҹҘиҜўеҸӮж•°"""
    feature_ids: List[int]
    keys: List[Union[str, List[str]]]
    domain: Optional[str] = None
    # еңәжҷҜзү№еҫҒзӣёе…іеӯ—ж®ө
    country_id: Optional[int] = None
    business_code: Optional[int] = None
    channel_id: Optional[int] = None
    engine_event_id: Optional[int] = None

    @root_validator
    def validate_params(cls, values):
        """йӘҢиҜҒеҸӮж•°е®Ңж•ҙжҖ§"""
        scene_fields = ['country_id', 'business_code', 'channel_id', 'engine_event_id']
        has_scene_fields = all(values.get(field) is not None for field in scene_fields)
        has_domain = values.get('domain') is not None

        if not (has_scene_fields or has_domain):
            raise ValueError("Either scene fields or domain must be provided")
        return values


class BatchQueryReq(BaseModel):
    """жү№йҮҸжҹҘиҜўиҜ·жұӮ"""
    params: List[BatchQueryParam]



class Domain(BaseModel):
    name: str = Field(description="Dimension name")
    key: Any = Field(description="domain key")


class QueryResult(BaseModel):
    domain: List[Domain] = Field(description="domain ")
    feature_value: Any = Field(description="feature value ")
    query_time: int = Field(None, description="query time ")


class FeatureIds(BaseModel):
    feature_ids: list = Field(description="feature id list")


class BatchQueryResult(QueryResult):
    domain_name: str = Field(description="Dimension name")
    feature_name: str = Field(description="feature name")


class BatchQueryResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: List[BatchQueryResult]


# -
class CallInfo(BaseModel):
    call_cnt_1d: int = Field(None, description="Call volume today: 0-asc 1-desc")
    call_cnt_7d: int = Field(None, description="Call volume in the past 7 days: 0-asc 1-desc")
    call_cnt_30d: int = Field(None, description="Call volume in the past 30 days: 0-asc 1-desc")
    call_cnt_90d: int = Field(None, description="Call volume in the past 90 days: 0-asc 1-desc")


class CallReq(BaseModel):
    filter: Page
    order: CallInfo


class FeatureCallInfo(CallInfo, BaseModel):
    server_type: str = Field(None, description="server type")


class FeatureCall(BaseModel):
    list: List[FeatureCallInfo]
    total: int


class CallInfoResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: FeatureCall

    data_delay: str = Field(None, description='delay')
    data_type: str = Field(None, description='Data type')
    is_active: int = Field(None, description="Availability")
    relate_tables: List[Any] = Field(None, description='related tables')
    relate_features: List[Any] = Field(None, description='related features')
    neo4j_relations: List[Any] = Field(None, description="neo4j relations")
    country_ids: str = Field(None, description='country  ')
    file_path: str = Field(None, description='file path')
    feat_table: str = Field(None, description='feature result table')
    relate_topics: List[Any] = Field(None, description="topic")
    outer_api: str = Field(None, description="outer rely api")
    info: Dict[Any, Any] = Field(None, description='info')
    feature_no: str = Field(None, description="feature_no")
    limit_country: Union[int, None] = Field(-1, description='is limit country  ')
    maintainer: str = Field(None, description='maintainer')

    engine_event_id: int = Field(None, description="scene id")

    env_business: str = Field(None, description='business environment id')
    dev_type: int = Field(None, description='scene feature dev type, 1=report, 2=combine, 3=code')

    scenes_feature: bool = Field(False, description="Is it a scene feature")

    data: List[NonStandardFeatureBaseInfo]

    online_time: List[int] = Field(None, description="online time")
    country_id: int = Field(None, description="country  id")

    type: str = Field('call', description="Statistics type: call-feature call statistics, table-data table configuration feature statistics")
    business: str = Field(None, description="business  ")
    table_type: str = Field(None, description="table category ")

    size: int = Field(10, description="size")

    value: int = Field(None, description="cnt")

    key: str = Field(None, description='filed name')
```

```python
from typing import Any, Dict, List

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from schemas import FuzzyWord, Page, ResponseBase


class FuncFilter(FuzzyWord, Page, BaseModel):
    pass


class ListReq(BaseModel):
    filter: FuncFilter = Field(None, description="filter condition")


class FuncDetail(BaseModel):
    mysql_func: str = Field(description='mysql func name')
    presto_func: str = Field(None, description='presto func name')
    spark_func: str = Field(None, description='spark func name')
    func_illustrate: str = Field(None, description='func illustrate')
    return_type: str = Field(description='date type')


class FuncList(BaseModel):
    list: List[FuncDetail]
    total: int = Field(description="total")


class ListResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: FuncList
```

```python
    params_null_num: int = Field(None, description="input Number of null values")
    params_equal_rate: float = Field(None, description="Consistency rate of input")
```

### code file start: schemas/meta_schema.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from enum import Enum
from typing import Any, Dict, List

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field

from schemas import FuzzyWord, Page, ResponseBase, domain_schema


#        -       
class MetaFilter(FuzzyWord, Page, BaseModel):
    business: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    table_type: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    table_name: str = Field(None, description="       ")


class ListReq(BaseModel):
    filter: MetaFilter = Field(default_factory=MetaFilter, description="       ")


class Table(BaseModel):
    table_id: int = Field(None, description="       id")
    instance: str = Field(description="       ")
    database: str = Field(description="       ")
    table_name: str = Field(description="       ")


class PhysicsTable(BaseModel):
    hive: Table = Field(None, description="       ")
    mysql: Table = Field(None, description="       ")


#        -       
class Upstreams(BaseModel):
    upstream_table: str = Field(default=None, description="       ")
    upstream_column: str = Field(default=None, description="       ")


#        -       
class Downstreams(BaseModel):
    downstream_table: str = Field(default=None, description="       ")
    downstream_column: str = Field(default=None, description="       ")


#        -       
class ColumnLineage(BaseModel):
    upstreams: Upstreams = Field(None, description="       ")
    downstreams: Downstreams = Field(None, description="       ")


#        -       
class ExtraProps(BaseModel):
    label: str = Field(None, description="")
    domain: str = Field(None, description="       , multi_domain       ")
    enum: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    atomic_field: bool = Field(True, description="       ")
    window: bool = Field(True, description="       ")
    format: str = Field(None, description='time format')
    column_alias: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    multi_domain: List[domain_schema.DomainProps] = Field(None, description="       ")


#        
class Col(BaseModel):
    column_name: str = Field(description="       ")
    column_type: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    column_delay: int = Field(None, description="       ")


class Column2DB(Col):
    """column save to logic_table"""
    real_column_name: str = Field(None, description="       (       )", example='T1.id')


class Column2Define(Col):
    is_virtual: bool = Field(None, description="       ")
    column_alias: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    describe: str = Field(description="       ")


class Column(Col):
    no: int = Field(None, description="       ")
    column_id: str = Field(description="       id")
    column_default: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    is_nullable: bool = Field(None, description="       ")
    column_key: str = Field(None, description="       /       ")
    description: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    extra_props: ExtraProps = Field(default_factory=ExtraProps, description="       ")
    column_lineage: ColumnLineage = Field(None, description="       ")
    extra: str = Field(None, description="       ")


#        
class TableDetail(BaseModel):
    table_id: int = Field(default_factory=int, description='       id')
    table_name: str = Field(description="       ")
    table_type: str = Field(description="       ")
    describe: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    business_domain: str = Field(description="       ")
    country: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    create_time: int = Field(default_factory=int, description="       ")
    table_rows: int = Field(None, description="       ")


class TableLineage(BaseModel):
    table_name: str = Field(description="       ")
    database: str = Field(description="       ")
    instance: str = Field(description="       ")
    catalog: str = Field(None, description="catalog")


#        
class ViewColumn(BaseModel):
    column_name: str = Field(description="       ")
    describe: str = Field(default=None, description="       ")


#        
class ViewField(BaseModel):
    columns: List[ViewColumn] = Field(description="       ")


class ViewFieldResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: ViewField = Field(None, description="       ")


class ViewAddColumnReq(BaseModel):
    table_id: int = Field(description="")
    columns: List[ViewColumn] = Field(description="       ")

#        
class JoinOn(BaseModel):
    op: str = Field('=', description="       .       =")
    left_table: int = Field(None, description="       ", example=1)
    left_field: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    left_field_convert_charset: str = Field(None, description="")
    right_mode: str = Field(None, description="right value mode: 'static' or 'table'")
    right_value: str = Field(None, description="static value when right_mode is 'static'")
    right_table: int = Field(None, description="       ", example=2)
    right_field: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    right_field_convert_charset: str = Field(None, description="")


class JoinTable(BaseModel):
    table_name: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    join: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    join_on: List[JoinOn] = Field(None, description="       ")
    physics_table: PhysicsTable = Field(None, description="       ")


class ViewReq(BaseModel):
    business: str = Field(description="       ")
    table_name: str = Field(description="       ")
    describe: str = Field(description="       ")
    join_tables: List[JoinTable] = Field(description="       ")
    columns: List[str] = Field(None, description="       ")


#        
class Sample(BaseModel):
    table: TableDetail = Field(description="       ")
    headers: List[str] = Field(description="       ")
    samples: List[Dict[str, Any]] = Field(description="       ")
    sql: str = Field(description="sql")


class SampleResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: Sample = Field(description="       ")


#         &&        
class LogicTableColumn(Column):
    column_id: str = Field(None, description="       id")
    real_column_name: str = Field(None, description="       (       )", example='T1.id')
    meta_column_name: str = Field(None, description="       (join       )", example='id')
    is_virtual: bool = Field(False, description="       ")


class LogicTableDetail(TableDetail):
    table_delay: int = Field(None, description="       ")
    table_delay_desc: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    sql: str = Field(None, description="       sql       ")
    table_rows: int = Field(None, description="       ")
    columns: List[LogicTableColumn] = Field(description="       ")
    associated: bool = Field(False, description="       ")
    join_tables: List[JoinTable] = Field(None, description="       ")
    physics_table: PhysicsTable = Field(None, description="       ")
    table_order_column: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    timezone: int = Field(None, description="timezone")

#        
class LogicTables(BaseModel):
    list: List[TableDetail]
    total: int = Field(description="       ")


class ListResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: LogicTables


#        
class DetailResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: LogicTableDetail = Field(None, description="       ")


class FuncResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: List[dict] = Field(None, description="       ")


#        
class ColumnResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: List[LogicTableColumn] = Field(None, description="       ")

#        
class ColumnMarkCheckInfo(BaseModel):
    column_name: str = Field(description="       ")
    operation_type_desc: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    before_value: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    after_value: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    content: str = Field(description="       ")
    is_pass: bool = Field(description="       ")
    msg: str = Field(description="       ")


class ColumnMarkCheckInfoList(BaseModel):
    list: List[ColumnMarkCheckInfo]


class ColumnMarkCheckResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: ColumnMarkCheckInfoList


class TableProps(BaseModel):
    mark_instance: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    mark_database: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    mark_table_name: str = Field(None, description="       ")


class ColumnProps(BaseModel):
    column_id: str = Field(None, description="       id")
    column_name: str = Field(description="       ")
    extra_props: ExtraProps = Field(description="       ")


class PropsReq(BaseModel):
    instance: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    database: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    table_name: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    table_props: TableProps = Field(None, description="       ")
    column_props: List[ColumnProps] = Field(None, description="       ")
    update: bool = Field(False, description="true-       ; false-       ")
    is_real_time: bool = Field(None, description="       ")
    physics_table: PhysicsTable = Field(None, description="       ")



# entity table info
class EntityTable(BaseModel):
    table_id: int = Field(description="       id")
    instance: str = Field(description="       ")
    database: str = Field(description="       ")
    table_name: str = Field(description="       ")
    table_type: str = Field(description="       ")
    source: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    task_status: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    dqc: str = Field(None, description="dqc       ")
    window: int = Field(None, description="       ")
    window_column: str = Field(None, description="       ")
    physics_table_id: int = Field(None, description="       id")


class EntityTableResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: List[EntityTable]


# alter physics table add window's table
class EntityTableReq(BaseModel):
    table_id: int = Field(None, description="       id")
    instance: str = Field(description="       ")
    database: str = Field(description="       ")
    table_name: str = Field(description="       ")
    source: str = Field('mysql', description="       ")
    window: int = Field(None, description="       ")
    window_column: str = Field(None, description="       ")


# alter table add column
class ColumnLogic(BaseModel):
    value: str = Field(description='value')
    label: str = Field(description='column or constant')
    value_type: str = Field(description='value type')


STR_COLUMN_TYPES = ['char', 'varchar', 'text', 'tinytext', 'mediumtext', 'longtext', 'blob', 'tinyblob', 'mediumblob', 'longblob', 'string']
NUMBER_COLUMN_TYPES = ['tinyint', 'smallint', 'mediumint', 'int', 'bigint', 'float', 'double', 'decimal', 'numeric']
BIGINT = ['bigint']
DATETIME = ['datetime']


class FuncObj:
    def __init__(self, func_type, in_param_type, out_param_type):
        self.func_type = func_type
        self.in_param_type = in_param_type
        self.out_param_type = out_param_type


class FuncConstant:
    DPD = FuncObj('dpd', STR_COLUMN_TYPES + BIGINT + DATETIME, 'int')
    CDPD = FuncObj('cdpd', STR_COLUMN_TYPES + BIGINT + DATETIME, 'int')
    CONCAT = FuncObj('concat', STR_COLUMN_TYPES + NUMBER_COLUMN_TYPES, 'varchar')
    GREATEST = FuncObj('greatest', NUMBER_COLUMN_TYPES, 'decimal(30,10)')
    UNIX_TO_DATE = FuncObj('unix_to_date', NUMBER_COLUMN_TYPES, 'varchar')
    UNIX_TO_YEAR_MONTH = FuncObj('unix_to_year_month', NUMBER_COLUMN_TYPES, 'varchar')
    SUBSTR = FuncObj('substr', STR_COLUMN_TYPES + DATETIME, 'varchar')
    ADD = FuncObj('add', NUMBER_COLUMN_TYPES, 'decimal(30,10)')
    SUB = FuncObj('sub', NUMBER_COLUMN_TYPES, 'decimal(30,10)')
    MUL = FuncObj('mul', NUMBER_COLUMN_TYPES, 'decimal(30,10)')
    DIV = FuncObj('div', NUMBER_COLUMN_TYPES, 'decimal(30,10)')
    CONVERT = FuncObj('convert', STR_COLUMN_TYPES + NUMBER_COLUMN_TYPES, 'unknown')
    MUL_AFTER_SUB = FuncObj('mul_after_sub', NUMBER_COLUMN_TYPES + STR_COLUMN_TYPES, 'decimal(30,10)')
    SUB_LEN = FuncObj('sub_len', NUMBER_COLUMN_TYPES + STR_COLUMN_TYPES, 'decimal(30,10)')

    CONVERT_OUT_PARAM_TYPE_MAP = {
        'DOUBLE': 'decimal(30,10)',
        'SIGNED': 'bigint',
        'CHAR': 'varchar',
    }

    @classmethod
    def get_attr_by_func_type(cls, func_type) -> FuncObj:
        for k, v in cls.__dict__.items():
            if isinstance(v, FuncObj) and v.func_type == func_type:
                return v


class UpdateType(str, Enum):
    delay = 'delay'
    virtual_field = 'virtual_field'
    entity_table = 'entity_table'
    logic_table = 'logic_table'


class TableAddFieldReq(BaseModel):
    column_name: str = Field(description="column name")
    describe: str = Field(None, description="describe")
    logic: List[ColumnLogic] = Field(None, description="logic")
    is_virtual: bool = Field(True, description="is_virtual")
    func_type: str = Field(None, description="dpd, cdpd, concat, greatest, unix_to_date, unix_to_year_month, substr, add, sub, mul, div, convert")

# alter domain delay of the table
class TableDomainDelay(BaseModel):
    domain_name: str = Field(description="       ")
    max_real_window: int = Field(None, description="       ")
    min_offline_window: int = Field(description="       ")


class TableDomainDelayResp(TableDomainDelay):
    all_window: List[str] = Field(None, description="       ")
    delay: int = Field(None, description="       ")


class UpdateTableReq(BaseModel):
    delay: List[TableDomainDelay] = Field(None, description="       ")
    virtual_field: TableAddFieldReq = Field(None, description="       ")
    entity_table: EntityTableReq = Field(None, description="       ")
    update_type: UpdateType = Field(description="       : delay-       , virtual_field-       , entity_table-       ")


class VirtualFieldReq(BaseModel):
    table_id : int = Field(description='')
    virtual_field: TableAddFieldReq = Field(description='')


class VirtualFieldInfo(BaseModel):
    sql: str = Field(description='sql content ')
    table_name: str = Field(description='table_name ')


class VirtualFieldResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: VirtualFieldInfo = Field(description="data")


class TableDomainDelayResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: List[TableDomainDelayResp] = Field(None, description="data")


class VirtualField2DB(BaseModel):
    logic: List[ColumnLogic] = Field(None, description="       ")
    func_type: str = Field(None, description="       ")


class LineageResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: List[TableLineage] = Field(None, description="       ")


# exchange data with feature_calc_service
class TableOut(BaseModel):
    logic_table_id: int = Field(description="       id")
    logic_table_name: str = Field(description="       ")
    physics_table: PhysicsTable = Field(None, description="       ")
    associated: bool = Field(description="       ")
    join_tables: List[JoinTable] = Field(None, description="       ")
    column_detail: Dict[str, Col] = Field(description="       ")
    timezone: int = Field(None, description="timezone")

```

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from typing import Any, List, Tuple

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from schemas import Page, FuzzyWord, ResponseBase

class ListIn(FuzzyWord, Page):
    operation_module: str = Field(None)
    operation_type: str = Field(None)
    alter_table: str = Field(None)
    operator: str = Field(None)
    create_time: List[int] = Field(None)

class ListReq(BaseModel):
    filter: ListIn

class OperationLog(BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(description="operation id")
    operation_module: str = Field(description="Operation module")
    operation_type: str = Field(description="Operation type")
    operation_desc: str = Field(description="Operation description")
    alter_table: str = Field(None, description="change alter table")
    alter_column: str = Field(None, description="change alter column")
    column_before_value: str = Field(None, description="The value of the field before it was changed")
    column_after_value: str = Field(None, description="The value of the field after it was changed")
    operator: str = Field(None, description="Operator")
    approver: str = Field(None, description="Approver")
    create_time: int = Field(description="create time")



class OperationLogList(BaseModel):
    """Operation log list"""
    list: List[OperationLog]
    total: int


class OperationLogListResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: OperationLogList
```

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from typing import Any, Dict, List

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from schemas import FuzzyWord, Page, ResponseBase


class ScenesDetailReq(BaseModel):
    country_id: int = Field(None, description=" country id")
    engine_event_id: int = Field(None, description="scene id")
    business_type: int = Field(None, description="business type")
    engine_channel_id: int = Field(None, description="channel id")


class ListFilter(ScenesDetailReq, FuzzyWord, Page, BaseModel):
    pass


class ListReq(BaseModel):
    filter: ListFilter = Field(None, description="filter conditions")


class ScenesColumn(BaseModel):
    route: str = Field(None, description="field path")
    column: str = Field(None, description='filed name')
    key: str = Field(None, description="filed alias")
    value_type: str = Field(None, description='filed type')
    desc: str = Field(None, description='description')
    field_must: bool = Field(None, description="Is it required")
    nullable: bool = Field(None, description='Whether it can be null')
    is_feature: bool = Field(description='Is it a feature')
    feature_name: str = Field(None, description='Scene feature name')
    children: List = Field(None, description='Field details list')


class ScenesDetail(BaseModel):
    business: str = Field(None, description="business ")
    business_type: int = Field(description="business type")
    country: str = Field(None, description="country")
    country_id: int = Field(description=" country id")
    engine_channel: str = Field(None, description="channel")
    engine_channel_id: int = Field(description="channel id")
    engine_event: str = Field(None, description="scene")
    engine_event_id: int = Field(description="scene id")
    refer_id: str = Field(None, description='business relate id')
    describe: str = Field(None, description="description")
    maintainer: str = Field(None, description="maintainer")
    create_time: int = Field(None, description="online time")
    update_time: int = Field(None, description="update time")
    doc_version: str = Field(None, description="version")
    sync_report: bool = Field(False, description="Whether to report simultaneously")
    flow_ids: List[str] = Field(None, description="rule flow")
    allow_event: str = Field(None, description="allow scene")
    columns: List[ScenesColumn] = Field(None, description='Field details')


class ScenesList(BaseModel):
    list: List[ScenesDetail]
    total: int = Field(description="total")


class ScenesListResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: ScenesList


class ScenesDetailRep(ResponseBase):
    data: ScenesDetail


class ScenesRouteKeyReq(ScenesDetailReq):
    country_id: int = Field(description=" country id")
    engine_event_id: int = Field(description="scene id")
    business_type: int = Field(description="business type")
    engine_channel_id: int = Field(description="channel id")
    route: str = Field(description="field path")
    key: str = Field(description="filed alias")

```

```python
    log_context: str = Field(None, description="log content ")
```

### code file start: schemas/work_order_schema.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from typing import Any, List, Tuple

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from schemas import Page, FuzzyWord, ResponseBase, top_schema
from schemas.feature_schema import FeatureDetail, FeatureDefine, SceneFeatureDefine


class ListIn(FuzzyWord, Page):
    type_code: int = Field(None, description="Work order type")
    type_codes: List[int] = Field(None, description="Work order types")
    handler: str = Field(None, description="Processor")
    status_codes: List[int] = Field(None, description="order status")
    create_time: List[int] = Field(None, description="create time", max_items=2)
    applier: str = Field(None, description="founder")
    feature_id: int = Field(None, description="feature id")
    id: int = Field(None, description="word order id")
    tapd_id: str = Field(None, description='tapd_id')


class ListReq(BaseModel):
    filter: ListIn


class WorkOrder(BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(description="worker order id")
    tapd_id: str = Field(None, description="tapd_id")
    order_type: str = Field(description="Work order type")
    type_code: int = Field(description="Work order type code")
    applier: str = Field(description="founder")
    press_time: int = Field(None, description="Submit stress test time")
    apply_time: int = Field(None, description="submit time")
    operator: str = Field(None, description="Approver")
    approval_time: int = Field(None, description="Processing time")
    status: str = Field(description="status")
    status_code: int = Field(description="status code")
    describe: str = Field(None, description="Approval comments")
    feature_names: str = Field(None, description="feature name")
    next_operator: str = Field(None, description="Waiting for the operator")
    tester: str = Field(None, description="tester")
    order_delay: int = Field(10, description="Work order delay type, 10-real-time, 11-offline")
    feature_cnt: int = Field(0, description="feature cnt")


class WorkOrderList(BaseModel):
    """work order list"""
    list: List[WorkOrder]
    total: int


class ListResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: WorkOrderList


class WorkOrderDetail(WorkOrder):
    tapd_title: str = Field(None, description="tapd_title")
    tapd_url: str = Field(None, description="tapd_url")
    online_time: int = Field(None, description="online time")
    create_time: int = Field(description="create time")
    table_name: str = Field(None, description="data source table name")
    domain: str = Field(None, description="domain ")
    domain_id: int = Field(None, description="domain id")
    relate_domain: List[str] = Field(None, description="relate domain")
    atomic_fields: str = Field(None, description="atomic filed")
    arithmetic: str = Field(None, description="arithmetic")
    caliber_name: str = Field(None, description="caliber name")
    condition: str = Field(None, description="condition")
    window: str = Field(None, description="time window ")
    window_column: str = Field(None, description="time window filed")
    top: str = Field(None, description="top")
    # top_column: str = Field(None, description="top n filed")
    # tops: List[top_schema.Top2Calc] = Field(None, description="top n filed")
    business: str = Field(None, description="business")
    business_code: int = Field(None, description="business type")
    channel: str = Field(None, description="channel")
    channel_id: int = Field(None, description="channel id")
    country: str = Field(None, description="country")
    country_id: int = Field(None, description="country id")
    engine_event_id: int = Field(None, description="scene id")
    engine_event: str = Field(None, description="scene")
    domain_column: str = Field(None, description="If it is a scene feature, this field represents the input parameter field")
    can_remove_feature: bool = Field(False, description="can remove feature")
    list: List[FeatureDetail] = Field(description="feature list")


class DetailResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: WorkOrderDetail


class TapdInfo(BaseModel):
    id: str = Field(None, description="id")
    tapd_title: str = Field(None, description="tapd_title")
    tapd_url: str = Field(None, description="tapd_url")


class TapdInfoResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: TapdInfo


class OrderFeatureDefine(FeatureDefine, SceneFeatureDefine):
    tapd_id: str = Field(None, description="tapd_id")
    table_id: str = Field(None, description="table id")
    list: List[FeatureDetail] = Field(None, description="feature list")
    arithmetic_desc: str = Field(None, description="arithmetic description")
    window: List[Any] = Field(None, description="window", example=[('hour', 3600 * 1000)])  # type: List[Tuple[str, int]]
    conditions: List[str] = Field(default=None, description="caliber list", example=[('')])


class StatusChange(BaseModel):
    order_id: int = Field(description='work order id')
    info:  str = Field(None, description="reason")
    is_pass: bool = Field(description='is pass')
    next: str = Field(None, description='next node operator')


class OrderFeatureInfo(BaseModel):
    feature_id: int = Field(None, description='feature id') # create order/split order/press test/inte test/publish use
    test_num: int = Field(None, description='inte test num') # inte test use
    test_sql: str = Field(None, description='inte test sql') # inte test use
    test_conclusion: int = Field(None, description='inte test conclusion') # publish use


class ChangeStatusReq(BaseModel):
    order_id: int = Field(description='order id')
    dest_order_status: str = Field(description='dest order status')
    info: str = Field(None, description='abort reason')
    tester: str = Field(None, description='tester')
    order_feature_infos: List[OrderFeatureInfo] = Field(None, description='order feature info')


class BatchChangeStatusReq(BaseModel):
    order_ids: List[int] = Field(description='order ids')
    dest_order_status: str = Field(description='dest order status')
    tester: str = Field(None, description='tester')


class RemoveFeatureReq(BaseModel):
    order_id: int = Field(description='order id')
    feature_ids: List[int] = Field(description='feature ids')


class ReEditResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: OrderFeatureDefine


class WorkOrderApproval(BaseModel):
    order_id: int = Field(description="work order id")
    approval_pass: bool = Field(description="pass")
    info: str = Field(None, description="audit info")


# work_order to mysql
class WorkOrder2DB(BaseModel):
    type_code: int = Field(default=1, description="Work order type code")
    applier: str = Field(description="applier")
    status_code: int = Field(default=99, description="order status code")
    apply_time: int = Field(None, description="submit Processing time")
    press_time: int = Field(None, description="Submit stress test time")
    is_deleted: int = Field(default=0, description="is delete, 0-false, 1-ture")
    tester: str = Field(None, description="tester")
    next_operator: str = Field(None, description="next Processor")
    order_delay: int = Field(default=10, description="order delay")

```

**code file end: schemas/work_order_schema.py**

### code file start: schemas/__init__.py 

```python
from typing import Any, List, Optional

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field

from utils.time import timestamp


class ResponseBase(BaseModel):
    """return   success"""
    success: bool = Field(description="true-  success, false-  fail")
    code: int = Field(description="code value: 200-  success, 99-server error, 403-param error, 600-third interface error, 1000-check param  fail, 1095-timeout")
    msg: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="error info")
    timestamp: int = Field(default_factory=timestamp, description='timestamp')


class Detail(BaseModel):
    id: Any = Field(description="id")
    name: Any = Field(description="name")
    content: Any = Field(None, description="extra info")
    describe: str = Field(None, description="description")


class DictDetail(BaseModel):
    type: str
    value: List[Detail]
    total: int


class DictResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: List[DictDetail]


class Page(BaseModel):
    page: int = Field(1, ge=1, description="page")
    size: int = Field(-1, description="size")


class FuzzyWord(BaseModel):
    fuzzy_word: str = Field(None, description="Fuzzy search keywords")


class DictReq(BaseModel):
    type: str = Field(description="query type")
    table_type: str = Field(None, description="table type")
    table: str = Field(None, description="table name")
    domain: List[str] = Field(None, description="domain")
    instance: str = Field(None, description="Instance address")
    database: str = Field(None, description="db name")
    business: str = Field(None, description="business name")
    include_view: bool = Field(None, description="Whether to include virtual tables")

    country_id: int = Field(None, description="country id")
    engine_event_id: int = Field(None, description="scene id")
    business_type: int = Field(None, description="business type")
    engine_channel_id: int = Field(None, description="channel id")

    column_name: str = Field(None, description="filed name")

class DownloadReq(BaseModel):
    order_id: int = Field(description="work order id")
    label: str = Field(description="type of data: test-Pressure test results', feature-information")


class _Categories(BaseModel):
    data: List = Field(description="elements under categories ")
    num: int = Field(description="number of categories")
    by_category: str = Field(description="Classification type  by_business by_table_type by_table_name by_caliber_name")
    category_name: str = Field(description="name of category")
    category_id: str = Field(None, description="id")


class CategoriesTreeResp(ResponseBase):
    data: List[_Categories]


```

**code file end: schemas/__init__.py**

```python
from typing import Any, Dict, List

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from schemas import FuzzyWord, Page, ResponseBase
from schemas.report_schemas import TimeField
from schemas.report_schemas.report_event_schema import ReportEventDetail
from schemas.report_schemas.report_field_schema import ReportEnumerationDetail
from schemas.report_schemas.report_scene_schema import ReportSceneDetail


class ReportSceneFieldEnumerationDetail(ReportEnumerationDetail):
    is_select: int = Field(0)


class ReportSceneFieldInfoDetail(BaseModel):
    nullable: int = Field(None, description="Is value required?")
    field_must: int = Field(None, description="Whether the key must be passed")
    default: str = Field(None, description="default value")
    app_version: str = Field(None, description="The app version number verified by this field")


class ReportEventFieldDetail(TimeField, BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(None, description="id")
    name: str = Field(None, description="name")
    info: ReportSceneFieldInfoDetail = Field(None, description="Verification rules")
    status: int = Field(None, description="Field status: 0 registered, 1 submitted, 3 online, 4 changing")
    business_map: str = Field(None, description="Business field mapping")
    children: list = Field(None, description="child node")
    field_type: str = Field(None, description="filed type")
    description: str = Field(None, description="description")
    enumeration: List[ReportSceneFieldEnumerationDetail] = Field(None, description="enum value ")

    labels: list = Field(None)
    is_process: int = Field(None)
    field_id: int = Field(None)

    field_id: int = Field(None, description="filed id")
    info: ReportSceneFieldInfoDetail = Field(None, description="Verification rules")

    business_map: str = Field(None, description="Business field mapping")
    children: list = Field(None, description="child node")
    field_type: str = Field(None, description="filed type")
    is_apply: int = Field(None)
    description: str = Field(None, description="description")
    enumeration: List[ReportSceneFieldEnumerationDetail] = Field(None, description="enum value")
    label: str = Field(None, description="label type")
```

```python
# encoding: utf-8


from typing import Any, Dict, List

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from schemas import FuzzyWord, Page, ResponseBase
from schemas.report_schemas import TimeField


class ReportEventDetail(TimeField, BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(None, description="id")
    business_type: str = Field(None, description="business type")
    engine_channel_id: str = Field(None, description="channel id")
    link_id: str = Field(None, description="link id")
    business: str = Field(None)
    engine_channel: str = Field(None)
    link: str = Field(None)
    event_desc: str = Field(None, description="scenes description")
    refer_id_desc: str = Field(None, description="refer_id description")
    is_apply: int = Field(None, description="Whether to apply")
    status: int = Field(None, description="status")
    creator: str = Field(None, description="creator")
    updator: str = Field(None, description="updator")
    device_type: str = Field(None)
    has_ziyan: int = Field(None)
    has_ziyan_label: int = Field(None)
    has_shumei: int = Field(None)
    has_shumei_label: int = Field(None)


class ReportEventEditDetail(BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(None, description="id")
    business_type: str = Field(None, description="business type")
    engine_channel_id: str = Field(None, description="channel id")
    event_desc: str = Field(None, description="scenes description")
    is_apply: int = Field(0, description="Whether to apply")
    status: int = Field(0, description="status")
    refer_id_desc: str = Field(None, description="refer_id description")
    link_id: str = Field(None, description="link id ")


class ReportSceneListFilter(FuzzyWord, BaseModel):
    status: int = Field(None, description="status")
    id_list: List[int] = Field(None, description="scenes id list")
    device_type: str = Field(None)
    has_shumei: int = Field(None)
    has_shumei_label: int = Field(None)
    has_ziyan: int = Field(None)
    has_ziyan_label: int = Field(None)

    list: List[ReportEventEditDetail]
```

```python
# encoding: utf-8

from typing import Any, Dict, List

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from schemas import FuzzyWord, Page, ResponseBase
from schemas.report_schemas import TimeField


class ReportEnumerationDetail(BaseModel):
    entry_id: str
    value: str


class ReportLabelDetail(BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(None)
    name: str = Field(None)


class ReportFieldDetail(TimeField, BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(None, description="id")
    name: str = Field(None, description="name")
    field_type: str = Field(None, description="Field Type")
    description: str = Field(None, description="Field description")
    enumeration: List[ReportEnumerationDetail] = Field(None, description="enum value")
    labels: list = Field(None, description="label")
    is_process: int = Field(None, description="Whether to process fields")
    children: list = Field(None, description="child node")
    parent_id: int = Field(None, description="parent id")
    is_apply: int = Field(None, description="Is it allowed to be applied?")


class ReportFieldEditDetail(BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(None, description="id")
    name: str = Field(None, description="name")
    field_type: str = Field(None, description="Field Type")
    description: str = Field(None, description="Field description")
    enumeration: List[ReportEnumerationDetail] = Field(None, description="enum value")
    label_names: List[str] = Field(None, description="Tag category name")
    is_process: int = Field(None, description="Whether to process fields")
    children: list = Field(None, description="child node")
    parent_id: int = Field(None, description="parent id")
    is_apply: int = Field(None, description="Is it allowed to be applied?")


class ReportFieldEditListInfo(BaseModel):
    list: List[ReportFieldEditDetail]


class ReportFieldBatchLineReq(BaseModel):
    id_list: List[int]


class ReportFieldId(BaseModel):
    id: int


class ReportFieldDeleteReq(ReportFieldId):
    pass


class ReportFieldFilter(FuzzyWord):
    is_apply: int = Field(None)
    is_process: int = Field(None)
    label_ids: list = Field(None)


class ListReq(BaseModel):
    filter: ReportFieldFilter = Field(None, description="filter conditions")


class ReportFieldEnumerationReq(BaseModel):
    filter: ReportFieldId = Field(description="filter conditions")


class ReportFieldListResp(BaseModel):
    list: List[ReportFieldDetail]
    total: int = Field(description="total")


class ReportFieldResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: ReportFieldListResp


class ReportFieldEnumerationResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: List[ReportEnumerationDetail] = Field(None)


class ReportFieldEditResponse(ResponseBase):
    data: List[int] = Field(None)

```

```python
# encoding: utf-8

from typing import Any, Dict, List

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from schemas import FuzzyWord, Page, ResponseBase
from schemas.report_schemas import TimeField
from schemas.report_schemas.report_field_schema import ReportEnumerationDetail
from schemas.report_schemas.report_scene_schema import ReportSceneDetail


class ReportSceneFieldEnumerationDetail(ReportEnumerationDetail):
    is_select: int = Field(0)


class ReportSceneFieldInfoDetail(BaseModel):
    nullable: int = Field(None, description="Whether to allow empty")
    field_must: int = Field(None, description="Whether the key must be passed")
    default: str = Field(None, description="default value")
    app_version: str = Field(None, description="The app version number verified by this field")


class ReportSceneFieldDetail(TimeField, BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(None, description="id")
    # scene_id: int = Field(None, description="id")
    field_id: int = Field(None, description="filed id")
    name: str = Field(None, description="name")
    info: ReportSceneFieldInfoDetail = Field(None, description="Verification rules")
    status: int = Field(None, description="Field status: 0 registered, 1 submitted, 3 online, 4 changing")
    business_map: str = Field(None, description="Business field mapping")
    children: list = Field(None, description="child node")
    field_type: str = Field(None, description="Field Type")
    description: str = Field(None, description="Field description")
    enumeration: List[ReportSceneFieldEnumerationDetail] = Field(None, description="enum value")
    # label_id: str = Field(None, description="Tag classification")
    # label_name: str = Field(None, description="Tag classification")
    labels: list = Field(None)
    is_process: int = Field(None)


class ReportSceneFieldEditDetail(BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(None, description="id")
    scene_id: int = Field(None, description="scene id")
    field_id: int = Field(None, description="filed id")
    info: ReportSceneFieldInfoDetail = Field(None, description="Verification rules")
    business_map: str = Field(None, description="Business field mapping")
    children: list = Field(None, description="child node")
    field_type: str = Field(None, description="Field Type")
    is_apply: int = Field(None)
    description: str = Field(None, description="Field description")
    enumeration: List[ReportSceneFieldEnumerationDetail] = Field(None, description="enum value")
    label: str = Field(None, description="Tag classification")

    scene_id: int = Field(description="scene id")

    id: int

    id_list: List[int]
    scene_id: int

    is_process: int = Field(None, description="Whether to process fields")

    # field_must: bool = Field(None)
    # nullable: bool = Field(None)
    status_list: List[int] = Field(None, description="status")
    scene_id: int = Field(description="scene id")

    filter: ReportSceneFieldListFilter = Field(None, description="filter conditions")
```

```python
# encoding: utf-8


from typing import Any, Dict, List

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from schemas import FuzzyWord, Page, ResponseBase
from schemas.report_schemas import TimeField


class ReportSceneDetail(TimeField, BaseModel):
    id: int = Field(None, description="id")
    country_id: int = Field(None, description="country id")
    event_id: int = Field(None, description="scene id")
    business_type: int = Field(None, description="business type")
    engine_channel_id: int = Field(None, description="channel id ")
    country: str = Field(None, description="country")
    event: str = Field(None, description="scene ")
    business: str = Field(None, description="business")
    engine_channel: str = Field(None, description="channel")
    scene_desc: str = Field(None, description="scene description")
    refer_id_desc: str = Field(None, description="refer_id desc")
    is_apply: int = Field(None, description="Whether to apply")
    status: int = Field(None, description="status")
    creator: str = Field(None, description="creator")
    updator: str = Field(None, description="updater")

    business_type: int = Field(None, description="business type")
    engine_channel_id: int = Field(None, description="channel id ")
    scene_desc: str = Field(None, description="scene desc")
    is_apply: int = Field(0, description="Whether to apply")
    status: int = Field(0, description="status")
    refer_id_desc: str = Field(None, description="refer_id desc ")
```

### code file start: scripts/gen_api_docs.py 

```python


import requests
import copy
import json
from pathlib import Path

doc_url = 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/openapi.json'


need_url_list = []

need_url_contain='feature_kafka_trigger'  # filter by url contain



def get_api_docs():
    response = requests.get(doc_url)
    data_doc = response.json()

    for path in data_doc['paths']:
        if need_url_contain in path:
            need_url_list.append(path)


    data_doc_filtered = copy.deepcopy(data_doc)
    data_doc_filtered['paths'] = {}
    data_doc_filtered['paths'] = {path: data_doc['paths'][path] for path in data_doc['paths'] if path in need_url_list}

    with open(Path(__file__).parent / 'api_docs_filtered.json', 'w') as f:
        json.dump(data_doc_filtered, f)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    get_api_docs()
```

**code file end: scripts/gen_api_docs.py**

### code file start: scripts/handler.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import asyncclick as click

from tortoise.models import Q

from common import constants
from internal.service.magic_cube_service import MagicCubeService
from schemas import common_schema, domain_schema, feature_schema, meta_schema
from service.feature_service.feature_service import FeatureService
from service.feature_service.scene_feature_service import SceneFeatureService
from service.inte_test_services.inte_compare_test import CompareTest
from service.inte_test_services.scene_inte_compare_test import SceneCompareTest
from service.meta_service.feature_meta_service import MetaService
from service.press_test_service.domain_key_getter import PressTestDomainKeyGetter
from service.press_test_service.press_test_service import PressTestService
from service.work_order_service.work_order_service import WorkOrderService
from service.work_order_service.work_order_bind_feature_service import WorkOrderBindFeatureService
from service.domain_service import DomainService
from utils.process_init import ProcessInitFunc


@click.group()
@click.pass_context
async def cli(ctx: click.Context):
    await ProcessInitFunc.start_up_do_init()
    ctx.ensure_object(dict)


@cli.command('integrate', help='integrate test')
@click.option('--feature_id', '-f', required=True, type=int, help='feature id ')
@click.option('--feature_type', '-t', default=1, required=True, help="feature type",
              type=click.Choice([f'{constants.FeatureType.StandardFeature.CODE}', f'{constants.FeatureType.SceneFeature.CODE}']))
@click.option('--test_num', '-n', default=None, type=int, help="test num ")
@click.option('--sql', '-s', default=None, help='integrate test sql')
@click.pass_context
async def integrate(_, feature_id, feature_type, test_num, sql):
    feature_type = int(feature_type)
    if feature_type == constants.FeatureType.SceneFeature.CODE:
        await SceneCompareTest(feature_id=feature_id, test_sql=sql, test_num=test_num).start_inte_test()
    else:
        await CompareTest(feature_id=feature_id).start_inte_test()


@cli.command('mark', help='filed mark')
@click.option('--table_name', '-t', required=True, type=str, help="table name")
@click.option('--column_name', '-c', required=True, type=str, help='filed name')
@click.option('--domain_name', '-d', required=True, type=str, help='domain name')
@click.pass_context
async def mark(_, table_name, column_name, domain_name):
    domain = await DomainService.get_list(
        domain_schema.ListReq(filter=domain_schema.DomainFilter(domain_names=[domain_name])))
    if not domain.list:
        raise Exception('domain not found')
    obj = await MetaService(table_name=table_name).get_logic_table_detail()
    _col = None
    for col in obj.columns:
        if col.column_name == column_name:
            _col = col
            break
    if not _col:
        raise Exception('field not found')
    _col.extra_props.domain = domain_name
    props_req = meta_schema.PropsReq(
        table_name=table_name,
        column_props=[meta_schema.ColumnProps(column_name=column_name, extra_props=_col.extra_props)]
    )
    await MetaService.mark_table_column_props(props_req, 'cmd')


@cli.command('fetch', help="get stress domain_keys")
@click.option('--table_name', '-t', required=True, type=str, help="table name")
@click.option('--domain_id', '-d', type=int, help='domain id')
@click.pass_context
async def fetch(_, table_name, domain_id):
    await PressTestDomainKeyGetter.fetch_domain_keys(table_name, domain_id=domain_id)


@cli.command('stress', help="stress test")
@click.option('--feature_id', '-f', required=True, type=int, help='feature id')
@click.option('--feature_type', '-t', required=True, help='feature type',
              type=click.Choice([f'{constants.FeatureType.StandardFeature.CODE}', f'{constants.FeatureType.SceneFeature.CODE}']))
@click.option('--tps', '-n', type=int, help='Number of concurrencies')
@click.option('--just_feature', '-jf', type=bool, default=False, help="Whether to only stress test features (yes - the work order status will not be modified)")
@click.pass_context
async def stress(_, feature_id, feature_type, tps=0, just_feature=False):
    cookie = await MagicCubeService.login()
    feature_type = int(feature_type)
    order = await WorkOrderBindFeatureService(feature_ids=[feature_id], order_type=feature_type).get_order()
    if feature_type == constants.FeatureType.StandardFeature.CODE:
        _filter = feature_schema.FeatureFilter(feature_ids=[feature_id])
        features = await FeatureService.get_list(feature_schema.ListReq(filter=_filter))
        await PressTestService(cookie=cookie).apply_press_feature(features.list, concurrency=tps)
    else:
        _filter = feature_schema.ListReq(filter=feature_schema.FeatureFilter(is_scene=True, feature_ids=[feature_id]))
        features = await SceneFeatureService.get_list(_filter)
        await PressTestService(cookie=cookie).apply_press_scene_feature(features.list, concurrency=tps)
    if not just_feature:
        update_req = common_schema.UpdateParamsReq(
            query={'id': order.id},
            kwargs={'status_code': constants.OrderStstusCodeDesc.press_ing.CODE},
        )
        await WorkOrderService.update_work_status_and_add_work_log(update_req)


@cli.command('update', help="update")
@click.option('--order_id', '-o', required=True, type=int, help="work order id ")
@click.option('--status_code', '-st', required=True, type=int, help='Transfer work order status')
@click.pass_context
async def update(_, order_id, status_code):
    code_obj = constants.OrderStstusCodeDesc.get_attr_by_code(status_code)
    if code_obj is None:
        raise Exception('work order code is not exist')
    feature_ids = await WorkOrderBindFeatureService(order_id=order_id).get_feature_ids()
    work_order = await WorkOrderService.MODEL.get(pk=order_id)
    feature_query = Q(id__in=feature_ids, status_code__not=constants.FeatureOnlineStatus.Online.CODE)
    order_update_params = common_schema.UpdateParamsReq(query={'id': order_id}, kwargs={'status_code': status_code})
    if work_order.type_code == constants.WorkOrderType.SceneFeature.CODE and code_obj.CODE == constants.OrderStstusCodeDesc.all_feature_onlined.CODE:
        await SceneFeatureService.online_feature(feature_ids, check=False)
        await WorkOrderService.update_work_status_and_add_work_log(order_update_params)

    else:
        async with WorkOrderService.MODEL.transaction():
            await WorkOrderService.update_work_status_and_add_work_log(order_update_params)
            if work_order.type_code == constants.WorkOrderType.StandardFeature.CODE:
                if code_obj.CODE == constants.OrderStstusCodeDesc.all_feature_onlined.CODE:
                    raise Exception("use feature platform publish ")
                obj = FeatureService
            elif work_order.type_code == constants.WorkOrderType.SceneFeature.CODE:
                obj = SceneFeatureService
            else:
                raise NotImplemented
            kwargs = {'status_code': constants.FeatureOnlineStatus.NotOnline.CODE}
            await obj.update_feature(common_schema.UpdateParamsReq(query=feature_query, kwargs=kwargs))


if __name__ == '__main__':
    cli()

```

### code file start: service/arithmetic_service.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

from tortoise.models import Q

from common import errors
from models.arithmetic_model import TFeatureArithmeticModel
from service import BaseService, GenerateDefineMixin
from service.meta_service import db_column_type_to_py_type_code


class ArithmeticService(GenerateDefineMixin, BaseService):
    MODEL = TFeatureArithmeticModel

    @classmethod
    def _dict_type(cls):
        return '12'

    def __init__(self, arithmetic_name: str):
        self.arithmetic_name = arithmetic_name
        self.__arithmetic_obj: dict = None
        self.describe: str = None
        self.en_describe: str = None
        self.arithmetic_id: int = None

    async def get_detail(self):
        query = Q(name=self.arithmetic_name)
        show = ['id', 'alias', 'describe', 'en_describe']
        query_set = await self.MODEL.select_one(query, show)
        if not query_set:
            raise errors.ArithmeticSelectError()
        self.__arithmetic_obj = query_set
        self.describe = self.__arithmetic_obj.get('describe')
        self.en_describe = self.__arithmetic_obj.get('en_describe')
        self.arithmetic_id = self.__arithmetic_obj.get('id')
        return self

    def get_alis(self):
        return self.__arithmetic_obj.get('alias')

    @classmethod
    async def get_list(cls, *args, **kwargs):
        show_column = ['id', 'name', 'describe']
        return await cls.MODEL.select_many(Q(), list(show_column), order_by='id')

    @classmethod
    async def get_dict(cls, *args, **kwargs):
        payload = await cls.get_list()
        return [{'id': i['id'], 'name': i['name'], 'content': i['name'], 'describe': i['describe']} for i in payload]

    def generate_define_part_name(self, atomic_field: str)->str:
        if self.arithmetic_name == 'hit':
            return self.get_alis()
        if self.arithmetic_name == 'select':
            return atomic_field.replace('_', '').capitalize()
        return '{}{}'.format(self.get_alis(), atomic_field.replace('_', '').capitalize())

    def generate_describe(self):
        return self.describe

    def generate_en_describe(self):
        return self.en_describe

    def generate_define_date_type(self, atomic_field_type: str)->int:
        if self.arithmetic_name == 'count' or self.arithmetic_name == 'count(distinct)':
            return db_column_type_to_py_type_code('int')
        elif self.arithmetic_name == 'hit':
            return db_column_type_to_py_type_code('bool')
        elif self.arithmetic_name == 'select distinct':
            return db_column_type_to_py_type_code('list')
        elif self.arithmetic_name in ['avg', 'stddev_pop', 'var_pop', 'stddev_samp', 'var_samp']:
            return db_column_type_to_py_type_code('float')
        return db_column_type_to_py_type_code(atomic_field_type)

    def generate_define_default(self)->str:
        if self.arithmetic_name == 'hit':
            return '0'
        if self.arithmetic_name == 'count':
            return '0'
        if self.arithmetic_name == 'count(distinct)':
            return '0'
        return 'null'

    def get_define(self, result):
        result['arithmetic'] = self.arithmetic_name if self.arithmetic_name not in ('select',) else ''

    def generate_define_arithmetic(self):
        return self.arithmetic_name if self.arithmetic_name not in ('select',) else ''

```

**code file end: service/arithmetic_service.py**
