```python
async def generate_name(f_define: Define,  business: str, column_prefix: str, logic_table:LogicTableDetail)->str:
    delay_str = constants.CalcServiceDelay.get_attr_by_code(f_define.delay).MAP_OBJ.NAME
    key_str = DomainService.generate_define_part_name(f_define.domain_keys, column_prefix)
    arithmetic_ob = await ArithmeticService(f_define.arithmetic).get_detail()
    # logic_table = await MetaService(table_name=f_define.table_name).get_logic_table_detail()
    prefix_names = [business, delay_str]

    if key_str:
        prefix_names.append(key_str)

    index = len(prefix_names)

    prefix_names += [f_define.caliber_name, arithmetic_ob.generate_define_part_name(f_define.column.name)]

    if f_define.tops:
        top_alias = ''
        for top in f_define.tops:
            top_column = top.column
            for one in logic_table.columns:
                if one.column_name == top.column:
                    top_column = one.extra_props.column_alias if one.extra_props and one.extra_props.column_alias \
                        else top_column
                    break
            top_column = top_column.replace('_', '').capitalize()
            top_alias += 'F{}{}'.format(top.num, top_column) if top.rule == 'asc' else 'L{}{}'.format(top.num, top_column)

        if f_define.sort_list and f_define.sort_list[0] == "top":
            prefix_names[index] = top_alias
            prefix_names.append(f_define.caliber_name)
        else:
            prefix_names.append(top_alias)
    if f_define.window and f_define.window.interval is not None and f_define.window.interval != 0:
        window_name = f_define.window.column
        for one in logic_table.columns:
            if one.column_name == f_define.window.column:
                window_name = one.extra_props.column_alias if one.extra_props and one.extra_props.column_alias \
                    else window_name
                break
        window_alias = f"{TimeWindowDictService.get(f_define.window.interval).alias}" \
                       f"{window_name.replace('_', '').capitalize()}"
        prefix_names.append(window_alias)
    tmp_name = '_'.join(prefix_names)
    return tmp_name


def is_same_domain_column(new_domains: List[DefineDomain], old_domains: List[DefineDomain])->[bool, str]:
    prefix = ''
    for _new_val in new_domains:
        for _old_val in old_domains:
            if _new_val.domain_name == _old_val.domain_name and _new_val.column_name != _old_val.column_name:
                prefix = f"{prefix}{_new_val.column_name.replace('_', '').capitalize()}"
    return len(prefix) > 0, prefix


async def generate_describe(f_define: Define, logic_table:LogicTableDetail)->str:
    # logic_table = await MetaService(table_name=f_define.table_name).get_logic_table_detail()
    prefix_describe = [DomainService.generate_describe(f_define.domain_keys, Lang.CN.CODE)]
    if f_define.window:
        prefix_describe.append(TimeWindowDictService.get(f_define.window.interval).describe)
    if f_define.tops:
        if f_define.sort_list and f_define.sort_list[0] == 'top':
            prefix_describe.append(f_define.caliber_describe)
            prefix_describe.append(TopService.generate_describe(f_define.tops, f_define.arithmetic, Lang.CN.CODE))
        else:
            prefix_describe.append(TopService.generate_describe(f_define.tops, f_define.arithmetic, Lang.CN.CODE))
            prefix_describe.append(f_define.caliber_describe)
    else:
        prefix_describe.append(f_define.caliber_describe)
    arithmetic_ob = await ArithmeticService(f_define.arithmetic).get_detail()

    if f_define.arithmetic != 'hit':
        prefix_describe.append(AtomicFieldService(logic_table, f_define.column.name).generate_describe())
    prefix_describe.append(arithmetic_ob.generate_describe())
    return ''.join(prefix_describe)


async def generate_en_describe(f_define: Define, logic_table:LogicTableDetail)->str:
    # logic_table = await MetaService(table_name=f_define.table_name).get_logic_table_detail()
    if f_define.caliber_en_describe is None or f_define.caliber_en_describe == '':
        return ''
    arithmetic_ob = await ArithmeticService(f_define.arithmetic).get_detail()
    prefix_describe = [arithmetic_ob.generate_en_describe()]
    if f_define.tops:
        if f_define.sort_list and f_define.sort_list[0] == 'top':
            prefix_describe.append(f_define.caliber_en_describe)
            prefix_describe.append(TopService.generate_describe(f_define.tops, f_define.arithmetic, Lang.EN.CODE))
        else:
            prefix_describe.append(TopService.generate_describe(f_define.tops, f_define.arithmetic, Lang.EN.CODE))
            prefix_describe.append(f_define.caliber_en_describe)
    else:
        prefix_describe.append(f_define.caliber_en_describe)
    if f_define.arithmetic != 'hit':
        prefix_describe.append(AtomicFieldService(logic_table, f_define.column.name).generate_en_describe())  #
    if f_define.window:
        en_describe = TimeWindowDictService.get(f_define.window.interval).en_describe
        en_describe = en_describe if en_describe else ''
        prefix_describe.append(en_describe)
    prefix_describe.append(DomainService.generate_describe(f_define.domain_keys, Lang.EN.CODE))
    return ' '.join(prefix_describe)


class GenerateDefineService(BaseService):

    @staticmethod
    def generate_define_describe(feature_define: FeatureDefine) -> str:
        pass

    @staticmethod
    async def sort_domain(domains: List[DefineDomain], domain_object: DomainDetail) ->List[DefineDomain]:
        #        relate_domain
        _mapper = {}
        for i in domains:
            column_list = _mapper.get(i.domain_name, [])
            column_list.append(i)
            _mapper[i.domain_name] = column_list
        return [_mapper.get(i).pop(0) for i in domain_object.relate_domain]

    @staticmethod
    async def build_define(feature_define: FeatureDefine) -> List[Define]:
        #
        defines = []
        _filter = caliber_schema.CaliberFilter(table_name=feature_define.table, caliber_names=feature_define.calibers)
        accuracy = feature_define.accuracy if feature_define.accuracy is not None else -1
        logic_table = await MetaService(table_name=feature_define.table).get_logic_table_detail()
        get_domain_column_require(logic_table, feature_define.domains)
        caliber_obj = await CaliberService.get_list(caliber_schema.ListReq(filter=_filter))
        domain_object, tip = await DomainService.generate_define([i.domain_name for i in feature_define.domains])
        if tip:
            raise errors.DomainExistsError(tip)
        domain_list = await GenerateDefineService.sort_domain(feature_define.domains, domain_object)
        domain_keys = [i.dict() for i in domain_list]
        atomic_fields = feature_define.atomic_fields if feature_define.atomic_fields else [None]
        atomic_filed_list = [await AtomicFieldService(logic_table, _filed).build_define() for _filed in atomic_fields]

        # tops = feature_define.top.top if feature_define.top else [None]
        windows = feature_define.window if feature_define.window else [None]
        if feature_define.sort_list and feature_define.sort_list[0] == "top":
            sort_list = ['top', 'caliber']
        else:
            sort_list = None

        # for column, _caliber, rule, interval in product(atomic_filed_list, caliber_obj.list, tops, windows):
        for column, _caliber, interval in product(atomic_filed_list, caliber_obj.list, windows):

            window = Window2Calc(column=feature_define.window_column, interval=interval)\
                if feature_define.window_column else None
            # top = Top2Calc(column=feature_define.top.top_column, num=feature_define.top.num,
            #                rule=rule) if feature_define.top else None
            _define = Define(caliber_id=_caliber.id, country_ids=_caliber.country_ids, window=window, tops=feature_define.tops, column=column,
                             table_name=feature_define.table, domain_keys=domain_keys,
                             arithmetic=feature_define.arithmetic,
                             caliber_name=_caliber.caliber_name,
                             caliber_describe=_caliber.describe, caliber_en_describe=_caliber.en_describe,
                             condition=caliber_schema.Condition(sql=_caliber.content, tree=_caliber.tree),
                             feature_name='', domain_name=domain_object.domain_name, domain_id=domain_object.id,
                             default=ArithmeticService(feature_define.arithmetic).generate_define_default(),
                             sort_list=sort_list, accuracy=accuracy)

            defines.append(_define)
        return defines

    @staticmethod
    async def generate_define_properties(feature_define: FeatureDefine) -> List[FeatureDetailProperty]:
        #
        defines = await GenerateDefineService.build_define(feature_define)
        #
        logic_table = await MetaService(table_name=feature_define.table).get_logic_table_detail()
        table = parse_meta_table(logic_table)
        #
        init_out = InitOut(
            feature_list=defines, tables={feature_define.table: table}, total=len(defines))
        data = await CalculateService.req_feature_define_sql(init_out)
        ret = []
        for i, _calc in zip(defines, data.feature_list):
            one = i.dict()
            one['delays'] = _calc.delays
            one['delay'] = constants.CalcServiceDelay.get_attr_by_code(_calc.delay).CODE
            one['atomic_field'] = i.column.name if i.column else None
            one['window'] = TimeWindowDictService.get(i.window.interval).alias if i.window else None
            one['window_column'] = i.window.column if i.window else None
            if i.tops:
                top_list = []
                for top in i.tops:
                    top_list.append(top.column + ' ' + top.rule)
                one['top'] = 'order by %s limit %s' % (','.join(top_list), i.tops[0].num)
            # if i.top:
            #     one['top'] = 'F{}'.format(i.top.num) if i.top.rule == 'asc' else 'L{}'.format(i.top.num)
            # one['top_column'] = i.top.column if i.top else None
            one['allow_event'] = [constants.AllowEvent.Normal.CODE]
            one['msg'] = _calc.msg
            ret.append(one)
        return list(map(FeatureDetailProperty.parse_obj, ret))

    @staticmethod
    async def generate_feature(define_req:FeatureDefineReq)->ListOut:
        # define_req.feature_define.top_num use for frontend
        if define_req.feature_define.top_num and define_req.feature_define.tops:
            for i in define_req.feature_define.tops:
                i.num = define_req.feature_define.top_num
        # await ProcessInitFunc.start_up_do_init()
        #
        feature_define = define_req.feature_define
        defines = await GenerateDefineService.build_define(feature_define)
        logic_table = await MetaService(table_name=feature_define.table).get_logic_table_detail()
        all_offline = True
        for i, property_define in zip(defines, define_req.property_define):
            if property_define.delay != constants.CalcServiceDelay.Day.CODE:
                all_offline = False
            i.delay = property_define.delay
            i.feature_name = await generate_name(i, logic_table.business_domain, '', logic_table)

        user = RequestCxt.get_user()
        arithmetic_ob = await ArithmeticService(feature_define.arithmetic).get_detail()
        arithmetic_id = arithmetic_ob.arithmetic_id
        # todo        (               пјү
        if all_offline is False:
            await DomainKeySqlGetTer(table_name=feature_define.table, domain_id=defines[0].domain_id,
                                     define_domain=feature_define.domains,
                                     logic_table=logic_table).save_domain_keys_sql()
        #
        table = parse_meta_table(logic_table)

        request_calc_defines = copy.deepcopy(defines)
        for i in request_calc_defines:
            # check if arithmetic is 'select', set arithmetic = ''
            i.arithmetic = arithmetic_ob.generate_define_arithmetic()
        init_out = InitOut(
            feature_list=request_calc_defines, tables={feature_define.table: table}, total=len(defines))
        data = await CalculateService.req_feature_define_sql(init_out)
        #        window top auto_filed

        window_details = await WindowService(feature_define.table, feature_define.window_column,
                                             feature_define.window).create_windows()
        window_id_map = {one.time_interval: one.id for one in window_details}
        top_details = await TopService(feature_define.table, feature_define.tops, feature_define.arithmetic).create_tops()
        top_ids = ','.join([str(i.id) for i in top_details])
        field_details = []
        if feature_define.atomic_fields:
            for field in feature_define.atomic_fields:
                field_details.append(await AtomicFieldService(logic_table, field).create())
        field_map = {one.column: one.id for one in field_details}

        #
        init_req = FeatureFilter(feature_names=[one.feature_name for one in defines],
                                 domain_names=[defines[0].domain_name],
                                 status_code_include_99=True,
                                 is_standard=1,
                                 request_from=FEATURE_CALC_SERVER)
        init_out = await FeatureService.get_list(ListReq(filter=init_req))
        init_out_dict = {i.feature_name: i for i in init_out.feature_list}
        is_all_online = True
        #

        # flag=0: no repeat feature, can create it
        # flag=2: this table has other column use same domain, so use current column generate new feature name and create it
        # flag=1: this table has same column use same domain, and the feature is onlined
        # flag=3: this table has same column use same domain, and the feature is not onlined, need to check if it is bind on existed work order
        def is_same_feature(one: Define)->[int, str]:
            exist_feature = init_out_dict.get(one.feature_name)
            if not exist_feature:
                return 0, ''
            check_same, prefix = is_same_domain_column(one.domain_keys, exist_feature.domain_keys)
            if check_same is True:
                return 2, prefix
            elif exist_feature.status_code == constants.FeatureOnlineStatus.Online.CODE:
                return 1, ''
            else:
                return 3, ''

        #
        result = []
        now = int(time.time()*1000)
        exist_features = []
        async with TFeatureDefineModel.transaction():
            for one, _cal in zip(defines, data.feature_list):
                status_code = constants.FeatureOnlineStatus.NewCreate.CODE
                flag, column_prefix = is_same_feature(one)
                if flag in [0, 2, 3]:
                    is_all_online = False
                if flag == 2:
                    one.feature_name = await generate_name(one, logic_table.business_domain, column_prefix, logic_table)
                if flag == 1:
                    status_code == constants.FeatureOnlineStatus.Online.CODE

                delay = constants.CalcServiceDelay.get_attr_by_code(one.delay)
                if constants.AllowEvent.SetPrice.CODE in property_define.allow_event:
                    allow_event = [constants.AllowEvent.SetPrice.CODE]
                else:
                    allow_event = None
                describe = await generate_describe(one, logic_table)
                en_describe = await generate_en_describe(one, logic_table)
                info = {'business': logic_table.business_domain, 'logic_table_id': one.table_name,
                        'status_code': constants.FeatureOnlineStatus.NewCreate.CODE, 'is_standard': 1,
                        'describe': (en_describe or one.feature_name) if get_lang_by_env() == Lang.EN.CODE else describe,
                        'en_describe': en_describe,
                        'caliber_id': one.caliber_id, 'data_type': arithmetic_ob.generate_define_date_type(one.column.type),
                        'maintainer': user, 'sql_content': _cal.format_sql,
                        'domain_column_operate': json.dumps([i.dict() for i in one.domain_keys]),
                        'arithmetic_id': arithmetic_id, 'create_time': now, 'update_time': now,
                        'delay': delay.MAP_OBJ.CODE, 'default': property_define.default, 'allow_event': allow_event,
                        'country_ids': one.country_ids, }
                if one.tops:
                    info.update({'top_id': top_ids})
                if one.window:
                    info.update({'window_id': window_id_map.get(one.window.interval)})
                if field_map.get(one.column.name):
                    info.update({'field_id': field_map.get(one.column.name)})
                info['extra_info'] = {'accuracy': one.accuracy}
                if one.sort_list:
                    info['extra_info'].update({'sort_list': one.sort_list})
                info['extra_info'] = json.dumps(info['extra_info'])
                if flag in [0, 2, 1]:
                    _orm, created = await TFeatureDefineModel.get_or_create(defaults=info, domain_id=one.domain_id, name=one.feature_name)
                    info['id'] = _orm.pk
                    # flag=1: this table has same column use same domain, and the feature is onlined, skip it
                    if flag == 1:
                        row = await TFeatureWordOrderBindDefineModel.select_one(Q(feature_id=_orm.pk, order__type_code=WorkOrderType.StandardFeature.CODE), ['order_id']) or {}
                        exist_features.append({
                            'name': one.domain_name + '.' + one.feature_name,
                            'order_id': row.get('order_id'),
                            'status_code': constants.FeatureOnlineStatus.Online.CODE
                        })
                        continue
                elif flag == 3:
                    # flag=3: this table has same column use same domain, and the feature is not onlined, need to check if it is bind on existed work order
                    detail = await FeatureService(domain=one.domain_name, name=one.feature_name).get_detail()
                    row = await TFeatureWordOrderBindDefineModel.select_one(Q(feature_id=detail.id, order__type_code=WorkOrderType.StandardFeature.CODE), ['order_id']) or {}
                    if len(row) > 0:
                        exist_features.append({
                            'name': one.domain_name + '.' + one.feature_name,
                            'order_id': row.get('order_id'),
                            'status_code': detail.status_code
                        })
                        continue
                    await TFeatureDefineModel.update_many(
                        Q(domain_id=one.domain_id, name=one.feature_name, status_code__not=constants.FeatureOnlineStatus.Online.CODE),
                        **info)
                    info['id'] = detail.id

                info.update(
                    name=one.feature_name, domain=one.domain_name, domain_id=one.domain_id,
                    delay_code=delay.MAP_OBJ.CODE, delay=delay.MAP_OBJ.DESC,
                    data_type=DictMapperService.trans_data_type(info['data_type']),
                    status=DictMapperService.trans_online_status(status_code),
                    allow_event=DictMapperService.trans_event(allow_event)
                )
                result.append(FeatureDetail.parse_obj(info))
        payload = {'total': len(result), 'list': result, 'isAllOnline': is_all_online,
                   'exist_features_tip': GenerateDefineService.generate_exist_features_tip(exist_features)}

        # print(ListOut.parse_obj(payload))
        return ListOut.parse_obj(payload)

    @staticmethod
    def generate_exist_features_tip(exist_features: List[dict]) -> str:
        exist_features_tip = ''
        for i in exist_features:
            if i.get('order_id'):
                exist_features_tip += '%s exist in %s work order, status: %s\n' % (
                    i.get('name'), i.get('order_id'), FeatureOnlineStatus.get_attr_by_code(i.get('status_code')).DESC)
            else:
                exist_features_tip += '%s not exist in any work order, status: %s\n' % (
                    i.get('name'), FeatureOnlineStatus.get_attr_by_code(i.get('status_code')).DESC)
        return exist_features_tip

if __name__ == '__main__':
    content = '''{"feature_define":{"table_type":"view","table":"xxaadas","domains":[{"domain_name":"icno","op":"=","column_name":"T1_ic_no"}],"atomic_fields":["T2_loan_id"],"arithmetic":"count(distinct)","calibers":["SlikADpd1yG0Loan","SlikADpd6mG0Loan","SlikADpd3mG0Loan"]},"property_define":[{"default":"0","delay":1,"allow_event":[-1],"caliber_id":1124,"caliber_name":"SlikADpd1yG0Loan","arithmetic":"count(distinct)","atomic_field":"T2_loan_id","window":null,"top":null,"delays":[3,1]},{"default":"0","delay":1,"allow_event":[-1],"caliber_id":1123,"caliber_name":"SlikADpd6mG0Loan","arithmetic":"count(distinct)","atomic_field":"T2_loan_id","window":null,"top":null,"delays":[3,1]},{"default":"0","delay":1,"allow_event":[-1],"caliber_id":1122,"caliber_name":"SlikADpd3mG0Loan","arithmetic":"count(distinct)","atomic_field":"T2_loan_id","window":null,"top":null,"delays":[3,1]}]}'''
    req = FeatureDefineReq.parse_obj(json.loads(content))
    import asyncio
    asyncio.get_event_loop().run_until_complete(GenerateDefineService.generate_feature(req))

```

**code file end: service/feature_service/generate_service.py**

### code file start: service/feature_service/import_batch_nonstandard_features_service.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import json
import tempfile

import xlrd
from fastapi import UploadFile

from common import constants
from common.constants import FeatureType, DelayTypeStatusCodeDesc, StoreIn, MongodbType
from common.settings import get_json_config
from common.utils import is_number
from connectors.mongo_conn.mongodb_tool import MongodbTool
from middlewares.async_context import RequestCxt
from models.feature_model import TFeatureDefineModel
from schemas import domain_schema, feature_schema
from schemas.domain_schema import DomainFilter
from schemas.feature_schema import FeatureFilter
from schemas.work_order_schema import OrderFeatureInfo
from service import BaseService
from service.dict_mapper_service import DictMapperService
from service.domain_service import DomainService
from service.feature_service.feature_service import FeatureService
from service.work_order_service.work_order_status_machine import WorkOrderStatusMachine
from utils import ExcelWriter
from utils.time import timestamp

OPTION = get_json_config('import_nonstandard_feature_option', {})

class ImportBatchNonstandardFeaturesService(BaseService):

    @classmethod
    async def batch_nonstandard_features(cls, file: UploadFile):
        with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False) as tmp:
            tmp.write(await file.read())
            tmp_path = tmp.name
        workbook = xlrd.open_workbook(tmp_path)
        # йҖүжӢ©з¬¬дёҖдёӘе·ҘдҪңиЎЁ
        sheet = workbook.sheet_by_index(0)
        nonstandard_features = []
        # иҜ»еҸ–жҜҸдёҖиЎҢзҡ„ж•°жҚ®
        for rowx in range(1, sheet.nrows):
            row = sheet.row_values(rowx)
            if row[0] is None or str(row[0]).strip() == '':
                break
            src_default = str(row[9]).strip()
            if is_number(src_default):
                src_default = str(int(float(src_default)))
            nonstandard_features.append({
                "src_domain": str(row[0]).strip() or '',
                "src_feature_name": str(row[1]).strip() or '',
                "src_mongodb_database": str(row[2]).strip() or '',
                "src_mongodb_table": str(row[3]).strip() or '',
                "src_business": str(row[4]).strip().upper() or '',
                "src_describe": str(row[5]).strip() or '',
                "src_en_describe": str(row[6]).strip() or '',
                "src_country_id": int(float(str(row[7]).strip())) or '',
                "src_delay": str(row[8]).strip() or '',
                "src_default": src_default,
                "src_data_type": str(row[10]).strip() or '',
                "src_is_price": str(row[11]).strip() or '',
            })
        content = await cls.process_excel_nonstandard_features(nonstandard_features)
        return content

    @classmethod
    async def process_excel_nonstandard_features(cls, nonstandard_features):
        src_domain_list = [i.get('src_domain') for i in nonstandard_features if i.get('src_domain')]
        domain_list = await DomainService.get_list(domain_schema.ListReq(
            filter=DomainFilter(page=1, size=10000, domain_names=src_domain_list, is_standard=1)))
        exist_domain_dict = {i.domain_name: i.id for i in domain_list.list}

        src_feature_name_list = [i.get('src_feature_name') for i in nonstandard_features if i.get('src_feature_name')]
        feature_list = await FeatureService.get_list(feature_schema.ListReq(
            filter=FeatureFilter(page=1, size=10000, feature_names=src_feature_name_list, status_code_include_99=True)))
        exist_feature_list = [i.domain + '.' + i.name for i in feature_list.list]
        now = timestamp()
        src_domain_set = set([i.get('src_domain') for i in nonstandard_features])
        has_problem = False
        for i in nonstandard_features:
            i['problem_list'] = []

            if len(src_domain_set) > 1:
                i['problem_list'].append('please enter same domain;')
            if i.get('src_domain') not in exist_domain_dict.keys():
                i['problem_list'].append('domain not exist;')
            if i.get('src_domain') + '.' + i.get('src_feature_name') in exist_feature_list:
                i['problem_list'].append('domain + feature_name exist;')
            if i.get('src_mongodb_database') not in OPTION.get('mongodb_database', []):
                i['problem_list'].append('mongodb_database error;')
            if i.get('src_business') not in OPTION.get('business', []):
                i['problem_list'].append('business error;')
            if i.get('src_country_id') not in OPTION.get('country_id', []):
                i['problem_list'].append('country_id error;')
            if i.get('src_delay') not in OPTION.get('delay', []):
                i['problem_list'].append('delay error;')
            if i.get('src_default') not in OPTION.get('default', []):
                i['problem_list'].append('default error;')
            if i.get('src_data_type') not in OPTION.get('data_type', []):
                i['problem_list'].append('data_type error;')
            if i.get('src_is_price') not in OPTION.get('is_price', []):
                i['problem_list'].append('is_price error;')

            if i['problem_list']:
                has_problem = True

        if has_problem:
            for i in nonstandard_features:
                i['process_result'] = ''.join(i['problem_list'])
                i['work_order_id'] = None
        else:
            feature_id_list = []
            for i in nonstandard_features:
                info = {
                    'domain_id': exist_domain_dict.get(i.get('src_domain')), 'name': i.get('src_feature_name'),
                    'database_name': i.get('src_mongodb_database'), 'logic_table_id': i.get('src_mongodb_table'),
                    'business': i.get('src_business'),
                    'describe': i.get('src_describe'), 'en_describe': i.get('src_en_describe'),
                    'country_ids': str([i.get('src_country_id')]),
                    'delay': DelayTypeStatusCodeDesc.sd.CODE if i.get('src_delay') == 'realtime' else DelayTypeStatusCodeDesc.dd.CODE,
                    'default': i.get('src_default'),
                    'data_type': DictMapperService.trans_data_type2code(i.get('src_data_type')),
                    'allow_event': '[7]' if i.get('src_is_price') == 'yes' else None,
                    'store_in': StoreIn.MONGODB,
                    'status_code': constants.FeatureOnlineStatus.NotOnline.CODE,
                    'is_standard': FeatureType.NonstandardFeature.CODE,
                    'maintainer': RequestCxt.get_user(),
                    'create_time': now, 'update_time': now
                }
                obj = await TFeatureDefineModel.insert_one(**info)
                feature_id_list.append(obj.pk)
                i['process_result'] = 'success'

            order_params = {
                'dest_order_status': constants.NonstandardFeatureCodeDesc.nonstandard_feature_to_be_online.NAME,
                'dest_type_code': constants.WorkOrderType.NonstandardFeature.CODE,
                'dest_order_delay': constants.OrderDelayCodeDesc.Real.CODE,
                'order_feature_infos': [OrderFeatureInfo(feature_id=i) for i in feature_id_list],
                'is_change_bind': False
            }
            machine = WorkOrderStatusMachine(**order_params)
            await machine.change_status()

            for i in nonstandard_features:
                i['work_order_id'] = machine.order_id

            mongodb_infos = cls.group_same_database_table(nonstandard_features)
            for _, v in mongodb_infos.items():
                MongodbTool.generate_presto_schema(MongodbType.NONSTANDARD, v.get('database_name'), v.get('table_name'), v.get('feature_datatype_dict'))

        header = ['domain', 'feature_name', 'mongodb_database', 'mongodb_table', 'business', 'describe', 'en_describe',
                  'country_id', 'delay', 'default', 'data_type', 'is_price', 'process_result', 'work_order_id']
        header_map = {
            'domain': 'src_domain',
            'feature_name': 'src_feature_name',
            'mongodb_database': 'src_mongodb_database',
            'mongodb_table': 'src_mongodb_table',
            'business': 'src_business',
            'describe': 'src_describe',
            'en_describe': 'src_en_describe',
            'country_id': 'src_country_id',
            'delay': 'src_delay',
            'default': 'src_default',
            'data_type': 'src_data_type',
            'is_price': 'src_is_price',

            'process_result': 'process_result',
            'work_order_id': 'work_order_id',
        }
        _writer = ExcelWriter(header=header, header_map=header_map, need_width_ratio=1.2)
        _writer.write_data(nonstandard_features)
        return _writer.out

    @classmethod
    def group_same_database_table(cls, nonstandard_features):
        result = {}
        for item in nonstandard_features:
            key = item['src_mongodb_database'] + '.' + item['src_mongodb_table']
            if key not in result:
                result[key] = {
                    'database_name': item['src_mongodb_database'],
                    'table_name': item['src_mongodb_table'],
                    'feature_datatype_dict': {}
                }
            result[key]['feature_datatype_dict'][item['src_feature_name']] = item['src_data_type']
        return result
```

**code file end: service/feature_service/import_batch_nonstandard_features_service.py**

### code file start: service/feature_service/import_batch_polardb2mongodb_features_service.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import json
import tempfile

import xlrd
from fastapi import UploadFile
from tortoise.expressions import Q

from common import constants
from common.constants import FeatureType, DelayTypeStatusCodeDesc, FeatureOnlineStatus, StoreIn, MongodbType
from common.settings import get_json_config
from connectors.mongo_conn.mongodb_tool import MongodbTool
from models.feature_model import TFeatureDefineModel
from schemas import domain_schema, feature_schema
from schemas.domain_schema import DomainFilter
from schemas.feature_schema import FeatureFilter
from schemas.work_order_schema import OrderFeatureInfo
from service import BaseService
from service.domain_service import DomainService
from service.feature_service.feature_service import FeatureService
from service.feature_service.import_batch_nonstandard_features_service import ImportBatchNonstandardFeaturesService
from service.work_order_service.work_order_status_machine import WorkOrderStatusMachine
from utils import ExcelWriter

OPTION = get_json_config('import_nonstandard_feature_option', {})

class ImportBatchPolardb2MongodbFeaturesService(BaseService):

    @classmethod
    async def batch_polardb2mongodb_features(cls, file: UploadFile):
        with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False) as tmp:
            tmp.write(await file.read())
            tmp_path = tmp.name
        workbook = xlrd.open_workbook(tmp_path)
        # йҖүжӢ©з¬¬дёҖдёӘе·ҘдҪңиЎЁ
        sheet = workbook.sheet_by_index(0)
        polardb2mongodb_features = []
        # иҜ»еҸ–жҜҸдёҖиЎҢзҡ„ж•°жҚ®
        for rowx in range(1, sheet.nrows):
            row = sheet.row_values(rowx)
            if row[0] is None or str(row[0]).strip() == '':
                break
            polardb2mongodb_features.append({
                "src_domain": str(row[0]).strip() or '',
                "src_feature_name": str(row[1]).strip() or '',
                "src_mongodb_database": str(row[2]).strip() or '',
                "src_mongodb_table": str(row[3]).strip() or '',
            })
        content = await cls.process_excel_polardb2mongodb_features(polardb2mongodb_features)
        return content

    @classmethod
    async def process_excel_polardb2mongodb_features(cls, polardb2mongodb_features):
        src_domain_list = [i.get('src_domain') for i in polardb2mongodb_features if i.get('src_domain')]
        domain_list = await DomainService.get_list(domain_schema.ListReq(
            filter=DomainFilter(page=1, size=10000, domain_names=src_domain_list)))
        exist_domain_dict = {i.domain_name: i.id for i in domain_list.list}

        src_feature_name_list = [i.get('src_feature_name') for i in polardb2mongodb_features if i.get('src_feature_name')]
        feature_list = await FeatureService.get_list(feature_schema.ListReq(
            filter=FeatureFilter(page=1, size=10000, feature_names=src_feature_name_list,
                                 is_standard=FeatureType.NonstandardFeature.CODE, status_code_include=[FeatureOnlineStatus.Online.CODE])))
        exist_feature_infos = {i.domain + '.' + i.name : i for i in feature_list.list}
        src_domain_set = set([i.get('src_domain') for i in polardb2mongodb_features])
        has_problem = False
        for i in polardb2mongodb_features:
            i['problem_list'] = []

            if len(src_domain_set) > 1:
                i['problem_list'].append('please enter same domain;')
            if i.get('src_domain') not in exist_domain_dict.keys():
                i['problem_list'].append('domain not exist;')
            feature_info = exist_feature_infos.get(i.get('src_domain') + '.' + i.get('src_feature_name'))
            if feature_info is None:
                i['problem_list'].append('domain + feature_name not exist;')
            if feature_info.store_in in [StoreIn.MONGODB, StoreIn.POLAR2MONGODB_IN_PROGRESS]:
                i['problem_list'].append('feature moved to mongodb already or move to mongodb in progress;')
            if i.get('src_mongodb_database') not in OPTION.get('mongodb_database', []):
                i['problem_list'].append('mongodb_database error;')
            i['src_data_type'] = feature_info.data_type
            if i['problem_list']:
                has_problem = True

        if has_problem:
            for i in polardb2mongodb_features:
                i['process_result'] = ''.join(i['problem_list'])
                i['work_order_id'] = None
        else:
            feature_id_list = []
            dest_order_delay = None
            for i in polardb2mongodb_features:
                feature_info = exist_feature_infos.get(i.get('src_domain') + '.' + i.get('src_feature_name'))
                if dest_order_delay is None:
                    dest_order_delay = constants.OrderDelayCodeDesc.Offline.CODE if feature_info.delay_code == DelayTypeStatusCodeDesc.dd.CODE \
                        else constants.OrderDelayCodeDesc.Real.CODE
                query = Q(id=feature_info.id, domain_id=exist_domain_dict.get(i.get('src_domain')), name=i.get('src_feature_name'))
                await TFeatureDefineModel.update_many(query, store_in=StoreIn.POLAR2MONGODB_IN_PROGRESS,
                                                      database_name=i.get('src_mongodb_database'), logic_table_id=i.get('src_mongodb_table'))
                feature_id_list.append(feature_info.id)
                i['process_result'] = 'success'

            order_params = {
                'dest_order_status': constants.Polardb2MongodbFeatureCodeDesc.polardb2mongodb_feature_to_be_publish.NAME,
                'dest_type_code': constants.WorkOrderType.Polardb2MongodbFeature.CODE,
                'dest_order_delay': dest_order_delay,
                'order_feature_infos': [OrderFeatureInfo(feature_id=i) for i in feature_id_list],
                'is_change_bind': False
            }
            machine = WorkOrderStatusMachine(**order_params)
            await machine.change_status()

            for i in polardb2mongodb_features:
                i['work_order_id'] = machine.order_id

            mongodb_infos = ImportBatchNonstandardFeaturesService.group_same_database_table(polardb2mongodb_features)
            for _, v in mongodb_infos.items():
                MongodbTool.generate_presto_schema(MongodbType.NONSTANDARD, v.get('database_name'), v.get('table_name'), v.get('feature_datatype_dict'))

        header = ['domain', 'feature_name', 'mongodb_database', 'mongodb_table', 'process_result', 'work_order_id']
        header_map = {
            'domain': 'src_domain',
            'feature_name': 'src_feature_name',
            'mongodb_database': 'src_mongodb_database',
            'mongodb_table': 'src_mongodb_table',

            'process_result': 'process_result',
            'work_order_id': 'work_order_id',
        }
        _writer = ExcelWriter(header=header, header_map=header_map, need_width_ratio=1.2)
        _writer.write_data(polardb2mongodb_features)
        return _writer.out
```

**code file end: service/feature_service/import_batch_polardb2mongodb_features_service.py**

### code file start: service/feature_service/import_batch_scene_features_service.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import json
import tempfile
from typing import List, Tuple

import xlrd
from fastapi import UploadFile
from tortoise.models import Q

from common import constants
from common.constants import WorkOrderType, FeatureOnlineStatus
from common.logger import root_logger
from models.work_order_model import TFeatureWordOrderBindDefineModel
from schemas import scenes_schema
from schemas.feature_schema import SceneDomain, FeatureFilter, ListReq, SceneFeatureDefine
from service import BaseService
from service.domain_service import DomainService
from service.feature_service.feature_service import FeatureService
from service.feature_service.scene_feature_service import SceneFeatureService
from service.scenes_service import ScenesService
from service.work_order_service.work_order_service import WorkOrderService
from utils import ExcelWriter

class ImportBatchSceneFeaturesService(BaseService):

    @classmethod
    async def batch_scenes_features(cls, file: UploadFile):
        with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False) as tmp:
            tmp.write(await file.read())
            tmp_path = tmp.name
        workbook = xlrd.open_workbook(tmp_path)
        # йҖүжӢ©з¬¬дёҖдёӘе·ҘдҪңиЎЁ
        sheet = workbook.sheet_by_index(0)
        scenes_features = []
        # иҜ»еҸ–жҜҸдёҖиЎҢзҡ„ж•°жҚ®
        for rowx in range(1, sheet.nrows):
            row = sheet.row_values(rowx)
            if row[0] is None or str(row[0]).strip() == '':
                break
            scenes_features.append({
                "src_no": str(row[0]) or '',
                "src_tapd_id": str(row[1]) or '',
                "src_country": str(row[2]) or '',
                "src_business": str(row[3]) or '',
                "src_channel": str(row[4]) or '',
                "src_event": str(row[5]) or '',
                "src_input_params": str(row[6]) or '',
                "src_base_features": str(row[7]) or '',
            })
        content = await cls.process_excel_scenes_features(scenes_features)
        return content

    @classmethod
    async def process_excel_scenes_features(cls, scenes_features):
        group_define_dict = {}
        has_problem_group_key_set = set()
        group_orderid_dict = {}
        for i in scenes_features:
            i['problem_list'] = []
            i['tip_list'] = []
            # i['tmp_tip_list'] = []

            is_scene_four_item_valid = False
            # check scene four item valid
            i['country_id'], item_problem_list1 = cls.get_id_and_check('country_id', i['src_country'])
            i['business_id'], item_problem_list2 = cls.get_id_and_check('business_id', i['src_business'])
            i['channel_id'], item_problem_list3 = cls.get_id_and_check('channel_id', i['src_channel'])
            i['event_id'], item_problem_list4 = cls.get_id_and_check('event_id', i['src_event'])
            i['problem_list'].extend(item_problem_list1)
            i['problem_list'].extend(item_problem_list2)
            i['problem_list'].extend(item_problem_list3)
            i['problem_list'].extend(item_problem_list4)

            # check scene exist
            if i['country_id'] and i['business_id'] and i['channel_id'] and i['event_id']:
                scenes_list = await ScenesService.get_list(scenes_schema.ListReq(filter=scenes_schema.ListFilter(
                    country_id=i['country_id'], engine_event_id=i['event_id'], business_type=i['business_id'], engine_channel_id=i['channel_id'])))
                if scenes_list.total == 0:
                    i['problem_list'].append('not exist scene, check scene four item;')
                else:
                    is_scene_four_item_valid = True
                    root_logger.info(f'exist scene count: {str(scenes_list.total)};')
                    # i['tmp_tip_list'].append(f'exist scene count: {str(scenes_list.total)};')

            # check scenes input params valid
            alias_scene_domain_list, input_params_problem_list = cls.process_scenes_input_params(i['src_input_params'])
            i['problem_list'].extend(input_params_problem_list)

            # check domain exist
            domain = None
            if alias_scene_domain_list:
                domain, tip = await DomainService.generate_define([i.domain_name for i in alias_scene_domain_list])
                if domain:
                    alias_scene_domain_list = SceneFeatureService.reorder_scene_domain(domain, alias_scene_domain_list)
                if tip:
                    i['problem_list'].append(tip)

            # check alias match report field
            scene_domain_list = []
            if is_scene_four_item_valid and alias_scene_domain_list:
                scene_columns = (await ScenesService().get_scenes_columns(scenes_schema.ScenesDetailReq(
                    country_id=i['country_id'], engine_event_id=i['event_id'], business_type=i['business_id'],
                    engine_channel_id=i['channel_id'])))[0]
                for scene_domain in alias_scene_domain_list:
                    exist_match = False
                    for item in scene_columns.value:
                        if item.name == scene_domain.domain_column:
                            scene_domain_list.append(SceneDomain(domain_name=scene_domain.domain_name, op=scene_domain.op, domain_column=item.id))
                            exist_match = True
                    if not exist_match:
                        i['problem_list'].append(f'alias {scene_domain.domain_column} not match report field;')

            i['base_features'] = []
            i['feature_ids'] = []
            if i['src_base_features'] is None or i['src_base_features'].strip() == '':
                i['problem_list'].append(f'base features is empty;')
            else:
                base_features = []
                for base_feature in i['src_base_features'].split(';'):
                    base_feature = base_feature.strip()
                    if base_feature != '' and base_feature not in base_features:
                        base_features.append(base_feature)
                if len(base_features) == 0:
                    i['problem_list'].append(f'base features is empty;')
                # check base features exist
                elif domain:
                    feature_list = await FeatureService.get_list(
                        ListReq(filter=FeatureFilter(domain_names=domain.relate_domain, gen_scene=True, feature_names=base_features)))
                    for base_feature in base_features:
                        exist_base_feature = False
                        for feature in feature_list.list:
                            if base_feature == feature.name:
                                i['base_features'].append(feature.name)
                                i['feature_ids'].append(feature.id)
                                exist_base_feature = True
                        if not exist_base_feature:
                            i['problem_list'].append(f'base feature {base_feature} not exist;')

            # check scenes feature names exist, just as tip
            if is_scene_four_item_valid and alias_scene_domain_list and i['base_features'] and i['feature_ids']:
                prefix = '_'.join(i.domain_column for i in alias_scene_domain_list)
                i['scenes_feature_names'] = [f'{prefix}__{base_feature}' for base_feature in i['base_features']]
                exist_scenes_features = await SceneFeatureService.get_list(ListReq(filter=FeatureFilter(
                    is_scene=True, country_id=i['country_id'], engine_event_id=i['event_id'],
                    business_id=i['business_id'], channel_id=i['channel_id'],
                    feature_names=i['scenes_feature_names'], status_code_include_99=True)))
                for exist_scenes_feature in exist_scenes_features.list:
                    bind_order_row = await TFeatureWordOrderBindDefineModel.select_one(
                        Q(feature_id=exist_scenes_feature.id, order__type_code=WorkOrderType.SceneFeature.CODE), ['order_id']) or {}
                    if len(bind_order_row) > 0 or exist_scenes_feature.status_code == constants.FeatureOnlineStatus.Online.CODE:
                        root_logger.info("i['base_features']: %s, remove: %s" % (json.dumps(i['base_features']), exist_scenes_feature.rely_feature_name))
                        root_logger.info("i['feature_ids']: %s, remove: %s" % (json.dumps(i['feature_ids']), exist_scenes_feature.rely_feature_id))
                        root_logger.info("i['scenes_feature_names']: %s, remove: %s" % (json.dumps(i['scenes_feature_names']), exist_scenes_feature.name))
                        i['base_features'].remove(exist_scenes_feature.rely_feature_name)
                        i['feature_ids'].remove(int(exist_scenes_feature.rely_feature_id))
                        i['scenes_feature_names'].remove(exist_scenes_feature.name)
                        if len(bind_order_row) > 0:
                            i['tip_list'].append('%s exist in %s work order, status: %s;' % (
                                exist_scenes_feature.name, bind_order_row.get('order_id'),
                                FeatureOnlineStatus.get_attr_by_code(exist_scenes_feature.status_code).DESC))
                        else:
                            i['tip_list'].append('%s not exist in any work order, status: %s;' % (
                                exist_scenes_feature.name,
                                FeatureOnlineStatus.get_attr_by_code(exist_scenes_feature.status_code).DESC))

            if is_scene_four_item_valid and alias_scene_domain_list:
                # generate group key
                group_key_list = [str(i['country_id']), str(i['business_id']), str(i['channel_id']), str(i['event_id'])]
                for alias_scene_domain in alias_scene_domain_list:
                    group_key_list.extend([alias_scene_domain.domain_name, alias_scene_domain.op, alias_scene_domain.domain_column])
                i['group_key'] = '_'.join(group_key_list)

                # add to result
                scene_feature_define = group_define_dict.get(i['group_key'])
                if scene_feature_define is None:
                    scene_feature_define = SceneFeatureDefine(tapd_id=str(i['src_tapd_id']),
                                                              country_id=i['country_id'], engine_event_id=i['event_id'],
                                                              business_type=i['business_id'], engine_channel_id=i['channel_id'],
                                                              scene_domain=alias_scene_domain_list, feature_ids=[])
                for feature_id in i['feature_ids']:
                    if feature_id not in scene_feature_define.feature_ids:
                        scene_feature_define.feature_ids.append(feature_id)
                group_define_dict[i['group_key']] = scene_feature_define

                if i['problem_list']:
                    has_problem_group_key_set.add(i['group_key'])

        for group_key, scene_feature_define in group_define_dict.items():
            if group_key in has_problem_group_key_set:
                continue
            if not scene_feature_define.feature_ids:
                continue
            result = await WorkOrderService().generate_scene_features(scene_feature_define)
            if result.order_id:
                group_orderid_dict[group_key] = result.order_id

        for i in scenes_features:
            group_key = i.get('group_key')
            order_id = group_orderid_dict.get(group_key) if group_key is not None else None
            if order_id is not None and i['feature_ids']:
                i['process_result'] = 'success'
                if i['tip_list']:
                    i['process_result'] = 'partially success.' + ''.join(i['tip_list'])
                i['work_order_id'] = order_id
                i['scenes_feature_names'] = ';'.join(i['scenes_feature_names'])
            else:
                if i['problem_list']:
                    i['process_result'] = ''.join(i['problem_list'])
                elif i['tip_list']:
                    i['process_result'] = ''.join(i['tip_list'])
                else:
                    i['process_result'] = 'same group has problem'
                i['work_order_id'] = ''
                i['scenes_feature_names'] = ''

        header = ['no', 'tapd_id', 'country', 'business', 'channel', 'event',
                  "scenes_input_params",
                  "base_features", 'process_result', 'work_order_id', 'scenes_feature_names']
        header_map = {
            'no': 'src_no',
            'tapd_id': 'src_tapd_id',
            'country': 'src_country',
            'business': 'src_business',
            'channel': 'src_channel',
            'event': 'src_event',
            'scenes_input_params': 'src_input_params',
            'base_features': 'src_base_features',
            'process_result': 'process_result',
            'work_order_id': 'work_order_id',
            'scenes_feature_names': 'scenes_feature_names',
        }
        _writer = ExcelWriter(header=header, header_map=header_map)
        _writer.write_data(scenes_features)
        return _writer.out

    @classmethod
    def get_id_and_check(cls, item_name, value):
        item_id = None
        problem_list = []

        left_index = value.rfind("(")
        right_index = value.rfind(")")
        if left_index > 0 and right_index > 0:
            item_id = value[left_index + 1:right_index].strip()
        if not item_id or not item_id.isdigit():
            problem_list.append(item_name + ' is empty or not number;')
        else:
            item_id = int(item_id)
        return item_id, problem_list

    @classmethod
    def process_scenes_input_params(cls, src_scenes_input_params: str) -> Tuple[List[SceneDomain], List[str]]:
        params_list = src_scenes_input_params.split(';')
        scene_domain_list = []
        problem_list = []
        for i, value in enumerate(params_list):
            value = value.strip()
            if value == '':
                continue
            if '!=' in value:
                domain_and_alias = value.split('!=')
                if len(domain_and_alias) != 2:
                    problem_list.append(f'scenes_input_params item {i + 1} invalid;')
                else:
                    scene_domain_list.append(SceneDomain(
                        domain_name=domain_and_alias[0].strip(), op='!=', domain_column=domain_and_alias[1].strip()))
            elif '=' in value:
                domain_and_alias = value.split('=')
                if len(domain_and_alias) != 2:
                    problem_list.append(f'scenes_input_params item {i + 1} invalid;')
                else:
                    scene_domain_list.append(SceneDomain(
                        domain_name=domain_and_alias[0].strip(), op='=', domain_column=domain_and_alias[1].strip()))
            else:
                problem_list.append(f'scenes_input_params item {i + 1} invalid;')
        if problem_list:
            return [], problem_list
        else:
            return scene_domain_list, problem_list

```

**code file end: service/feature_service/import_batch_scene_features_service.py**

### code file start: service/feature_service/nonstandard_feature_service.py 

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import json

from tortoise.models import Q

from common import errors, constants
from common.constants import get_lang_by_env, Lang
from common.logger import root_logger
from common.settings import GLOBAL_CONFIGS
from connectors.mysql_conn.async_mysql_conn import AsyncMysqlConn
from models.feature_model import TFeatureDefineRedundancy
from schemas import domain_schema, feature_schema
from service import BaseService
from service.dict_mapper_service import DictMapperService
from service.domain_service import DomainService
from service.feature_service.feature_service import FeatureService
from service.feature_service.scene_feature_service import SceneFeatureService
from utils.data_validators import ColumnType2PyFunc
from utils.time import timestamp


class NonstandardFeatureService(BaseService):
    MODEL = TFeatureDefineRedundancy

    @classmethod
    async def write_nonstandard_feat(cls, nonstandard_req: feature_schema.NonStandardFeatReq):
        """       """
        if not nonstandard_req or not nonstandard_req.data:
            return []
        if nonstandard_req.scenes_feature:
            return await cls.write_nonstandard_scenes_feature(nonstandard_req)
        domain_names = []
        data_types = set()
        for i in nonstandard_req.data:
            domain_names.append(i.domain_name)
            i.data_type = ColumnType2PyFunc(i.data_type, default=i.data_type).to_python_type()
            if i.data_type is None:
                continue
            data_types.add(i.data_type)
        _data_type_mapper = await DictMapperService.get_or_create('data_type', list(data_types))
        data_type_mapper = _data_type_mapper.get('data_type', {})

        _filter = domain_schema.DomainFilter(domain_names=domain_names)
        domains = await DomainService.get_list(domain_schema.ListReq(filter=_filter))
        domain_mapper = {i.domain_name: i.id for i in domains.list}

        query = Q(domain_id__in=list(domain_mapper.values()), is_standard=1)
        query_set = await FeatureService.MODEL.select_many(query, ['domain_id', 'name'])
        standard_features = {'{}.{}'.format(i['domain_id'], i['name']) for i in query_set}
        now = timestamp()
        async with cls.MODEL.transaction():
            for item in nonstandard_req.data:
                domain_id = domain_mapper.get(item.domain_name)
                if domain_id is None:
                    err = errors.DomainExistsError()
                    err.error = f"{item.domain_name} not exists, please add the domain"
                    raise err
                nonstandard_feat = '{}.{}'.format(domain_id, item.name)
                if nonstandard_feat in standard_features:
                    continue
                _default = item.default
                info = item.info or {}
                _default = _default if _default is not None else info.get('default')
                _default = _default if _default is not None else 'null'
                if not isinstance(_default, str):
                    try:
                        _default = json.dumps(_default)
                    except Exception as e:
                        root_logger.error(e)
                        _default = str(_default)
                if info.get('allow_event'):
                    try:
                        allow_event = [int(i) for i in info.get('allow_event')]
                    except Exception as e:
                        root_logger.error(e)
                        allow_event = info.get('allow_event')
                    allow_event = json.dumps(allow_event)
                else:
                    allow_event = None
                is_in_table = info.get('is_in_table')
                if is_in_table is None:
                    is_in_table = 1 if item.feat_table else 0
                is_engine_use = item.is_engine_use
                limit_country = item.limit_country
                #        
                if item.data_delay:
                    delay = DictMapperService.trans_data_delay2code(item.data_delay)
                else:
                    item.data_delay = 'Second level delay'
                    delay = None
                if delay is None:
                    delay = DictMapperService.trans_data_delay2code('Second level delay')

                if GLOBAL_CONFIGS.get('env.company') == 'BNC':
                    country_ids = '[1]'
                elif GLOBAL_CONFIGS.get('env.company') == 'OWNBANK':
                    country_ids = '[3]'
                elif GLOBAL_CONFIGS.get('env.company') == 'TH':
                    country_ids = '[33]'
                else:
                    country_ids = item.country_ids or '[]'
                data_type = data_type_mapper.get(item.data_type)
                maintainer = item.maintainer if item.maintainer else "feature"
                relate_tables = json.dumps(item.relate_tables) if item.relate_tables else None
                relate_features = json.dumps(item.relate_features) if item.relate_features else None
                relate_topics = json.dumps(item.relate_topics) if item.relate_topics else None
                neo4j_relations = json.dumps(item.neo4j_relations) if item.neo4j_relations else None
                create_time = item.create_time if item.create_time else now
                update_time = item.update_time if item.update_time else now
                describe = item.descreption or item.description or ''
                feature_no = item.feature_no
                status_code = 1 if item.is_active != 0 else 2
                #        ,        description       extra_info       
                if item.name.startswith('_'):
                    extra_info = {
                        'describe': describe, 'delay': delay, 'data_type': data_type, 'is_active': item.is_active,
                        'is_engine_use': is_engine_use, 'limit_country': limit_country, 'maintainer': maintainer
                    }
                    extra_info = json.dumps(extra_info, ensure_ascii=False)
                else:
                    extra_info = None
                _query = {'name': item.name, 'domain_id': domain_id}
                _define_redundancy_defaults = {
                    'business': item.bussiness, 'country_ids': country_ids, 'relate_tables': relate_tables,
                    'relate_features': relate_features, 'neo4j_relations': neo4j_relations, 'is_in_table': is_in_table,
                    'feat_table': item.feat_table, 'file_path': item.file_path, 'relate_topics': relate_topics,
                    'outer_api': item.outer_api, 'info': json.dumps(info), 'feature_no': feature_no,
                    'extra_info': extra_info, 'create_time': create_time, 'update_time': update_time
                }
                # _orm, _ = await cls.MODEL.update_or_create(defaults=_define_redundancy_defaults, **_query)

                _orm, created = await cls.MODEL.get_or_create(defaults=_define_redundancy_defaults, **_query)
                if not created:
                    _define_redundancy_defaults.pop('create_time')
                    await _orm.update_from_dict(_define_redundancy_defaults).save()

                if item.name.startswith('_'):
                    continue
                invalid_tags = json.loads(item.invalid_tags) if item.invalid_tags else None
                invalid_tags = json.dumps(invalid_tags) if invalid_tags else None
                business = item.bussiness if item.bussiness else ''
                _feat_defaults = {
                    'logic_table_id': '', 'business': business, 'describe': describe, 'delay': delay, 'default': _default,
                    'data_type': data_type, 'status_code': status_code, 'is_engine_use': is_engine_use,
                    'maintainer': maintainer, 'is_standard': 0, 'country_ids': country_ids, 'allow_event': allow_event,
                    'limit_country': limit_country, 'create_time': create_time, 'update_time': update_time,
                    'online_time': create_time, 'invalid_tags': invalid_tags, 'redundancy_id': _orm.pk
                }
                if item.en_description:
                    _feat_defaults['en_describe'] = item.en_description
                if get_lang_by_env() == Lang.EN.CODE and not _feat_defaults.get('en_describe') and _feat_defaults.get('describe').isascii():
                    _feat_defaults['en_describe'] = _feat_defaults.get('describe')
                _orm, created = await FeatureService.MODEL.get_or_create(defaults=_feat_defaults, **_query)
                if not created:
                    _feat_defaults.pop('create_time')
                    _feat_defaults.pop('online_time')
                    await _orm.update_from_dict(_feat_defaults).save()

    @classmethod
    async def delete_nonstandard_feat(cls, nonstandard_req: feature_schema.NonStandardFeatReq):
        if not nonstandard_req or not nonstandard_req.data:
            return []
        domain_names = [i.domain_name for i in nonstandard_req.data]
        if not domain_names:
            return []
        domains = await DomainService.MODEL.select_many(Q(domain_name__in=domain_names), ['id', 'domain_name'])
        domain_mapper = {i['domain_name']: i['id'] for i in domains}

        try:
            async with FeatureService.MODEL.transaction():
                for item in nonstandard_req.data:
                    domain_id = domain_mapper.get(item.domain_name)
                    if not domain_id:
                        continue
                    query = Q(domain_id=domain_id, name=item.name)
                    await FeatureService.MODEL.delete_many(query)
                    await TFeatureDefineRedundancy.delete_many(query)
        except Exception as e:
            root_logger.error(e)
            raise errors.FeatureError()
        else:
            return True

    @classmethod
    async def get_online_nonstandard_feat_details(cls):
        sql = f"""
            select
                a.describe, a.status_code as is_active, a.delay, a.maintainer, a.limit_country, a.data_type,
                ad.name, ad.business as bussiness, ad.country_ids, ad.relate_tables, ad.relate_features, ad.feat_table,
                ad.neo4j_relations, ad.file_path, ad.info, ad.feature_no, ad.relate_topics, ad.outer_api, ad.extra_info,
                b.domain_name
            from
                {TFeatureDefineRedundancy.full_table_name()} ad
            left join {FeatureService.MODEL.full_table_name()} a on
                ad.domain_id = a.domain_id and ad.name = a.name
            left join {DomainService.MODEL.full_table_name()} b on 
                ad.domain_id = b.id
            order by ad.id
        """
        async with AsyncMysqlConn(db_type=constants.DbType.meta_feature_rw) as conn:
            query_set = await conn.select_many(sql)
        for item in query_set:
            if item['extra_info']:
                extra_info = json.loads(item['extra_info'])
                item.update(extra_info)

            if item['is_active'] == 2:
                item['is_active'] = 0
            item['data_type'] = DictMapperService.trans_data_type(item['data_type'])
            item['data_delay'] = DictMapperService.trans_data_delay(item['delay'])
            item['relate_topics'] = json.loads(item['relate_topics']) if item['relate_topics'] else None
            item['info'] = json.loads(item['info']) if item['info'] else {}
            item['bussiness'] = item['bussiness'] if item['bussiness'] else None
            try:
                relate_tables = json.loads(item['relate_tables']) if item['relate_tables'] else None
            except json.decoder.JSONDecodeError:
                relate_tables = None
            item['relate_tables'] = relate_tables if relate_tables else None
            item['relate_features'] = json.loads(item['relate_features']) if item['relate_features'] else None
            item['neo4j_relations'] = json.loads(item['neo4j_relations']) if item['neo4j_relations'] else None
            item['descreption'] = item.get('describe')
        return query_set

    @classmethod
    async def write_nonstandard_scenes_feature(cls, nonstandard_req: feature_schema.NonStandardFeatReq):
        feature_names = []
        domain_names = []
        for item in nonstandard_req.data:
            if item.domain_name is not None:
                domain_names.append(item.domain_name)
            if item.relate_features:
                feature_names.extend(item.relate_features)
        _filter = feature_schema.FeatureFilter(domain_names=domain_names, feature_names=feature_names)
        features = await FeatureService.get_list(feature_schema.ListReq(filter=_filter))
        domains = await DomainService.get_list(domain_schema.ListReq(_filter=domain_schema.DomainFilter(domain_names=domain_names)))
        mapper = {(i.domain, i.name): (i.id, i.domain_id) for i in features.list}
        domain_mapper = {i.domain_name: i.relate_domain for i in domains.list}
        async with SceneFeatureService.MODEL.transaction():
            for item in nonstandard_req.data:
                _query = {
                    'name': item.name, 'country_id': item.country_id, 'channel_id': item.channel_id,
                    'engine_event_id': item.engine_event_id, 'engine_business_id': item.business_type
                }
                create_time = item.create_time or timestamp()
                update_time = item.update_time or timestamp()
                feature_id, domain_id, relate_domain, args = None, None, None, None
                if item.info and item.info.get('domain_column', []):
                    args = [{'domain_column': j} for j in item.info.get('domain_column', [])]
                if item.relate_features and (item.domain_name, item.relate_features[0]) in mapper:
                    feature_id, domain_id = mapper.get((item.domain_name, item.relate_features[0]))
                    relate_domain = domain_mapper.get(item.domain_name)
                    args = [{'domain_name': i, 'op': '=', 'domain_column': j} for i, j in zip(relate_domain, item.info.get('domain_column', []))]

                _default = {
                    'env_business': item.env_business,
                    'is_standard': 0, 'describe': item.description or '', 'maintainer': item.maintainer,
                    'status_code': 1 if item.is_active != 0 else 2, 'default': item.default if item.default is not None else 'null',
                    'data_type': item.data_type, 'delay': item.data_delay,
                    'create_time': create_time, 'update_time': update_time, 'online_time': create_time,
                    'domain_column': args, 'dev_type': item.dev_type
                }
                if item.en_description:
                    _default['en_describe'] = item.en_description
                if get_lang_by_env() == Lang.EN.CODE and not _default.get('en_describe') and _default.get('describe').isascii():
                    _default['en_describe'] = _default.get('describe')
                if feature_id:
                    _default['feature_id'] = feature_id
                if domain_id:
                    _default['domain_id'] = domain_id

                _orm, created = await SceneFeatureService.MODEL.get_or_create(defaults=_default, **_query)
                if not created:
                    _default.pop('create_time')
                    _default.pop('online_time')
                    _orm.update_from_dict(_default)
                    await _orm.save()

```

**code file end: service/feature_service/nonstandard_feature_service.py**
